metadata.comments: Solution template for Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity

properties.description: k8s-secret-enumeration-followed-by-exec_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Kubernetes secret enumeration followed by pod exec
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let SecretOps =
  AzureDiagnostics
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where Category has "kube-audit"
  | where OperationName has_any ("secrets/list", "secrets/get")
  | where isnotempty(Caller_s)
  | summarize SecretCount = count(), SecretOps = make_set(OperationName, 10) by CallerNorm = tolower(Caller_s), SecretWindow = bin(TimeGenerated, 30m);
let ExecOps =
  AzureDiagnostics
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where Category has "kube-audit"
  | where OperationName has_any ("pods/exec", "pods/attach")
  | where isnotempty(Caller_s)
  | summarize ExecCount = count(), ExecOps = make_set(OperationName, 10) by CallerNorm = tolower(Caller_s), ExecWindow = bin(TimeGenerated, 30m);
SecretOps
| join kind=inner ExecOps on CallerNorm
| where ExecWindow between (SecretWindow .. (SecretWindow + 30m))
| extend DelayMinutes = datetime_diff("minute", ExecWindow, SecretWindow)
| summarize arg_min(DelayMinutes, *) by CallerNorm, SecretWindow
| extend TimeGenerated = SecretWindow
| project TimeGenerated, Caller = CallerNorm, SecretWindow, ExecWindow, DelayMinutes, SecretCount, ExecCount, SecretOps, ExecOps
| order by TimeGenerated desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Hunts for identities that enumerate Kubernetes secrets and then perform pod exec or attach operations in a short time window.

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 1

properties.displayName: Kubernetes secret enumeration followed by pod exec

properties.description: k8s-token-audit-then-novel-cloud-control-plane_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: K8s token audit then novel cloud control plane operations
properties.query:
// Time and tuning parameters.
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
let PivotWindow = 60m;
// Stage A: k8s audit indicators associated with token and workload execution paths.
let K8sTokenAudit =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AzureResourceId = coalesce(column_ifexists('AzureResourceId', ''), column_ifexists('CloudResourceId', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Kubernetes'
  | extend AF = todynamic(AdditionalFields)
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           NamespaceNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesNamespace), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.namespace', tostring(RawEventData))))),
           PodNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesPodName), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.name', tostring(RawEventData)))))
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where OpNorm has_any (
      'serviceaccounts/token',
      'tokenreviews',
      'pods/exec',
      'pods/attach',
      'secrets/get'
    )
  | summarize FirstK8s=min(Timestamp), LastK8s=max(Timestamp), K8sEventCount=count(), K8sOps=make_set(OperationName, 10)
    by IpNorm, UaNorm, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm;
// Build historical baseline of cloud operation tuples to identify first-seen pivots.
let CloudOpBaseline =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AzureResourceId = coalesce(column_ifexists('AzureResourceId', ''), column_ifexists('CloudResourceId', ''))
  | where Timestamp between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Azure'
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(OpNorm)
  | summarize by IpNorm, UaNorm, OpNorm;
// Current sensitive cloud control-plane operations.
let CloudSensitiveCurrent =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AzureResourceId = coalesce(column_ifexists('AzureResourceId', ''), column_ifexists('CloudResourceId', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Azure'
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(UaNorm)
  | where OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/listkeys/action'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/read'
  | project CloudTime=Timestamp, IpNorm, UaNorm, OpNorm, OperationName, AzureResourceId, ActionType, CountryCode, IsAnonymousProxy;
// Keep only novel cloud operation tuples for high-fidelity behavior change.
let CloudSensitiveNovel =
  CloudSensitiveCurrent
  | join kind=leftanti CloudOpBaseline on IpNorm, UaNorm, OpNorm;
// Correlate k8s precursor to novel cloud control-plane behavior.
K8sTokenAudit
| where isnotempty(UaNorm)
| join kind=inner CloudSensitiveNovel on IpNorm, UaNorm
| where CloudTime between (FirstK8s .. (LastK8s + PivotWindow))
| summarize FirstK8s=min(FirstK8s),
            LastK8s=max(LastK8s),
            FirstCloud=min(CloudTime),
            LastCloud=max(CloudTime),
            K8sEventCount=max(K8sEventCount),
            CloudEventCount=count(),
            K8sOps=any(K8sOps),
            CloudOps=make_set(OperationName, 15),
            CloudResources=make_set(AzureResourceId, 20),
            Countries=make_set(CountryCode, 5),
            AnyAnonymousProxy=max(toint(IsAnonymousProxy))
  by IpNorm, UaNorm, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstK8s
| order by CloudEventCount desc, FirstCloud desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Detects Kubernetes token and exec audit activity followed by first-seen cloud control-plane operations from the same IP and user-agent context.

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 2

properties.displayName: K8s token audit then novel cloud control plane operations

properties.description: keyvault-secret-read-then-partial-storage-exfil_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Key Vault secret read then partial storage exfil
properties.query:
// Execution window and thresholds.
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let PivotWindow = 4h;
let SuccessActivity = dynamic(["succeeded", "success"]);
let KeyAuthTypes = dynamic(["accountkey", "sas"]);
let MinStorageOps = 25;
let MinFailures = 3;
let MinReads = 8;
// Stage A: successful Key Vault secret retrieval from management plane telemetry.
let KeyVaultSecretReads =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm=tolower(Caller), CallerIp=tostring(CallerIpAddress),
           Op=tolower(OperationNameValue),
           Status=tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)),
           SubStatus=tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
  | where Op has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets/"
  | where Op in~ ("microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets/get", "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets/read")
  | where Status in (SuccessActivity) or SubStatus has "ok"
  // Collapse duplicate activity stages into one logical secret-read action.
  | extend ActionKey = iff(
      isnotempty(CorrelationId),
      strcat(CorrelationId, "|", CallerNorm, "|", Op, "|", tostring(ResourceId)),
      strcat(CallerNorm, "|", CallerIp, "|", tostring(SubscriptionId), "|", Op, "|", tostring(ResourceId), "|", tostring(bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)))
    )
  | summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by ActionKey
  | summarize FirstKvRead=min(TimeGenerated), LastKvRead=max(TimeGenerated),
              KvReadCount=count(), KvOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 20),
              KvResources=make_set(ResourceId, 30)
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp;
// Stage B: key-auth storage activity with per-actor summary.
let StorageActivity =
  CloudStorageAggregatedEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend IPAddress = coalesce(column_ifexists('IPAddress', ''), column_ifexists('IpAddress', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend ActorNorm=tolower(tostring(coalesce(AccountUpn, AccountObjectId, AccountApplicationId))),
           IpNorm=tostring(IPAddress),
           AuthNorm=tolower(tostring(AuthenticationType)),
           StorageNorm=tolower(tostring(StorageAccount))
  | where isnotempty(ActorNorm) and isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(StorageNorm)
  | where AuthNorm in (KeyAuthTypes)
  | summarize FirstStorage=min(Timestamp), LastStorage=max(Timestamp),
              StorageEvents=count(), StorageAccounts=dcount(StorageNorm),
              TotalOps=sum(tolong(coalesce(OperationsCount, 0))),
              TotalSuccess=sum(tolong(coalesce(SuccessfulOperationsCount, 0))),
              TotalFailures=sum(tolong(coalesce(FailedOperationsCount, 0))),
              TotalReads=sum(tolong(coalesce(SuccessfulReadOperations, 0))),
              TotalResponseBytes=sum(tolong(coalesce(TotalResponseLength, 0))),
              Services=make_set(ServiceType, 10),
              Accounts=make_set(StorageAccount, 30),
              Containers=make_set(StorageContainer, 30),
              UserAgents=make_set(UserAgentHeader, 10)
    by ActorNorm, IpNorm;
// Stage correlation: secret retrieval followed by mixed-outcome storage behavior.
KeyVaultSecretReads
| join kind=inner StorageActivity on $left.CallerNorm == $right.ActorNorm and $left.CallerIp == $right.IpNorm
| where FirstStorage between (FirstKvRead .. (LastKvRead + PivotWindow))
// Require meaningful activity and explicit mixed outcomes.
| where TotalOps >= MinStorageOps and TotalReads >= MinReads and TotalFailures >= MinFailures
| where TotalSuccess > 0 and TotalFailures > 0
| extend IdentityName = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[0]), CallerNorm),
         IdentityUPNSuffix = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[1]), ""),
         FailureToSuccessRatio = round(todouble(TotalFailures) / todouble(max_of(TotalSuccess, 1)), 3)
| project TimeGenerated=FirstKvRead,
          Identity=CallerNorm, IdentityName, IdentityUPNSuffix,
          SourceIp=CallerIp,
          FirstKvRead, LastKvRead, KvReadCount, KvOps, KvResources,
          FirstStorage, LastStorage,
          StorageEvents, StorageAccounts,
          TotalOps, TotalSuccess, TotalFailures, FailureToSuccessRatio,
          TotalReads, TotalResponseBytes,
          Services, Accounts, Containers, UserAgents
| order by TotalReads desc, TotalFailures desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Detects successful Key Vault secret retrieval followed by key-auth Azure Storage access with mixed success and failure outcomes.

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 3

properties.displayName: Key Vault secret read then partial storage exfil

properties.description: kv-harvest-spn-signin-then-out-of-scope-resource-access_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Key Vault harvest to SPN sign-in then out-of-scope resource access
properties.query:
// Time and tuning parameters
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
let PivotWindow = 6h;
let ScopeWindow = 6h;
let SuccessStatus = dynamic(['succeeded', 'success']);
// Stage A: successful Key Vault secret retrieval
let KvSecretReads =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller)),
           CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress),
           Op = tolower(tostring(OperationNameValue)),
           Status = tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)),
           SubStatus = tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
  | where Op has 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults/' and Op has '/secrets/'
  | where Op has_any ('/get', '/read')
  | where Status in (SuccessStatus) or SubStatus has 'ok'
  | summarize FirstKvRead=min(TimeGenerated), LastKvRead=max(TimeGenerated), KvReadCount=count() by CallerNorm, CallerIp;
// Stage B: successful SPN sign-ins in timeframe
let SpnSignins =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ResultType =~ 'Success' or ResultType == '0'
  | extend SpId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
           AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
           SigninIp = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           CredNorm = tostring(ClientCredentialType)
  | where isnotempty(SpId) and isnotempty(SigninIp)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName = tostring(ServicePrincipalName), Identity, SigninIp, UaNorm, CredNorm;
// Baseline historical scope touched by each principal in control
let ScopeBaseline =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller)),
           ScopeKey = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ResourceGroup, ResourceId, SubscriptionId))),
           Provider = tostring(ResourceProviderValue)
  | where isnotempty(ScopeKey)
  | summarize by CallerNorm, ScopeKey, Provider;
// Current scope touched by caller after suspicious SPN authentication
let ScopeCurrent =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller)),
           ScopeKey = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ResourceGroup, ResourceId, SubscriptionId))),
           Provider = tostring(ResourceProviderValue),
           Op = tostring(OperationNameValue)
  | where isnotempty(ScopeKey)
  | project ActTime = TimeGenerated, CallerNorm, ScopeKey, Provider, Op, ResourceId, ResourceGroup, SubscriptionId, CallerIpAddress;
// Keep only novel scope for each caller.
let ScopeNovel =
  ScopeCurrent
  | join kind=leftanti ScopeBaseline on CallerNorm, ScopeKey, Provider;
// Correlate full chain: KeyVault read -> SPN sign-in -> novel scope
KvSecretReads
| join kind=inner (
    SpnSignins
    | extend JoinKeys = pack_array(SpId, AppIdNorm)
    | mv-expand JoinKey = JoinKeys
    | extend JoinKey = tostring(JoinKey)
    | project SigninTime, SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName, Identity, SigninIp, UaNorm, CredNorm, JoinKey
  ) on $left.CallerNorm == $right.JoinKey and $left.CallerIp == $right.SigninIp
| where SigninTime between (FirstKvRead .. (LastKvRead + PivotWindow))
| join kind=inner ScopeNovel on $left.CallerNorm == $right.CallerNorm
| where ActTime between (SigninTime .. (SigninTime + ScopeWindow))
| summarize FirstKvRead=min(FirstKvRead),
            FirstSignin=min(SigninTime),
            FirstNovelScope=min(ActTime),
            NovelScopeCount=dcount(ScopeKey),
            Providers=make_set(Provider, 15),
            Operations=make_set(Op, 20),
            Scopes=make_set(ScopeKey, 30),
            ResourceIds=make_set(ResourceId, 20),
            ResourceGroups=make_set(ResourceGroup, 20),
            Subscriptions=make_set(SubscriptionId, 10)
  by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName, Identity, UaNorm, CredNorm
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstKvRead
| where NovelScopeCount >= 2
| project TimeGenerated,
          Identity = CallerNorm,
          SourceIp = CallerIp,
          ServicePrincipalId = SpId,
          AppId = AppIdNorm,
          ServicePrincipalName = SpnName,
          FirstKvRead,
          FirstSignin,
          FirstNovelScope,
          NovelScopeCount,
          Providers,
          Operations,
          Scopes,
          ResourceIds,
          ResourceGroups,
          Subscriptions,
          UserAgent = UaNorm,
          ClientCredentialType = CredNorm
| order by NovelScopeCount desc, FirstNovelScope desc

properties.description: pod-cloud-cli-then-keyvault-storage-access_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Pod cloud CLI then KeyVault or storage access
properties.query:
// Time and tuning parameters.
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let ProcToK8sWindow = 15m;
let PivotWindow = 90m;
let MinCloudOps = 3;
// Stage A: pod processes with cloud CLI/token usage indicators.
let PodCloudCliSignals =
  CloudProcessEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(KubernetesNamespace) and isnotempty(KubernetesPodName)
  | extend NamespaceNorm = tolower(tostring(KubernetesNamespace)),
           PodNorm = tolower(tostring(KubernetesPodName)),
           Proc = tolower(tostring(ProcessName)),
           Cmd = tolower(tostring(ProcessCommandLine))
  | where (Proc has_any ('az', 'aws', 'gcloud', 'kubectl', 'curl', 'wget', 'pwsh', 'python')
           and Cmd has_any ('token', 'federated', 'oauth2', 'identity', 'keyvault', 'storage', 'sts.windows.net', 'login.microsoft.com'))
     or Cmd has_any (
          'az account',
          'az keyvault',
          'az storage',
          'oauth2/v2.0/token',
          'sts.windows.net',
          'azure_federated_token_file'
        )
  | project ProcTime=Timestamp, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, ContainerName, ContainerImageName, ProcessName, ParentProcessName, ProcessCommandLine;
// Stage B: bridge to source IP via Kubernetes audit for same namespace/pod.
let K8sAuditBridge =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Kubernetes'
  | extend AF = todynamic(AdditionalFields)
  | extend NamespaceNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesNamespace), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.namespace', tostring(RawEventData))))),
           PodNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesPodName), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.name', tostring(RawEventData))))),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName))
  | where isnotempty(NamespaceNorm) and isnotempty(PodNorm) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where OpNorm has_any ('pods/exec', 'pods/attach', 'serviceaccounts/token', 'secrets/get')
  | project K8sTime=Timestamp, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, IpNorm, UaNorm, K8sOperation=OperationName;
// Stage C: cloud Key Vault and Storage operations from same source IP.
let CloudDataOps =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AzureResourceId = coalesce(column_ifexists('AzureResourceId', ''), column_ifexists('CloudResourceId', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Azure'
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where OpNorm contains 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/listkeys/action'
  | where ActionType in~ ('Read', 'Update', 'Create', 'Other')
  | project CloudTime=Timestamp, IpNorm, UaNorm, CloudOperation=OperationName, AzureResourceId, ActionType, CountryCode, IsAnonymousProxy;
// Correlate process -> k8s audit -> cloud data operations.
PodCloudCliSignals
| join kind=inner K8sAuditBridge on NamespaceNorm, PodNorm
| where K8sTime between (ProcTime .. (ProcTime + ProcToK8sWindow))
| join kind=inner CloudDataOps on IpNorm
| where CloudTime between (K8sTime .. (K8sTime + PivotWindow))
| summarize FirstProcess=min(ProcTime),
            FirstK8s=min(K8sTime),
            FirstCloud=min(CloudTime),
            LastCloud=max(CloudTime),
            CloudEventCount=count(),
            K8sOps=make_set(K8sOperation, 10),
            CloudOps=make_set(CloudOperation, 20),
            CloudResources=make_set(AzureResourceId, 25),
            Countries=make_set(CountryCode, 5),
            AnyAnonymousProxy=max(toint(IsAnonymousProxy))
  by NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, IpNorm, ContainerName, ContainerImageName, ProcessName, ParentProcessName, ProcessCommandLine
| where CloudEventCount >= MinCloudOps
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstProcess
| order by CloudEventCount desc, FirstCloud desc

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 7

properties.displayName: Multi-service network exposure followed by key and data access

properties.description: NetworkSecurityControlTampering_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Azure Network Configuration Tampered by Compromised Identity
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let NetworkConfigOps = dynamic([
    "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/azureFirewalls/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/azureFirewalls/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/ruleCollectionGroups/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/ruleCollectionGroups/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/frontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicies/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/frontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicies/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/routes/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/routes/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/delete",
    "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write",
    "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete"
]);
let ApplianceIPs =
    DeviceInfo
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where IsInternetFacing == true
    | where DeviceCategory in~ ("Network device", "Unknown")
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
    | join kind=inner (
        DeviceNetworkInfo
        | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
        | mv-expand IP = parse_json(IPAddresses)
        | extend ApplianceIP = tostring(IP.IPAddress)
        | where isnotempty(ApplianceIP)
        | where ApplianceIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    ) on DeviceId
    | project ApplianceIP, ApplianceName = DeviceName, ApplianceOS = OSPlatform;
let UEBASignals =
    BehaviorAnalytics
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | summarize
        UEBAInvestigationPriority = max(InvestigationPriority),
        UEBAFirstTimeOp           = countif(tostring(ActivityInsights.FirstTimeUserUsedApp) == "True"),
        UEBAFirstTimeCountry      = countif(tostring(ActivityInsights.FirstTimeUserConnectedFromCountry) == "True")
      by UserPrincipalName;
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
| where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
| where OperationNameValue in~ (NetworkConfigOps)
| extend Auth = parse_json(Authorization_d)
| where not (
    OperationNameValue =~ "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete"
    and tostring(Auth.evidence.role) =~ "PIM Contributor"
)
| extend CallerType = case(
    tostring(Auth.evidence.principalType) =~ "ServicePrincipal", "ServicePrincipal",
    Caller contains "@",                                          "User",
    tostring(Auth.evidence.principalType) =~ "User",             "User",
    "Unknown")
| extend CallerUPN = iff(Caller contains "@", Caller, "")
| extend ResourceCategory = case(
    OperationNameValue contains "networkSecurityGroup",   "NSG",
    OperationNameValue contains "firewallPolicies"
        or OperationNameValue contains "azureFirewall",   "Firewall",
    OperationNameValue contains "WebApplicationFirewall", "WAF",
    OperationNameValue contains "virtualNetworkGateway",  "VPN Gateway",
    OperationNameValue contains "routeTable"
        or OperationNameValue contains "routes/",         "Route Table",
    OperationNameValue contains "subnets",                "Subnet",
    OperationNameValue contains "roleAssignments",        "Role Assignment",
    OperationNameValue)
| extend ChangeAction = iff(OperationNameValue endswith "/delete", "Delete", "Write")
| project
    EventTime        = TimeGenerated,
    ResourceCategory,
    ChangeAction,
    OperationName    = OperationNameValue,
    ResourceGroup,
    ResourceId       = _ResourceId,
    Caller,
    CallerType,
    CallerUPN,
    CallerIpAddress,
    SubscriptionId
| join kind=leftouter UEBASignals on $left.CallerUPN == $right.UserPrincipalName
| extend UEBAFlagged = isnotempty(UEBAInvestigationPriority) and UEBAInvestigationPriority > 0
| join kind=leftouter ApplianceIPs on $left.CallerIpAddress == $right.ApplianceIP
| extend FromApplianceIP = isnotempty(ApplianceName)
| project-away UserPrincipalName, ApplianceIP
| extend SignalStrength = case(
    FromApplianceIP,                                               "High - caller IP matches known appliance",
    CallerType == "ServicePrincipal" and ChangeAction == "Delete", "High - SPN deleting network control",
    CallerType == "ServicePrincipal",                              "Medium - SPN modifying network config",
    UEBAFlagged and ChangeAction == "Delete",                      "Medium - UEBA-flagged user deleting control",
    UEBAFlagged,                                                   "Medium - UEBA-flagged user",
    "Low - review for context")
| extend
    AccountNameOnly  = tostring(split(CallerUPN, "@")[0]),
    AccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(CallerUPN, "@")[1])
| sort by EventTime desc

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 8

properties.displayName: Azure Network Configuration Tampered by Compromised Identity

properties.description: novel-spn-signin-followed-by-rbac-write_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Novel SPN sign-in followed by Azure RBAC write
properties.query:
// Time and tuning parameters
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
let RbacWindow = 60m;
// Baseline successful SPN sign-in tuples for rarity test
let SpnBaseline =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | where ResultType =~ 'Success' or ResultType == '0'
  | extend SpId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
           AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           CredNorm = tolower(tostring(ClientCredentialType))
  | where isnotempty(SpId) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | summarize by SpId, AppIdNorm, IpNorm, UaNorm, CredNorm;
// Current successful SPN sign-ins in hunt interval
let SpnCurrent =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ResultType =~ 'Success' or ResultType == '0'
  | extend SpId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
           AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           CredNorm = tolower(tostring(ClientCredentialType))
  | where isnotempty(SpId) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated,
            SpId,
            AppIdNorm,
            SpnName = tostring(ServicePrincipalName),
            Identity,
            IpNorm,
            UaNorm,
            CredNorm,
            ResourceDisplayName,
            CorrelationId;
// Keep only first-seen tuples for high-fidelity hunting.
let SpnNovel =
  SpnCurrent
  | join kind=leftanti SpnBaseline on SpId, AppIdNorm, IpNorm, UaNorm, CredNorm;
// Collect RBAC-impacting control-plane write operations
let RbacWrites =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ActivityStatusValue =~ 'Succeeded' or ActivitySubstatusValue has 'OK'
  | extend Op = tolower(tostring(OperationNameValue)),
           CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller))
  | where Op has_any (
      'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/write',
      'microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/write',
      'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/delete'
    )
  | project WriteTime = TimeGenerated,
            CallerNorm,
            CallerIpAddress,
            OperationNameValue,
            ResourceId,
            ResourceGroup,
            SubscriptionId,
            CorrelationId,
            Authorization_d;
// Correlate novel SPN sign-in to RBAC writes via ServicePrincipalId/AppId
SpnNovel
| extend JoinKeys = pack_array(SpId, AppIdNorm)
| mv-expand JoinKey = JoinKeys
| extend JoinKey = tostring(JoinKey)
| join kind=inner (
    RbacWrites
    | project WriteTime, CallerNorm, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ResourceId, ResourceGroup, SubscriptionId, CorrelationId, Authorization_d
  ) on $left.JoinKey == $right.CallerNorm
// Require near-term temporal chain for stronger suspicion.
| where WriteTime between (SigninTime .. (SigninTime + RbacWindow))
| summarize FirstSignin=min(SigninTime),
            FirstRbacWrite=min(WriteTime),
            LastRbacWrite=max(WriteTime),
            RbacWriteCount=count(),
            Operations=make_set(OperationNameValue, 10),
            ResourcesTouched=make_set(ResourceId, 20),
            ResourceGroups=make_set(ResourceGroup, 20),
            Subscriptions=make_set(SubscriptionId, 10),
            FirstSigninIp=any(IpNorm),
            SigninIps=make_set(IpNorm, 5),
            WriteIps=make_set(CallerIpAddress, 5)
  by SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName, Identity, UaNorm, CredNorm
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstSignin
| order by RbacWriteCount desc, FirstRbacWrite desc

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 9

properties.displayName: Novel SPN sign-in followed by Azure RBAC write

properties.description: pod-token-tooling-then-cloud-rbac-write_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Pod token tooling then cloud RBAC write
properties.query:
// Time and tuning parameters.
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let ProcToK8sWindow = 20m;
let K8sToCloudWindow = 45m;
// Stage A: process-level signs of token access or cloud token exchange tooling in pods.
let PodTokenTooling =
  CloudProcessEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AzureResourceId = coalesce(column_ifexists('AzureResourceId', ''), column_ifexists('CloudResourceId', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(KubernetesNamespace) and isnotempty(KubernetesPodName)
  | extend NamespaceNorm = tolower(tostring(KubernetesNamespace)),
           PodNorm = tolower(tostring(KubernetesPodName)),
           Cmd = tolower(tostring(ProcessCommandLine)),
           Proc = tolower(tostring(ProcessName)),
           ParentProc = tolower(tostring(ParentProcessName))
  | where Cmd has_any (
      '/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token',
      'azure_federated_token_file',
      'oauth2/v2.0/token',
      'login.microsoft.com',
      'sts.windows.net',
      'az login',
      'get-azaccesstoken'
    )
    or (Proc has_any ('az', 'curl', 'wget', 'kubectl', 'pwsh', 'python')
        and Cmd has_any ('token', 'federated', 'oauth2', 'login.microsoftonline', 'sts.windows.net', 'serviceaccount'))
  | project ProcTime=Timestamp, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, KubernetesResource, ContainerName, ContainerImageName,
            ProcessName, ParentProcessName, ProcessCommandLine, AzureResourceId, ContainerId;
// Stage B: Kubernetes audit events that can expose token-abuse precursor context, including source IP.
let K8sAuditBridge =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AzureResourceId = coalesce(column_ifexists('AzureResourceId', ''), column_ifexists('CloudResourceId', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Kubernetes'
  | extend AF = todynamic(AdditionalFields)
  | extend NamespaceNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesNamespace), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.namespace', tostring(RawEventData))))),
           PodNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesPodName), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.name', tostring(RawEventData))))),
           OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
  | where isnotempty(NamespaceNorm) and isnotempty(PodNorm) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where OpNorm has_any (
      'pods/exec',
      'pods/attach',
      'serviceaccounts/token',
      'tokenreviews',
      'secrets/get',
      'serviceaccounts/get'
    )
  | project K8sAuditTime=Timestamp, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, IpNorm, UaNorm, K8sOperation=OperationName, K8sResourceId=AzureResourceId;
// Stage C: Azure RBAC write operations from CloudAuditEvents.
let CloudRbacWrites =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AzureResourceId = coalesce(column_ifexists('AzureResourceId', ''), column_ifexists('CloudResourceId', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Azure'
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/'
  | project CloudTime=Timestamp, IpNorm, UaNorm, CloudOperation=OperationName, CloudResourceId=AzureResourceId, ActionType, CountryCode, IsAnonymousProxy;
// Correlate A->B by namespace/pod and near-time.
PodTokenTooling
| join kind=inner K8sAuditBridge on NamespaceNorm, PodNorm
| where K8sAuditTime between (ProcTime .. (ProcTime + ProcToK8sWindow))
// Correlate B->C by source IP and near-time to represent k8s-to-cloud pivot.
| join kind=inner CloudRbacWrites on IpNorm
| where CloudTime between (K8sAuditTime .. (K8sAuditTime + K8sToCloudWindow))
| summarize FirstProcess=min(ProcTime),
            FirstK8sAudit=min(K8sAuditTime),
            FirstCloudWrite=min(CloudTime),
            LastCloudWrite=max(CloudTime),
            CloudWriteCount=count(),
            K8sOps=make_set(K8sOperation, 10),
            CloudOps=make_set(CloudOperation, 10),
            CloudResources=make_set(CloudResourceId, 20),
            Countries=make_set(CountryCode, 5),
            AnyAnonymousProxy=max(toint(IsAnonymousProxy))
  by NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, IpNorm, ContainerName, ContainerImageName, ProcessName, ParentProcessName, ProcessCommandLine
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstProcess
| order by CloudWriteCount desc, FirstCloudWrite desc

properties.description: cross-subscription-and-rg-enumeration-sweep_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Cross-subscription and resource-group enumeration sweep by single identity
properties.query:
// Parameterized execution window supplied by the hunting framework.
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
// Bin window used to detect high-velocity discovery bursts.
let BurstBin = 30m;
let SuccessActivityStatusValues = dynamic(["succeeded", "success"]);
// IAM/resource discovery operations in scope.
let IamReconOps = dynamic([
  "microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/read",
  "microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/read",
  "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/read",
  "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups/read",
  "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups/resources/read",
  "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/providers/read"
]);
// Identify successful and deduplicated control-plane discovery events.
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
| where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
| extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tolower(tostring(CallerIpAddress)), Op = tolower(OperationNameValue),
         StatusNorm = tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)), SubStatusNorm = tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
| where Op in (IamReconOps)
| where StatusNorm in (SuccessActivityStatusValues) or SubStatusNorm has "ok"
// Dedupe multi-stage AzureActivity records for one logical read action.
| extend ActionKey = iff(
    isnotempty(CorrelationId),
    strcat(CorrelationId, "|", Op, "|", CallerNorm),
    strcat(CallerNorm, "|", CallerIp, "|", Op, "|", tostring(SubscriptionId), "|", tostring(ResourceId), "|", tostring(bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)))
  )
| summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by ActionKey
// Compute breadth and velocity indicators per caller and time bucket.
| summarize
    ReconCount=count(),
    DistinctOps=dcount(Op),
    DistinctSubscriptions=dcount(SubscriptionId),
    DistinctResourceGroups=dcountif(ResourceGroup, isnotempty(ResourceGroup)),
    Subscriptions=make_set(SubscriptionId, 100),
    ResourceGroups=make_set_if(ResourceGroup, isnotempty(ResourceGroup), 200),
    ReconOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 20),
    ReconCorrelationIds=make_set_if(CorrelationId, isnotempty(CorrelationId), 30),
    FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated)
  by CallerNorm, CallerIp, TimeBucket=bin(TimeGenerated, BurstBin)
// High-fidelity thresholds for broad environment mapping.
| where ReconCount >= 15 and DistinctOps >= 3
| where DistinctSubscriptions >= 2 or DistinctResourceGroups >= 8
| extend IdentityName = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[0]), CallerNorm),
         IdentityUPNSuffix = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[1]), "")
| project TimeGenerated=FirstSeen, Caller=CallerNorm, CallerIp,
          IdentityName, IdentityUPNSuffix,
          TimeBucket, FirstSeen, LastSeen,
          ReconCount, DistinctOps, DistinctSubscriptions, DistinctResourceGroups,
          Subscriptions, ResourceGroups, ReconOps, ReconCorrelationIds
| order by ReconCount desc, DistinctSubscriptions desc, DistinctResourceGroups desc

properties.description: iam-enumeration-followed-by-keyvault-operations_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: IAM and subscription enumeration followed by Key Vault operations
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let IamRecon =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationNameValue has_any (
      "microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/read",
      "microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/read",
      "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/read",
      "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups/read",
      "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups/resources/read",
      "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/providers/read"
    )
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress)
  | summarize EnumCount=count(), EnumOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 20), FirstEnum=min(TimeGenerated), LastEnum=max(TimeGenerated)
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SubscriptionId;
let KeyVaultOps =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationNameValue has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/"
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress)
  | summarize KvCount=count(), KvOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 20), FirstKv=min(TimeGenerated), LastKv=max(TimeGenerated),
              Resources=make_set(ResourceId, 20)
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SubscriptionId;
IamRecon
| join kind=inner KeyVaultOps on CallerNorm, SubscriptionId
| where FirstKv between (FirstEnum .. (LastEnum + 2h))
| project TimeGenerated=FirstEnum, FirstEnum, LastEnum, FirstKv, LastKv, Caller=CallerNorm, CallerIp,
          SubscriptionId, EnumCount, KvCount, EnumOps, KvOps, Resources
| order by FirstKv desc

properties.description: iam-recon-followed-by-role-assignment-write_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: IAM reconnaissance followed by role assignment write attempt
properties.query:
// Parameterized execution window supplied by the hunting framework.
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
// Time allowed between reconnaissance and privilege-modifying action.
let SequenceWindow = 2h;
// Success-state filters for control-plane telemetry.
let SuccessActivityStatusValues = dynamic(["succeeded", "success", "accepted"]);
// Discovery operations that indicate IAM and scope mapping.
let ReconOps = dynamic([
  "microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/read",
  "microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/read",
  "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/read",
  "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups/read",
  "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups/resources/read",
  "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/providers/read"
]);
// Role-assignment write and delete operations for escalation/persistence.
let RoleWriteOps = dynamic([
  "microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/write",
  "microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/delete"
]);
// Stage 1: successful and deduplicated IAM reconnaissance.
let ReconStage =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tolower(tostring(CallerIpAddress)), Op = tolower(OperationNameValue),
           StatusNorm = tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)), SubStatusNorm = tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
  | where Op in (ReconOps)
  | where StatusNorm in (SuccessActivityStatusValues) or SubStatusNorm has "ok"
  // Dedupe multi-stage AzureActivity records for one logical operation.
  | extend ActionKey = iff(
      isnotempty(CorrelationId),
      strcat(CorrelationId, "|", Op, "|", CallerNorm),
      strcat(CallerNorm, "|", CallerIp, "|", Op, "|", tostring(SubscriptionId), "|", tostring(ResourceId), "|", tostring(bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)))
    )
  | summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by ActionKey
  | summarize
      ReconCount=count(),
      DistinctReconOps=dcount(Op),
      ReconOpsSeen=make_set(OperationNameValue, 20),
      ReconCorrelationIds=make_set_if(CorrelationId, isnotempty(CorrelationId), 30),
      FirstRecon=min(TimeGenerated),
      LastRecon=max(TimeGenerated),
      ReconSubscriptions=dcount(SubscriptionId)
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp;
// Stage 2: successful and deduplicated role-assignment changes.
let RoleWriteStage =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tolower(tostring(CallerIpAddress)), Op = tolower(OperationNameValue),
           StatusNorm = tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)), SubStatusNorm = tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
  | where Op in (RoleWriteOps)
  | where StatusNorm in (SuccessActivityStatusValues) or SubStatusNorm has "ok"
  // Dedupe multi-stage AzureActivity records for one logical operation.
  | extend ActionKey = iff(
      isnotempty(CorrelationId),
      strcat(CorrelationId, "|", Op, "|", CallerNorm),
      strcat(CallerNorm, "|", CallerIp, "|", Op, "|", tostring(SubscriptionId), "|", tostring(ResourceId), "|", tostring(bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)))
    )
  | summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by ActionKey
  | summarize
      RoleWriteCount=count(),
      RoleWriteOpsSeen=make_set(OperationNameValue, 10),
      RoleWriteResources=make_set(ResourceId, 20),
      RoleWriteCorrelationIds=make_set_if(CorrelationId, isnotempty(CorrelationId), 30),
      FirstRoleWrite=min(TimeGenerated),
      LastRoleWrite=max(TimeGenerated),
      RoleWriteSubscriptions=make_set(SubscriptionId, 20)
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp;
// Sequence stage 1 into stage 2 for high-confidence escalation staging.
ReconStage
| where ReconCount >= 8 and DistinctReconOps >= 3
| join kind=inner RoleWriteStage on CallerNorm, CallerIp
| where FirstRoleWrite between (FirstRecon .. (LastRecon + SequenceWindow))
| extend IdentityName = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[0]), CallerNorm),
         IdentityUPNSuffix = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[1]), "")
| project TimeGenerated=FirstRecon, Caller=CallerNorm, CallerIp,
          IdentityName, IdentityUPNSuffix,
          FirstRecon, LastRecon, ReconCount, DistinctReconOps, ReconSubscriptions, ReconOpsSeen, ReconCorrelationIds,
          FirstRoleWrite, LastRoleWrite, RoleWriteCount, RoleWriteOpsSeen, RoleWriteResources, RoleWriteSubscriptions, RoleWriteCorrelationIds
| order by FirstRoleWrite desc, RoleWriteCount desc

properties.description: identity-app-enum-followed-by-noninteractive-novel-tuple_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Identity and app enumeration followed by novel non-interactive tuple
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let DiscoveryOps =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationNameValue has_any (
      "microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/read",
      "microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/read",
      "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/read",
      "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups/read",
      "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups/resources/read",
      "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/providers/read"
    )
  | where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller)
  | project EnumTime=TimeGenerated, CallerNorm, CallerIpAddress, EnumOperation=OperationNameValue, SubscriptionId;
let BaselineNISignin =
  AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - 14d) .. StartTime)
  | where ResultType in~ ("0", "Success")
  | where isnotempty(Identity) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
  | extend IdentityNorm = tolower(Identity), AppIdNorm = tolower(AppId), SrcIp = tostring(IPAddress), Ua = tostring(UserAgent)
  | summarize by IdentityNorm, AppIdNorm, SrcIp, Ua;
let CurrentNovelNISignin =
  AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ResultType in~ ("0", "Success")
  | where isnotempty(Identity) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
  | extend IdentityNorm = tolower(Identity), AppIdNorm = tolower(AppId), SrcIp = tostring(IPAddress), Ua = tostring(UserAgent)
  | join kind=leftanti BaselineNISignin on IdentityNorm, AppIdNorm, SrcIp, Ua
  | project SigninTime=TimeGenerated, Identity, IdentityNorm, AppId, IPAddress=SrcIp, UserAgent=Ua, CorrelationId, ResultType, ConditionalAccessStatus;
CurrentNovelNISignin
| join kind=inner DiscoveryOps on $left.IPAddress == $right.CallerIpAddress
| where SigninTime between (EnumTime .. (EnumTime + 2h))
| project TimeGenerated=EnumTime, SigninTime, Identity, AppId, IPAddress, UserAgent, CorrelationId,
          EnumOperation, SubscriptionId, Caller=CallerNorm, ConditionalAccessStatus, ResultType
| order by SigninTime desc

properties.description: keyvault-discovery-followed-by-datastore-enumeration_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Key Vault discovery followed by data-store access enumeration
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let KeyVaultDiscovery =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationNameValue has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/" and OperationNameValue has_any ("/read", "/list", "accesspolicies")
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress)
  | summarize FirstKv=min(TimeGenerated), LastKv=max(TimeGenerated), KvOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 20), KvCount=count()
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SubscriptionId;
let DataStoreRecon =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationNameValue has_any (
      "microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/",
      "microsoft.sql/servers/databases/",
      "microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts/",
      "microsoft.kusto/clusters/",
      "listkeys/action"
    )
    and OperationNameValue has_any ("/read", "/list", "listkeys/action", "/query")
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress)
  | summarize FirstData=min(TimeGenerated), LastData=max(TimeGenerated), DataOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 30),
              DataResources=make_set(ResourceId, 30), DataCount=count()
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SubscriptionId;
KeyVaultDiscovery
| join kind=inner DataStoreRecon on CallerNorm, SubscriptionId
| where FirstData between (FirstKv .. (LastKv + 2h))
| project TimeGenerated=FirstKv, FirstKv, LastKv, FirstData, LastData, Caller=CallerNorm, CallerIp, SubscriptionId,
          KvCount, DataCount, KvOps, DataOps, DataResources
| order by FirstData desc

properties.description: oauth-consent-followed-by-firstseen-oauthappid-burst_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: OAuth consent change followed by first-seen OAuthAppId burst
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
let ConsentChanges =
  _Im_AuditEvent(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
  | extend OperationText = tostring(coalesce(Operation, EventType, EventMessage)),
           OperationName = tostring(Operation),
           InitiatorUpn = tostring(ActorUsername),
           InitiatorIp = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           InitiatorApp = tostring(ActingAppName),
           CorrelationId = tostring(column_ifexists("CorrelationId", ""))
  | where OperationText has_any ("consent", "permission grant", "app role", "application")
  | project ChangeTime=TimeGenerated, ActivityDisplayName=OperationText, OperationName, CorrelationId, InitiatorUpn, InitiatorIp, InitiatorApp;
let HistoricalOAuthApps =
  CloudAppEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | where isnotempty(OAuthAppId)
  | project OAuthAppId
  | summarize by OAuthAppId;
let FirstSeenOAuthBursts =
  CloudAppEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(OAuthAppId)
  | project TimeGenerated, OAuthAppId, Application, IPAddress, AccountId
  | join kind=leftanti HistoricalOAuthApps on OAuthAppId
  | summarize FirstActivity=min(TimeGenerated), LastActivity=max(TimeGenerated), EventCount=count(),
              DistinctUsers=dcount(AccountId), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress),
              Users=make_set(AccountId, 20), SrcIps=make_set(IPAddress, 20)
    by OAuthAppId, Application, IPAddress
  | where EventCount >= 5;
ConsentChanges
| join kind=inner FirstSeenOAuthBursts on $left.InitiatorIp == $right.IPAddress
| where FirstActivity between (ChangeTime .. (ChangeTime + 24h))
| project TimeGenerated=ChangeTime, FirstActivity, LastActivity, ActivityDisplayName, OperationName, CorrelationId,
          InitiatorUpn, InitiatorIp, InitiatorApp, OAuthAppId, Application, EventCount, DistinctUsers, DistinctIPs, Users, SrcIps
| order by FirstActivity desc

properties.displayName: Email Forwarding Rule Created to External Address
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let orgDomains = dynamic(["contoso.com", "contoso.onmicrosoft.com"]); // Replace with your organization's domains
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
| where ActionType in ("New-InboxRule", "Set-InboxRule", "Set-Mailbox")
| extend UserUPN  = tostring(RawEventData.UserId)
| extend ClientIP = tostring(RawEventData.ClientIP)
| mv-expand Param = RawEventData.Parameters
| extend ParamName  = tostring(Param.Name)
| extend ParamValue = tostring(Param.Value)
| where ParamName in (
    "ForwardTo", "ForwardAsAttachmentTo",
    "RedirectTo", "ForwardingSmtpAddress",
    "ForwardingAddress", "DeliverToMailboxAndForward")
| where isnotempty(ParamValue) and ParamValue !~ "False"
| summarize
    FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated),
    ActionTypes=make_set(ActionType),
    ClientIPs=make_set(ClientIP)
  by UserUPN, ParamName, ForwardingAddress=ParamValue
| extend ForwardingDomain = tostring(split(ForwardingAddress, "@")[1])
| extend IsExternalForward = isnotempty(ForwardingDomain)
    and not(orgDomains has tolower(ForwardingDomain))
    and ForwardingAddress !~ "False"
| where IsExternalForward == true
| extend AccountName      = tostring(split(UserUPN, "@")[0])
| extend AccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(UserUPN, "@")[1])
| project FirstSeen, LastSeen, UserUPN, AccountName, AccountUPNSuffix, ForwardingAddress,
          ForwardingDomain, ParamName, ActionTypes, ClientIPs
| order by FirstSeen desc

properties.description: keyvault-secret-retrieval-followed-by-storage-key-auth-pivot_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Key Vault secret read then Storage key-auth pivot
properties.query:
// Hunt execution window
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
let PivotWindow = 4h;
let SuccessActivity = dynamic(["succeeded", "success"]);
let KeyAuthTypes = dynamic(["accountkey", "sas"]);
// Stage A: Successful Key Vault secret retrieval activity
let KeyVaultSecretReads =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm=tolower(Caller), CallerIp=tostring(CallerIpAddress),
           Op=tolower(OperationNameValue),
           Status=tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)),
           SubStatus=tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
  | where Op has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/" and Op has "/secrets/"
  | where Op has_any ("/get", "/read", "read")
  | where Status in (SuccessActivity) or SubStatus has "ok"
  // Dedupe duplicate stages for a single logical retrieval action
  | extend ActionKey = iff(
      isnotempty(CorrelationId),
      strcat(CorrelationId, "|", CallerNorm, "|", Op, "|", tostring(ResourceId)),
      strcat(CallerNorm, "|", CallerIp, "|", tostring(SubscriptionId), "|", Op, "|", tostring(ResourceId), "|", tostring(bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)))
    )
  | summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by ActionKey
  | summarize FirstKvRead=min(TimeGenerated), LastKvRead=max(TimeGenerated),
              KvReadCount=count(), KvReadOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 20),
              KvSecretResources=make_set(ResourceId, 30)
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp;
// Stage B baseline: historically seen actor+source+storage+auth tuples
let StorageBaseline =
  CloudStorageAggregatedEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend IPAddress = coalesce(column_ifexists('IPAddress', ''), column_ifexists('IpAddress', ''))
  | where Timestamp between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | extend ActorNorm=tolower(tostring(coalesce(AccountUpn, AccountObjectId, AccountApplicationId))),
           IpNorm=tostring(IPAddress),
           AuthNorm=tolower(tostring(AuthenticationType)),
           StorageNorm=tolower(tostring(StorageAccount))
  | where isnotempty(ActorNorm) and isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(StorageNorm)
  | summarize by ActorNorm, IpNorm, AuthNorm, StorageNorm;
// Stage B current: key-auth storage operations in the hunt window
let StorageCurrent =
  CloudStorageAggregatedEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend IPAddress = coalesce(column_ifexists('IPAddress', ''), column_ifexists('IpAddress', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend ActorNorm=tolower(tostring(coalesce(AccountUpn, AccountObjectId, AccountApplicationId))),
           IpNorm=tostring(IPAddress),
           AuthNorm=tolower(tostring(AuthenticationType)),
           StorageNorm=tolower(tostring(StorageAccount))
  | where isnotempty(ActorNorm) and isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(StorageNorm)
  | where AuthNorm in (KeyAuthTypes)
  | project Timestamp, ActorNorm, IpNorm, AuthNorm, StorageNorm,
            StorageAccount, StorageContainer, ServiceType,
            OperationsCount, SuccessfulOperationsCount, SuccessfulReadOperations,
            OperationNamesList, UserAgentHeader;
// Keep only first-seen key-auth storage tuples to surface novel behavior
let StorageNovel =
  StorageCurrent
  | join kind=leftanti StorageBaseline on ActorNorm, IpNorm, AuthNorm, StorageNorm
  | summarize FirstStorage=min(Timestamp), LastStorage=max(Timestamp),
              StorageEvents=count(), StorageAccounts=dcount(StorageNorm),
              TotalOps=sum(toint(OperationsCount)),
              TotalSuccessfulReads=sum(toint(SuccessfulReadOperations)),
              AuthTypes=make_set(AuthNorm, 5),
              Services=make_set(ServiceType, 10),
              Containers=make_set(StorageContainer, 30),
              StorageOpsSamples=make_set(OperationNamesList, 10),
              StorageAgents=make_set(UserAgentHeader, 10)
    by ActorNorm, IpNorm;
// Stage correlation: Key Vault secret retrieval followed by key-auth storage pivot
KeyVaultSecretReads
| join kind=inner StorageNovel on $left.CallerNorm == $right.ActorNorm and $left.CallerIp == $right.IpNorm
| where FirstStorage between (FirstKvRead .. (LastKvRead + PivotWindow))
// Require meaningful storage activity to suppress low-volume noise
| where TotalOps >= 20 or TotalSuccessfulReads >= 10
| extend IdentityName = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[0]), CallerNorm),
         IdentityUPNSuffix = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[1]), "")
| project TimeGenerated=FirstKvRead,
          Identity=CallerNorm, IdentityName, IdentityUPNSuffix,
          SourceIp=CallerIp,
          FirstKvRead, LastKvRead, KvReadCount, KvReadOps, KvSecretResources,
          FirstStorage, LastStorage, StorageEvents, StorageAccounts,
          TotalOps, TotalSuccessfulReads, AuthTypes, Services, Containers,
          StorageOpsSamples, StorageAgents
| order by TotalOps desc, FirstStorage desc

properties.description: MultiMailboxAccessBySingleIP_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Multi-Mailbox Access by Single IP via Cloud App Permissions
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let distinctMailboxThreshold = 10;
let minMailAccessCount = 100;
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
| where ActionType == "MailItemsAccessed"
| extend AccessedMailbox = tostring(RawEventData.UserId)
| extend ClientIP        = tostring(RawEventData.ClientIP)
| extend UserAgent       = tostring(RawEventData.UserAgent)
| where isnotempty(AccessedMailbox) and isnotempty(ClientIP)
| summarize
    FirstAccess       = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAccess        = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalMailAccess   = count(),
    DistinctMailboxes = dcount(AccessedMailbox),
    MailboxList       = make_set(AccessedMailbox, 20),
    UserAgents        = make_set(UserAgent, 5)
  by ClientIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| where DistinctMailboxes >= distinctMailboxThreshold
      and TotalMailAccess >= minMailAccessCount
| extend AccessesPerMailbox = round(toreal(TotalMailAccess) / DistinctMailboxes, 1)
| extend IsApiAccess = array_length(UserAgents) == 0
    or (array_length(UserAgents) == 1 and UserAgents[0] == "")
| join kind=leftouter (
    ThreatIntelIndicators
    | where IsActive == true and IsDeleted == false
    | where ObservableKey == "ipv4-addr:value"
    | where isnotempty(ObservableValue)
    | summarize
        ThreatTags=make_set(Tags),
        TIConfidence=max(Confidence)
      by ObservableValue
) on $left.ClientIP == $right.ObservableValue
| extend IsThreatIP   = isnotnull(TIConfidence)
| extend ThreatTags   = iff(IsThreatIP, ThreatTags, dynamic([]))
| extend TIConfidence = iff(IsThreatIP, TIConfidence, 0)
| project FirstAccess, LastAccess, ClientIP,
          DistinctMailboxes, TotalMailAccess, AccessesPerMailbox,
          IsApiAccess, IsThreatIP, ThreatTags, TIConfidence,
          MailboxList, UserAgents
| order by IsThreatIP desc, IsApiAccess desc, DistinctMailboxes desc

Empty UserAgent combined with high mailbox count indicates programmatic API access consistent with app-based exfiltration.

properties.description: novel-identity-followed-by-keyvault-secret-burst_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Novel identity then Key Vault secret burst
properties.query:
// Hunt execution window provided by the hunting framework
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
let SequenceWindow = 4h;
let SuccessResults = dynamic(["0", "success"]);
let SuccessActivity = dynamic(["succeeded", "success"]);
// Build a unified sign-in stream (interactive, non-interactive, and SP sign-ins).
let SuccessfulSignins =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. EndTime)
    | project TimeGenerated, Identity=tostring(coalesce(UserPrincipalName, Identity)), Ip=tostring(IPAddress),
              App=tostring(AppDisplayName), Ua=tostring(UserAgent), Result=tostring(ResultType)),
    (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. EndTime)
    | project TimeGenerated, Identity=tostring(coalesce(UserPrincipalName, Identity)), Ip=tostring(IPAddress),
              App=tostring(AppDisplayName), Ua=tostring(UserAgent), Result=tostring(ResultType)),
    (AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. EndTime)
    | project TimeGenerated, Identity=tostring(coalesce(ServicePrincipalId, ServicePrincipalName, Identity)), Ip=tostring(IPAddress),
              App=tostring(ResourceDisplayName), Ua=tostring(UserAgent), Result=tostring(ResultType))
  | extend ResultNorm = tolower(Result)
  | where ResultNorm in (SuccessResults)
  | where isnotempty(Identity) and isnotempty(Ip)
  | extend IdentityNorm=tolower(Identity), IpNorm=tolower(Ip), AppNorm=tolower(App), UaNorm=tolower(Ua);
// Baseline known identity-source-app-useragent tuples
let BaselineTuples =
  SuccessfulSignins
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | summarize by IdentityNorm, IpNorm, AppNorm, UaNorm;
// Keep only first-seen successful tuples in the hunt window
let NovelTuples =
  SuccessfulSignins
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | join kind=leftanti BaselineTuples on IdentityNorm, IpNorm, AppNorm, UaNorm
  | summarize FirstSignin=min(TimeGenerated), LastSignin=max(TimeGenerated)
    by IdentityNorm, IpNorm, AppNorm, UaNorm;
// Key Vault secret discovery and retrieval activity from Azure control-plane logs
let KeyVaultSecretBurst =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm=tolower(Caller), CallerIp=tolower(tostring(CallerIpAddress)),
           Op=tolower(OperationNameValue),
           Status=tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)),
           SubStatus=tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
  | where Op has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/"
  | where Op has "/secrets/" or Op has "secrets/"
  | where Op has_any ("/list", "/get", "/read", "list/action", "read")
  | where Status in (SuccessActivity) or SubStatus has "ok"
  // Dedupe duplicate AzureActivity stages into one logical action.
  | extend ActionKey = iff(
      isnotempty(CorrelationId),
      strcat(CorrelationId, "|", CallerNorm, "|", Op, "|", tostring(ResourceId)),
      strcat(CallerNorm, "|", CallerIp, "|", tostring(SubscriptionId), "|", Op, "|", tostring(ResourceId), "|", tostring(bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)))
    )
  | summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by ActionKey
  | summarize FirstKv=min(TimeGenerated), LastKv=max(TimeGenerated),
              KvOperationCount=count(), DistinctKvOps=dcount(Op),
              KvOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 25),
              TargetSecrets=make_set(ResourceId, 30),
              Subscriptions=dcount(SubscriptionId)
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp;
// Sequence novel sign-in context into a near-term Key Vault secret burst.
NovelTuples
| join kind=inner KeyVaultSecretBurst on $left.IdentityNorm == $right.CallerNorm and $left.IpNorm == $right.CallerIp
| where FirstKv between (FirstSignin .. (LastSignin + SequenceWindow))
| summarize FirstSignin=min(FirstSignin), LastSignin=max(LastSignin),
            NovelTupleCount=dcount(strcat(AppNorm, "|", UaNorm)),
            SeenApps=make_set(AppNorm, 10), SeenUas=make_set(UaNorm, 10),
            FirstKv=min(FirstKv), LastKv=max(LastKv),
            KvOperationCount=max(KvOperationCount), DistinctKvOps=max(DistinctKvOps),
            Subscriptions=max(Subscriptions),
            KvOps=any(KvOps), TargetSecrets=any(TargetSecrets)
  by IdentityNorm, IpNorm
| where KvOperationCount >= 5 and DistinctKvOps >= 2 and NovelTupleCount >= 1
| extend IdentityName = iff(IdentityNorm contains "@", tostring(split(IdentityNorm, "@")[0]), IdentityNorm),
         IdentityUPNSuffix = iff(IdentityNorm contains "@", tostring(split(IdentityNorm, "@")[1]), "")
| project TimeGenerated=FirstKv, Identity=IdentityNorm, SigninIp=IpNorm,
          IdentityName, IdentityUPNSuffix,
          FirstSignin, LastSignin, FirstKv, LastKv,
          NovelTupleCount, KvOperationCount, DistinctKvOps, Subscriptions,
          SeenApps, SeenUas, KvOps, TargetSecrets
| order by KvOperationCount desc, FirstKv desc

properties.description: partial-failures-then-read-concentration_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Partial failures followed by read concentration
properties.query:
// Execution window and phase split.
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let CampaignWindow = EndTime - StartTime;
let PhaseSplit = StartTime + (CampaignWindow / 2.0);
let KeyAuthTypes = dynamic(["accountkey", "sas"]);
let MinEarlyFailures = 5;
let MinLateReads = 12;
let MinLateResponseBytes = 5000000;
// Normalize raw activity for both phases.
let NormalizedStorage =
  CloudStorageAggregatedEvents
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend IPAddress = coalesce(column_ifexists('IPAddress', ''), column_ifexists('IpAddress', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend ActorNorm=tolower(tostring(coalesce(AccountUpn, AccountObjectId, AccountApplicationId))),
           IpNorm=tostring(IPAddress),
           AuthNorm=tolower(tostring(AuthenticationType)),
           StorageNorm=tolower(tostring(StorageAccount))
  | where isnotempty(ActorNorm) and isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(StorageNorm)
  | where AuthNorm in (KeyAuthTypes)
  | project Timestamp, ActorNorm, IpNorm, AuthNorm, StorageNorm,
            StorageAccount, StorageContainer, ServiceType, UserAgentHeader,
            OperationsCount, SuccessfulOperationsCount, FailedOperationsCount,
            SuccessfulReadOperations, DistinctGetOperations, TotalResponseLength;
// Early phase captures failed exploration attempts.
let EarlyPhase =
  NormalizedStorage
  | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. PhaseSplit)
  | summarize EarlyFirstSeen=min(Timestamp),
              EarlyOps=sum(tolong(coalesce(OperationsCount, 0))),
              EarlySuccess=sum(tolong(coalesce(SuccessfulOperationsCount, 0))),
              EarlyFailures=sum(tolong(coalesce(FailedOperationsCount, 0))),
              EarlyAccounts=dcount(StorageNorm),
              EarlyTargets=make_set(StorageAccount, 20)
    by ActorNorm, IpNorm;
// Late phase captures successful read concentration after adaptation.
let LatePhase =
  NormalizedStorage
  | where Timestamp between (PhaseSplit .. EndTime)
  | summarize LateFirstSeen=min(Timestamp),
              LateOps=sum(tolong(coalesce(OperationsCount, 0))),
              LateSuccess=sum(tolong(coalesce(SuccessfulOperationsCount, 0))),
              LateFailures=sum(tolong(coalesce(FailedOperationsCount, 0))),
              LateReads=sum(tolong(coalesce(SuccessfulReadOperations, 0))),
              LateDistinctGets=sum(tolong(coalesce(DistinctGetOperations, 0))),
              LateResponseBytes=sum(tolong(coalesce(TotalResponseLength, 0))),
              LateAccounts=dcount(StorageNorm),
              LateTargets=make_set(StorageAccount, 20),
              Containers=make_set(StorageContainer, 30),
              Services=make_set(ServiceType, 10),
              UserAgents=make_set(UserAgentHeader, 10)
    by ActorNorm, IpNorm;
// Require explicit attacker adaptation: failures first, read-heavy access later.
EarlyPhase
| join kind=inner LatePhase on ActorNorm, IpNorm
| where EarlyFailures >= MinEarlyFailures
| where LateReads >= MinLateReads
| where LateResponseBytes >= MinLateResponseBytes
| where LateSuccess > 0
| extend LateReadToFailureRatio = round(todouble(LateReads) / todouble(max_of(EarlyFailures, 1)), 3),
         IdentityName = iff(ActorNorm contains "@", tostring(split(ActorNorm, "@")[0]), ActorNorm),
         IdentityUPNSuffix = iff(ActorNorm contains "@", tostring(split(ActorNorm, "@")[1]), "")
| project TimeGenerated=LateFirstSeen,
          Identity=ActorNorm, IdentityName, IdentityUPNSuffix,
          SourceIp=IpNorm,
          EarlyFirstSeen, EarlyOps, EarlySuccess, EarlyFailures, EarlyAccounts, EarlyTargets,
          LateFirstSeen, LateOps, LateSuccess, LateFailures, LateReads, LateDistinctGets,
          LateResponseBytes, LateAccounts, LateTargets,
          LateReadToFailureRatio,
          Containers, Services, UserAgents
| order by LateReads desc, EarlyFailures desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Detects storage campaigns where early failures are followed by sustained successful read activity on reachable targets.

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 23

properties.displayName: Partial failures followed by read concentration

properties.description: StorageAccessFirstSeenExternalIP_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Azure Storage Access via AccountKey or SAS Token from First-Seen External IP
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let baselineDays = 7d;
let opsThreshold = 10;
let bytesThreshold = 10485760;
let riskyAuthTypes = dynamic(["AccountKey", "SAS", "DSas"]);
let knownBackupAgents = dynamic([
    "Microsoft BITS", "CVLT", "SQLBLOBACCESS",
    "WA-Storage", "AzureStorage/CopyEngine",
    "Veeam", "Komprise", "Nasuni", "Cohesity", "HYCU", "Panzura"]);
let knownIPs =
    StorageBlobLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between ((starttime - baselineDays) .. starttime)
    | where AuthenticationType in (riskyAuthTypes)
    | where StatusCode in ("200", "206")
    | where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
    | where not (CallerIpAddress startswith "10."
              or CallerIpAddress startswith "192.168."
              or (CallerIpAddress startswith "172."
                  and toint(split(CallerIpAddress, ".")[1]) between (16 .. 31))
              or CallerIpAddress startswith "169.254."
              or CallerIpAddress startswith "127.")
    | distinct CallerIpAddress, AccountName;
StorageBlobLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
| where AuthenticationType in (riskyAuthTypes)
| where OperationName in (
    "GetBlob", "ListBlobs",
    "ListContainersSegment", "ListBlobsHierarchySegment")
| where StatusCode in ("200", "206")
| where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
| where not (CallerIpAddress startswith "10."
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "192.168."
          or (CallerIpAddress startswith "172."
              and toint(split(CallerIpAddress, ".")[1]) between (16 .. 31))
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "169.254."
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "127.")
| where not (UserAgentHeader has_any (knownBackupAgents)
          or UserAgentHeader contains "rubrik")
| join kind=leftanti knownIPs on CallerIpAddress, AccountName
| summarize
    FirstSeen            = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen             = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalOperations      = count(),
    TotalBytesDownloaded = sum(tolong(ResponseBodySize)),
    DistinctBlobs        = dcount(Uri),
    AuthTypes            = make_set(AuthenticationType),
    UserAgents           = make_set(UserAgentHeader),
    StorageAccountResourceId = take_any(_ResourceId)
    by CallerIpAddress, AccountName
| where TotalOperations >= opsThreshold
    or TotalBytesDownloaded >= bytesThreshold
| extend TotalBytesGB = round(TotalBytesDownloaded / 1073741824.0, 2)
| project-reorder
    FirstSeen, LastSeen,
    CallerIpAddress, AccountName,
    TotalOperations, TotalBytesGB, DistinctBlobs,
    AuthTypes, UserAgents
| order by TotalBytesGB desc

properties.displayName: Azure Storage Bulk Download via AccountKey or SAS Token from External IP
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let opsThreshold = 100;
let bytesThreshold = 104857600;
let knownBackupAgents = dynamic([
    "Microsoft BITS", "CVLT", "SQLBLOBACCESS",
    "WA-Storage", "AzureStorage/CopyEngine",
    "Veeam", "Komprise", "Nasuni", "Cohesity", "HYCU", "Panzura"]);
let knownExfilTools = dynamic([
    "rclone", "s3cmd", "gsutil", "aws-cli",
    "MinIO", "wget", "curl", "aria2", "FileZilla"]);
let browserAgents = dynamic([
    "Mozilla", "Chrome", "Safari",
    "Firefox", "Edge", "Edg/"]);
StorageBlobLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
| where AuthenticationType in ("AccountKey", "SAS", "DSas")
| where OperationName in (
    "GetBlob", "ListBlobs",
    "ListContainersSegment", "ListBlobsHierarchySegment")
| where StatusCode in ("200", "206")
| where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
| where not (CallerIpAddress startswith "10."
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "192.168."
          or (CallerIpAddress startswith "172."
              and toint(split(CallerIpAddress, ".")[1]) between (16 .. 31))
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "169.254."
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "127.")
| where not (UserAgentHeader has_any (knownBackupAgents)
          or UserAgentHeader contains "rubrik")
| extend
    IsExfilTool    = UserAgentHeader has_any (knownExfilTools),
    IsBrowserAgent = UserAgentHeader has_any (browserAgents),
    IsEmptyAgent   = isempty(UserAgentHeader),
    IsAccountKey   = AuthenticationType == "AccountKey"
| summarize
    FirstSeen            = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen             = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalOperations      = count(),
    TotalBytesDownloaded = sum(tolong(ResponseBodySize)),
    DistinctContainers   = dcount(tostring(split(Uri, "/")[3])),
    DistinctBlobs        = dcount(Uri),
    AuthTypes            = make_set(AuthenticationType),
    StorageAccounts      = make_set(AccountName),
    UserAgents           = make_set(UserAgentHeader),
    IsExfilTool          = max(IsExfilTool),
    IsBrowserAgent       = max(IsBrowserAgent),
    IsEmptyAgent         = max(IsEmptyAgent),
    IsAccountKey         = max(IsAccountKey)
    by CallerIpAddress
| where TotalOperations >= opsThreshold
    or TotalBytesDownloaded >= bytesThreshold
| extend RiskScore =
      toint(IsAccountKey)
    + toint(IsExfilTool)
    + toint(IsBrowserAgent and TotalBytesDownloaded > 104857600)
    + toint(TotalBytesDownloaded > 1073741824)
| extend RiskFactors = set_difference(pack_array(
    iff(IsAccountKey, "AccountKey auth", ""),
    iff(IsExfilTool, "Known exfil tool", ""),
    iff(IsBrowserAgent and TotalBytesDownloaded > 104857600, "Browser + large DL", ""),
    iff(TotalBytesDownloaded > 1073741824, ">1GB downloaded", "")
  ), dynamic([""]))
| where RiskScore >= 1
| extend TotalBytesGB = round(TotalBytesDownloaded / 1073741824.0, 2)
| project-reorder
    FirstSeen, LastSeen, CallerIpAddress,
    RiskScore, RiskFactors,
    TotalOperations, TotalBytesGB,
    DistinctContainers, DistinctBlobs,
    AuthTypes, StorageAccounts, UserAgents
| order by RiskScore desc, TotalBytesGB desc
