properties.description: SuspiciousOAuthConsentSensitivePermissions_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Suspicious OAuth App Consent Granting Sensitive Permissions
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let sensitivePermissions = dynamic([
    "Mail.Read", "Mail.ReadWrite", "Mail.Read.All", "Mail.ReadWrite.All",
    "Mail.Send", "Mail.Send.Shared",
    "Files.Read.All", "Files.ReadWrite.All",
    "Sites.Read.All", "Sites.ReadWrite.All",
    "MailboxSettings.Read", "Contacts.Read",
    "User.Read.All", "Directory.Read.All"]);
let knownLegitApps = dynamic([
    "Microsoft Graph Command Line Tools",
    "Microsoft Graph PowerShell",
    "Microsoft Graph PowerShell (Preview)",
    "Graph Explorer",
    "Graph explorer (official site)",
    "Microsoft Services Backup",
    "Microsoft 365",
    "Phish Alert Button (US)",
    "Phish Alert Button (US) (N)",
    "PhishAlarm for Exchange (AP)",
    "Composio - Outlook",
    "Zapier Outlook",
    "ClickUp (Email Integration)",
    "monday.com",
    "Salesforce Inbox",
    "PnP PowerShell",
    "PnP Powershell"]);
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
| where OperationName in (
    "Consent to application",
    "Add delegated permission grant",
    "Add app role assignment to service principal")
| where Result =~ "success"
| extend ActorUPN       = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend ActorIPAddress = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress)
| mv-expand ModifiedProp = TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties
| extend PropName     = tostring(ModifiedProp.displayName)
| extend PropNewValue = trim('"', tostring(ModifiedProp.newValue))
| summarize
    ConsentTime=min(TimeGenerated),
    ActorUPN=any(ActorUPN),
    ActorIPAddress=any(ActorIPAddress),
    AppName=anyif(tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName), OperationName == "Consent to application"),
    SPNameFromProp=anyif(PropNewValue, PropName == "ServicePrincipal.DisplayName" and isnotempty(PropNewValue)),
    SPObjectId=anyif(PropNewValue, PropName == "ServicePrincipal.ObjectID"),
    SPAppId=anyif(PropNewValue, PropName == "ServicePrincipal.AppId"),
    GrantedScopes=anyif(PropNewValue, PropName == "DelegatedPermissionGrant.Scope"),
    GrantedAppRole=anyif(PropNewValue, PropName == "AppRole.Value"),
    ConsentOnBehalfOfAll=anyif(PropNewValue, PropName == "ConsentContext.OnBehalfOfAll"),
    OperationNames=make_set(OperationName)
  by CorrelationId
| extend AppName = coalesce(AppName, SPNameFromProp, SPObjectId)
| where AppName !in~ (knownLegitApps)
| extend AllPermissions = split(trim(" ", strcat(GrantedScopes, " ", GrantedAppRole)), " ")
| extend GrantedSensitivePerms = set_intersect(AllPermissions, sensitivePermissions)
| where array_length(GrantedSensitivePerms) > 0
| extend IsAdminConsent    = OperationNames has "Add app role assignment to service principal" or ConsentOnBehalfOfAll == "True"
| extend SensitivePermCount = array_length(GrantedSensitivePerms)
| summarize
    FirstConsentTime=min(ConsentTime),
    LastConsentTime=max(ConsentTime),
    ActorUPN=any(ActorUPN),
    ActorIPAddress=any(ActorIPAddress),
    AppName=any(AppName),
    SPAppId=any(SPAppId),
    GrantedScopes=any(GrantedScopes),
    GrantedSensitivePerms=any(GrantedSensitivePerms),
    SensitivePermCount=max(SensitivePermCount),
    IsAdminConsent=max(toint(IsAdminConsent)),
    ConsentCount=count()
  by SPObjectId
| extend IsAdminConsent    = tobool(IsAdminConsent)
| extend IsAppNameGuid     = AppName matches regex @"^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$"
| extend HasFullControl    = GrantedScopes has "FullControl"
| extend NoActorUPN        = isempty(ActorUPN)
| extend AccountName       = tostring(split(ActorUPN, "@")[0])
| extend AccountUPNSuffix  = tostring(split(ActorUPN, "@")[1])
| extend RiskScore = toint(IsAppNameGuid) + toint(HasFullControl) + toint(NoActorUPN) + toint(SensitivePermCount > 5)
| where SensitivePermCount >= 3 or RiskScore > 0
| project FirstConsentTime, LastConsentTime, AppName, SPAppId, SPObjectId, ActorUPN, ActorIPAddress,
          AccountName, AccountUPNSuffix,
          GrantedSensitivePerms, SensitivePermCount, IsAdminConsent, HasFullControl,
          IsAppNameGuid, NoActorUPN, ConsentCount, RiskScore
| order by RiskScore desc, SensitivePermCount desc

properties.description: CredentialStuffingSprayOnVPN3P_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Credential Stuffing or Password Spray on VPN or Firewall (3P Appliance)
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let failureThreshold = 10;
let stuffingWindowMinutes = 60;
let sprayUserThreshold = 5;
let ApplianceVendors = dynamic([
    "Fortinet", "Palo Alto Networks", "Ivanti", "Pulse Secure",
    "SonicWall", "Cisco", "Check Point", "Juniper", "F5"]);
let FailureActions = dynamic(["deny", "denied", "block", "blocked", "drop", "dropped",
    "reject", "rejected", "failure", "failed", "invalid", "lockout"]);
let SuccessActions = dynamic(["allow", "allowed", "accept", "accepted", "permit", "permitted",
    "success", "login", "authenticated"]);
let AuthEvents =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    | where Activity has_any ("auth", "login", "vpn", "ssl", "tunnel", "session", "access", "logon")
        or Message has_any ("auth", "login", "vpn", "tunnel", "password", "credential")
    | where isnotempty(SourceIP)
    | where SourceIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0", "")
    // Exclude IPsec / tunnel-lifecycle events (tunnel crypto, not credential auth)
    | where DeviceAction !in~ ("negotiate","install_sa","dpd","dpd_failure","esp_error",
        "tunnel-stats","phase2-up","phase2-down","tunnel-up","tunnel-down",
        "delete_phase1_sa","delete_ipsec_sa")
    | extend AuthResult = case(
        EventOutcome in~ ("failed", "failure"), "Failure",
        EventOutcome =~ "success", "Success",
        DeviceAction has_any (FailureActions)
            or Activity has_any ("fail", "denied", "invalid", "reject", "lockout"), "Failure",
        DeviceAction has_any (SuccessActions)
            or Activity has_any ("success", "login", "tunnel-up", "connected"), "Success",
        "Unknown")
    | where AuthResult in ("Failure", "Success")
    // Enrich SourceUserName when CEF suser field is empty
    | extend SourceUserName = coalesce(
        SourceUserName,
        DestinationUserName,
        extract(@'user="?([^\s"]+)"?', 1, AdditionalExtensions))
    | project
        EventTime     = TimeGenerated,
        AuthResult,
        SourceIP,
        SourceUserName,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        DeviceAction,
        Activity,
        Message,
        Computer;
// Pattern A: Credential Stuffing
let PatternA_Failures =
    AuthEvents
    | where AuthResult == "Failure"
    | where isnotempty(SourceUserName)
    | summarize
        FailureCount  = count(),
        FirstFailure  = min(EventTime),
        LastFailure   = max(EventTime),
        DeviceVendor  = take_any(DeviceVendor),
        DeviceProduct = take_any(DeviceProduct),
        Computer      = take_any(Computer)
      by SourceIP, SourceUserName;
let PatternA_Success =
    AuthEvents
    | where AuthResult == "Success"
    | where isnotempty(SourceUserName)
    | project SuccessTime = EventTime, SourceIP, SourceUserName, SuccessActivity = Activity;
let PatternA =
    PatternA_Failures
    | where FailureCount >= failureThreshold
    | join kind=inner PatternA_Success on SourceIP, SourceUserName
    | where SuccessTime > LastFailure
    | where datetime_diff('minute', SuccessTime, FirstFailure) <= stuffingWindowMinutes
    | project
        PatternType   = "A - Credential Stuffing",
        FirstSeen     = FirstFailure,
        LastFailure,
        SuccessTime,
        SourceIP,
        TargetUser    = SourceUserName,
        DistinctUsers = 1,
        FailureCount,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        Computer,
        SignalStrength = iff(FailureCount >= 50, "High", "Medium");
// Pattern B: Password Spray
let PatternB_Failures =
    AuthEvents
    | where AuthResult == "Failure"
    | where isnotempty(SourceUserName)
    | summarize
        DistinctUsers = dcount(tolower(SourceUserName)),
        FailureCount  = count(),
        FirstFailure  = min(EventTime),
        LastFailure   = max(EventTime),
        UserSample    = make_set(tolower(SourceUserName)),
        DeviceVendor  = take_any(DeviceVendor),
        DeviceProduct = take_any(DeviceProduct),
        Computer      = take_any(Computer)
      by SourceIP;
let PatternB_Success =
    AuthEvents
    | where AuthResult == "Success"
    | where isnotempty(SourceUserName)
    | project SuccessTime = EventTime, SourceIP, SuccessUser = SourceUserName;
let PatternB =
    PatternB_Failures
    | where DistinctUsers >= sprayUserThreshold
    | join kind=inner PatternB_Success on SourceIP
    | where SuccessTime > LastFailure
    | where datetime_diff('minute', SuccessTime, FirstFailure) <= stuffingWindowMinutes
    | where array_index_of(UserSample, tolower(SuccessUser)) != -1
    | project
        PatternType   = "B - Password Spray",
        FirstSeen     = FirstFailure,
        LastFailure,
        SuccessTime,
        SourceIP,
        TargetUser    = tostring(UserSample),
        DistinctUsers,
        FailureCount,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        Computer,
        SignalStrength = iff(DistinctUsers >= 20, "High", "Medium");
union PatternA, PatternB
| summarize
     FirstSuccessTime  = min(SuccessTime),
     LastSuccessTime   = max(SuccessTime),
     SuccessEventCount = count()
   by PatternType, FirstSeen, LastFailure, SourceIP, TargetUser, DistinctUsers,
      FailureCount, DeviceVendor, DeviceProduct, Computer, SignalStrength
| extend GapSeconds = datetime_diff('second', FirstSuccessTime, LastFailure)
| extend SignalStrength = case(
    PatternType == "A - Credential Stuffing"
        and FailureCount >= 50
        and GapSeconds <= 120,              "Critical - high failures + immediate success",
    PatternType == "B - Password Spray"
        and DistinctUsers >= 20
        and GapSeconds <= 120,              "Critical - wide spray + immediate success",
    GapSeconds <= 30,                       "High - immediate success after failures",
    PatternType == "A - Credential Stuffing"
        and FailureCount >= 50,             "High",
    PatternType == "B - Password Spray"
        and DistinctUsers >= 20,            "High",
    GapSeconds <= 120,                      "Medium - quick success after failures",
                                            "Medium")
| sort by FirstSuccessTime desc

properties.description: CVEExploitationOnNetworkAppliance3P_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Azure Network Configuration Tampered by Compromised Identity
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let NetworkConfigOps = dynamic([
    "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/azureFirewalls/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/azureFirewalls/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/ruleCollectionGroups/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/ruleCollectionGroups/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/frontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicies/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/frontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicies/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/routes/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/routes/delete",
    "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/write",
    "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/delete",
    "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write",
    "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete"
]);
let ApplianceIPs =
    DeviceInfo
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where IsInternetFacing == true
    | where DeviceCategory in~ ("Network device", "Unknown")
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
    | join kind=inner (
        DeviceNetworkInfo
        | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
        | mv-expand IP = parse_json(IPAddresses)
        | extend ApplianceIP = tostring(IP.IPAddress)
        | where isnotempty(ApplianceIP)
        | where ApplianceIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    ) on DeviceId
    | project ApplianceIP, ApplianceName = DeviceName, ApplianceOS = OSPlatform;
let UEBASignals =
    BehaviorAnalytics
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | summarize
        UEBAInvestigationPriority = max(InvestigationPriority),
        UEBAFirstTimeOp           = countif(tostring(ActivityInsights.FirstTimeUserUsedApp) == "True"),
        UEBAFirstTimeCountry      = countif(tostring(ActivityInsights.FirstTimeUserConnectedFromCountry) == "True")
      by UserPrincipalName;
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
| where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
| where OperationNameValue in~ (NetworkConfigOps)
| extend Auth = parse_json(Authorization_d)
| where not (
    OperationNameValue =~ "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete"
    and tostring(Auth.evidence.role) =~ "PIM Contributor"
)
| extend CallerType = case(
    tostring(Auth.evidence.principalType) =~ "ServicePrincipal", "ServicePrincipal",
    Caller contains "@",                                          "User",
    tostring(Auth.evidence.principalType) =~ "User",             "User",
    "Unknown")
| extend CallerUPN = iff(Caller contains "@", Caller, "")
| extend ResourceCategory = case(
    OperationNameValue contains "networkSecurityGroup",   "NSG",
    OperationNameValue contains "firewallPolicies"
        or OperationNameValue contains "azureFirewall",   "Firewall",
    OperationNameValue contains "WebApplicationFirewall", "WAF",
    OperationNameValue contains "virtualNetworkGateway",  "VPN Gateway",
    OperationNameValue contains "routeTable"
        or OperationNameValue contains "routes/",         "Route Table",
    OperationNameValue contains "subnets",                "Subnet",
    OperationNameValue contains "roleAssignments",        "Role Assignment",
    OperationNameValue)
| extend ChangeAction = iff(OperationNameValue endswith "/delete", "Delete", "Write")
| project
    EventTime        = TimeGenerated,
    ResourceCategory,
    ChangeAction,
    OperationName    = OperationNameValue,
    ResourceGroup,
    ResourceId       = _ResourceId,
    Caller,
    CallerType,
    CallerUPN,
    CallerIpAddress,
    SubscriptionId
| join kind=leftouter UEBASignals on $left.CallerUPN == $right.UserPrincipalName
| extend UEBAFlagged = isnotempty(UEBAInvestigationPriority) and UEBAInvestigationPriority > 0
| join kind=leftouter ApplianceIPs on $left.CallerIpAddress == $right.ApplianceIP
| extend FromApplianceIP = isnotempty(ApplianceName)
| project-away UserPrincipalName, ApplianceIP
| extend SignalStrength = case(
    FromApplianceIP,                                               "High - caller IP matches known appliance",
    CallerType == "ServicePrincipal" and ChangeAction == "Delete", "High - SPN deleting network control",
    CallerType == "ServicePrincipal",                              "Medium - SPN modifying network config",
    UEBAFlagged and ChangeAction == "Delete",                      "Medium - UEBA-flagged user deleting control",
    UEBAFlagged,                                                   "Medium - UEBA-flagged user",
    "Low - review for context")
| extend
    AccountNameOnly  = tostring(split(CallerUPN, "@")[0]),
    AccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(CallerUPN, "@")[1])
| sort by EventTime desc

properties.description: entra-app-credential-change-sp-signin-burst-chain_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Entra App credential change followed by service principal sign-in burst
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
// Entra operations that can indicate app/service principal credential manipulation.
let CredOps = dynamic([
  "Add service principal credentials",
  "Update application - Certificates and secrets management",
  "Update application",
  "Update service principal",
  "Certificates and secrets management"
]);
// Capture credential-related audit activity and normalize key actor/target fields.
let CredentialChanges =
  _Im_AuditEvent(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
  | where Operation has_any (CredOps)
    or EventType has_any (CredOps)
    or Object has_any (CredOps)
    or EventMessage has_any (CredOps)
  | extend InitiatorUPN = tostring(ActorUsername),
           InitiatorApp = tostring(ActingAppName),
           InitiatorIp = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           TargetId = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ObjectId, ActorUserId))),
           TargetDisplayName = tolower(tostring(Object)),
           TargetType = tostring(coalesce(ObjectType, OriginalObjectType))
  | where isnotempty(TargetId) or isnotempty(TargetDisplayName)
  | project ChangeTime = TimeGenerated,
            ActivityDisplayName = tostring(coalesce(Operation, EventType, EventMessage)),
            OperationName = tostring(coalesce(Operation, EventType)),
            Result = tostring(EventResult),
            InitiatorUPN, InitiatorApp, InitiatorIp, TargetId, TargetDisplayName, TargetType;
// Gather successful service principal sign-ins around the same interval.
let SPSignins =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
  | where EventResult =~ "Success"
  | extend ServicePrincipalId = tolower(tostring(coalesce(
             iff(tostring(ActorUserType) =~ "Service Principal", ActorUserId, ""),
             iff(tostring(TargetUserType) =~ "Service Principal", TargetUserId, "")
           ))),
           AppId = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ActingAppId, TargetAppId))),
           SigninPrincipalName = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername))),
           IPAddress = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           UserAgent = tostring(HttpUserAgent),
           ResourceDisplayName = tostring(TargetUsername)
  | where isnotempty(ServicePrincipalId) or isnotempty(AppId) or isnotempty(SigninPrincipalName)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, ServicePrincipalId, AppId, SigninPrincipalName, IPAddress, UserAgent, ResourceDisplayName;
// Correlate credential changes to near-term service principal sign-in activity.
CredentialChanges
| extend ChangeJoinCandidates = pack_array(TargetId, TargetDisplayName)
| mv-expand ChangeJoinKey = ChangeJoinCandidates
| extend ChangeJoinKey = tostring(ChangeJoinKey)
| where isnotempty(ChangeJoinKey)
| extend JoinKey = ChangeJoinKey
| join kind=inner (
    SPSignins
    | extend SigninJoinCandidates = pack_array(ServicePrincipalId, AppId, SigninPrincipalName)
    | mv-expand SigninJoinKey = SigninJoinCandidates
    | extend SigninJoinKey = tostring(SigninJoinKey)
    | where isnotempty(SigninJoinKey)
    | extend JoinKey = SigninJoinKey
  ) on JoinKey
| where SigninTime between (ChangeTime .. (ChangeTime + 24h))
// Aggregate burst characteristics to reduce single-event noise.
| summarize FirstSignin=min(SigninTime), LastSignin=max(SigninTime), SigninCount=count(),
            DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress), Ips=make_set(IPAddress, 15),
            UserAgents=make_set(UserAgent, 10), Resources=make_set(ResourceDisplayName, 10)
          by ChangeTime, ActivityDisplayName, OperationName, Result, InitiatorUPN, InitiatorApp,
             InitiatorIp, TargetId, TargetDisplayName, TargetType, AppId
// Keep only elevated-volume or distributed sign-in patterns.
| where SigninCount >= 5 or DistinctIPs >= 3
| extend TimeGenerated = ChangeTime
| order by TimeGenerated desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: This query hunts for Entra application or service principal credential changes that are followed by rapid sign-in activity for the affected principal.

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 30

properties.displayName: Entra App credential change followed by service principal sign-in burst

properties.description: k8s-first-seen-control-plane-writer_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Kubernetes first-seen control-plane writer
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = StartTime;
let SensitiveWriteOps = dynamic([
  "clusterrolebindings/create", "clusterrolebindings/patch", "clusterrolebindings/update",
  "rolebindings/create", "rolebindings/patch", "rolebindings/update",
  "daemonsets/create", "cronjobs/create",
  "deployments/create", "deployments/patch", "deployments/update",
  "statefulsets/create", "statefulsets/patch", "statefulsets/update"
]);
let BaselineCallers =
  AzureDiagnostics
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | where Category =~ "kube-audit"
  | where OperationName has_any (SensitiveWriteOps)
  | where isnotempty(Caller_s)
  | summarize by CallerNorm = tolower(Caller_s);
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
| where Category =~ "kube-audit"
| where OperationName has_any (SensitiveWriteOps)
| where isnotempty(Caller_s)
| extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller_s)
| join kind=leftanti BaselineCallers on CallerNorm
| project TimeGenerated, Caller = CallerNorm, OperationName, Resource, ResourceId, ResourceGroup, Category
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 31

properties.displayName: Kubernetes first-seen control-plane writer

properties.description: PostAuthConfigChangeOnAppliance3P_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Post-Auth Config Change on Network Appliance (3P)
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let FortinetConfigChanges =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where DeviceVendor =~ "Fortinet"
    | where DeviceProduct startswith "FortiGate"
    | where DeviceEventClassID in ("44547", "0100044547")
    | extend
        CfgAction = extract(@'^(Add|Edit|Delete|Rename)\s', 1, Message),
        CfgPath   = extract(@'^(?:Add|Edit|Delete|Rename)\s+(\S+)\s+', 1, Message),
        CfgObject = extract(@'^(?:Add|Edit|Delete|Rename)\s+\S+\s+(.*)', 1, Message)
    | extend AdminUser = coalesce(DestinationUserName, SourceUserName, extract(@'FTNTFGTuser=([^;]+)', 1, AdditionalExtensions))
    | where isnotempty(CfgPath)
    | extend ConfigCategory = case(
        CfgPath has_any ("firewall.policy", "firewall.address", "firewall.addrgrp",
                         "firewall.service", "firewall.schedule"),             "A - Firewall Policy",
        CfgPath has_any ("system.admin", "user.local", "user.group"),          "B - Local User/Admin",
        CfgPath has_any ("system.settings", "user.ldap", "user.radius",
                         "user.tacacs+", "user.saml", "system.autoupdate"),    "C - Auth/Identity Config",
        CfgPath has_any ("vpn.ipsec", "vpn.ssl", "router.static",
                         "router.policy", "router.bgp", "system.interface"),   "D - VPN/Routing/Interface",
        "Other Config")
    | extend SignalStrength = case(
        ConfigCategory == "B - Local User/Admin" and CfgAction == "Add",       "High - local user added",
        ConfigCategory == "B - Local User/Admin" and CfgAction == "Delete",    "High - local user deleted",
        ConfigCategory == "B - Local User/Admin" and CfgAction == "Edit",      "Medium - admin account modified",
        ConfigCategory == "C - Auth/Identity Config",                          "High - auth method changed",
        ConfigCategory == "D - VPN/Routing/Interface",                         "Medium - VPN/routing changed",
        ConfigCategory == "A - Firewall Policy",                               "Medium - firewall policy modified",
        "Low - other config change")
    | project
        EventTime      = TimeGenerated,
        Vendor         = DeviceVendor,
        Appliance      = Computer,
        SourceIP,
        AdminUser,
        ConfigCategory,
        CfgPath,
        CfgAction,
        CfgObject,
        SignalStrength,
        RawMessage     = Message;
let PANConfigChanges =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where DeviceVendor =~ "Palo Alto Networks"
    | where DeviceEventClassID =~ "CONFIG"
    | where isempty(Reason) or Reason !in ("Failed", "Unauthorized")
    | where Message !has "dhcp"
    | extend
        CfgPath = coalesce(
            extract(@"path: ([^\s,]+)", 1, Message),
            extract(@"config\s+([\w][\w\s/-]*\w)", 1, Message))
    | extend
        CfgAction = coalesce(
            DeviceAction,
            extract(@"\b(add|set|edit|delete|rename|clone|move|commit)\b", 1, tolower(Message)))
    | extend
        AdminUser = coalesce(DestinationUserName, SourceUserName, DeviceCustomString1)
    | extend ConfigCategory = case(
        Message has_any ("security", "nat", "pbf", "decryption",
                         "address", "address-group", "service"),               "A - Firewall Policy",
        Message has_any ("admin", "user", "role", "administrator"),            "B - Local User/Admin",
        Message has_any ("authentication-profile", "server-profile",
                         "mfa-config", "radius", "ldap", "kerberos", "saml"), "C - Auth/Identity Config",
        Message has_any ("ipsec-tunnel", "ike-gateway", "gp-gateway",
                         "gp-portal", "virtual-router", "static-route",
                         "bgp", "ospf", "interface"),                          "D - VPN/Routing/Interface",
        "Other Config")
    | extend SignalStrength = case(
        ConfigCategory == "B - Local User/Admin",                              "High - admin user configured",
        ConfigCategory == "C - Auth/Identity Config",                          "High - auth method changed",
        ConfigCategory == "D - VPN/Routing/Interface",                         "Medium - VPN/routing changed",
        ConfigCategory == "A - Firewall Policy",                               "Medium - firewall policy modified",
        "Low - other config change")
    | project
        EventTime      = TimeGenerated,
        Vendor         = DeviceVendor,
        Appliance      = Computer,
        SourceIP,
        AdminUser,
        ConfigCategory,
        CfgPath,
        CfgAction,
        CfgObject      = "",
        SignalStrength,
        RawMessage     = Message;
let CiscoConfigChanges =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where DeviceVendor =~ "Cisco"
    | where DeviceProduct has_any ("ASA", "FTD", "Firepower")
    | where DeviceEventClassID has_any ("111007", "111008", "111010")
    | extend SyslogText = coalesce(Activity, Message)
    | extend
        AdminUser = coalesce(
            extract(@"User '([^']+)'", 1, SyslogText),
            trim("'", SourceUserName)),
        CfgCommand = coalesce(
            extract(@"executed (?:the )?'([^']+)'", 1, SyslogText),
            extract(@'command="([^"]+)"', 1, DeviceCustomString1),
            extract(@'cmd="([^"]+)"',     1, DeviceCustomString1))
    | where isnotempty(CfgCommand)
    | where CfgCommand !in~ ("enable", "who", "exit", "logout")
        and CfgCommand !startswith "show "
        and CfgCommand !startswith "debug "
        and CfgCommand !startswith "terminal "
        and CfgCommand !startswith "enable "
        and CfgCommand !startswith "more "
        and CfgCommand !startswith "dir "
        and CfgCommand !startswith "pager "
        and CfgCommand !startswith "write terminal"
        and CfgCommand !startswith "changeto context"
        and CfgCommand !startswith "packet-tracer "
        and CfgCommand !startswith "failover exec mate show "
        and CfgCommand !startswith "copy /noconfirm system:running-config disk0"
        and CfgCommand !has "#ACSACL#"
    | extend ConfigCategory = case(
        CfgCommand has_any ("access-list", "access-group", "nat ", "route "),  "A - Firewall Policy",
        CfgCommand has_any ("username", "aaa "),                                "B - Local User/Admin",
        CfgCommand has_any ("crypto", "ikev2", "ssl", "radius", "ldap",
                            "strong-encryption"),                               "C - Auth/Identity Config",
        CfgCommand has_any ("vpn-tunnel", "tunnel-group", "interface "),       "D - VPN/Routing/Interface",
        "Other Config")
    | extend SignalStrength = case(
        ConfigCategory == "B - Local User/Admin",                              "High - local user configured",
        ConfigCategory == "C - Auth/Identity Config",                          "High - auth method changed",
        ConfigCategory == "A - Firewall Policy"
            and CfgCommand has_any ("permit any", "allow all"),                "Critical - permit-all policy",
        ConfigCategory == "A - Firewall Policy",                               "Medium - firewall policy modified",
        ConfigCategory == "D - VPN/Routing/Interface",                         "Medium - VPN/routing changed",
        DeviceEventClassID == "111010"
            and CfgCommand !in~ ("configure terminal", "configure term"),      "High - config change committed",
        CfgCommand has_any ("shun", "write memory", "policy-map"),             "High - security-relevant command",
        "Medium - config command executed")
    | project
        EventTime      = TimeGenerated,
        Vendor         = DeviceVendor,
        Appliance      = Computer,
        SourceIP,
        AdminUser,
        ConfigCategory,
        CfgPath        = CfgCommand,
        CfgAction      = DeviceEventClassID,
        CfgObject      = "",
        SignalStrength,
        RawMessage     = SyslogText;
union FortinetConfigChanges, PANConfigChanges, CiscoConfigChanges
| where ConfigCategory != "Other Config"
| extend SortPriority = case(
    SignalStrength startswith "Critical", 1,
    SignalStrength startswith "High",     2,
    SignalStrength startswith "Medium",   3,
    4)
| sort by SortPriority asc, EventTime desc
| project-away SortPriority

properties.displayName: Post-Auth Config Change on Network Appliance (3P)

properties.description: rare-sp-signin-followed-by-rbac-write_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Rare service principal sign-in followed by RBAC write
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = StartTime;
// Baseline successful service principal sign-in tuples over the prior 14 days.
let BaselineSP =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=BaselineStart, endtime=BaselineEnd)
  | where EventResult =~ "Success"
  | extend ServicePrincipalId = tolower(tostring(coalesce(
             iff(tostring(ActorUserType) =~ "Service Principal", ActorUserId, ""),
             iff(tostring(TargetUserType) =~ "Service Principal", TargetUserId, "")
           ))),
           AppId = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ActingAppId, TargetAppId))),
           IPAddress = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           UserAgent = tostring(HttpUserAgent)
  | where isnotempty(ServicePrincipalId)
  | summarize by ServicePrincipalId, AppId, IPAddress, UserAgent;
// Current-window successful sign-ins for service principals.
let RareSP =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
  | where EventResult =~ "Success"
  | extend ServicePrincipalId = tolower(tostring(coalesce(
             iff(tostring(ActorUserType) =~ "Service Principal", ActorUserId, ""),
             iff(tostring(TargetUserType) =~ "Service Principal", TargetUserId, "")
           ))),
           AppId = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ActingAppId, TargetAppId))),
           Identity = tostring(ActorUsername),
           IPAddress = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           UserAgent = tostring(HttpUserAgent),
           ResourceDisplayName = tostring(TargetUsername)
  | where isnotempty(ServicePrincipalId)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, ServicePrincipalId, AppId, Identity, IPAddress, UserAgent, ResourceDisplayName
  // Keep only patterns not seen in baseline (rare/new tuple behavior).
  | join kind=leftanti BaselineSP on ServicePrincipalId, AppId, IPAddress, UserAgent;
// Collect successful RBAC write operations in the hunt window.
let RBACWrites =
  _Im_AuditEvent(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
  | where EventResult =~ "Success"
  | where Operation has "roleAssignments/write"
    or EventType has "roleAssignments/write"
    or ObjectType has "roleassignment"
  | extend CallerNormalized = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ActorUserId, ActorUsername)))
  | project WriteTime = TimeGenerated,
            CallerNormalized,
            Caller = tostring(coalesce(ActorUserId, ActorUsername)),
            CallerIpAddress = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
            OperationNameValue = tostring(coalesce(Operation, EventType)),
            ResourceId = tostring(coalesce(ObjectId, Object)),
            SubscriptionId = tostring(coalesce(DvcScopeId, DvcScope));
// Expand potential join keys (SP object id, app id, identity) for resilient correlation.
RareSP
| extend JoinCandidates = pack_array(tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)), tolower(tostring(AppId)), tolower(tostring(Identity)))
| mv-expand JoinKey = JoinCandidates
| extend JoinKey = tostring(JoinKey)
| where isnotempty(JoinKey)
// Join rare SP sign-ins to RBAC writes shortly afterward.
| join kind=inner RBACWrites on $left.JoinKey == $right.CallerNormalized
| where WriteTime between (SigninTime .. (SigninTime + 60m))
// Summarize scope and volume of potential privilege escalation.
| summarize FirstSignin=min(SigninTime), LastWrite=max(WriteTime), WriteCount=count(),
            ResourcesTouched=dcount(ResourceId), ResourceSample=make_set(ResourceId, 10),
            SigninIps=make_set(IPAddress, 10), CallerIps=make_set(CallerIpAddress, 10)
          by ServicePrincipalId, AppId, Identity, UserAgent, ResourceDisplayName, SubscriptionId
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstSignin
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 33

properties.displayName: Rare service principal sign-in followed by RBAC write

properties.description: RiskyVPNSignIn_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Risky Successful Sign-in to VPN or Network Access Application
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let correlationWindowMinutes = 60; // risk event must occur within this window of the sign-in
let vpnAppKeywords = dynamic(["GlobalProtect", "Palo Alto Networks", "Fortinet",
    "Cisco AnyConnect", "Cisco Secure Client", "Zscaler", "Pulse Secure",
    "Ivanti Connect Secure", "Ivanti Secure Access", "Ivanti VPN", "F5", "NetScaler", "Citrix Gateway",
    "Barracuda VPN", "SonicWall"]);
let highValueRiskTypes = dynamic([
    "leakedCredentials",
    "investigationsThreatIntelligence",
    "mcasImpossibleTravel",
    "unlikelyTravel",
    "anonymizedIPAddress",
    "maliciousIPAddress",
    "unfamiliarFeatures"]);
// Successful VPN logins
let VPNLogins =
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | where AppDisplayName has_any (vpnAppKeywords)
    | project
        SignInTime        = TimeGenerated,
        UserPrincipalName,
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
        Country           = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion),
        City              = tostring(LocationDetails.city),
        ConditionalAccessStatus;
// Risk detection events for same period
// RiskState filter: exclude already-remediated/dismissed events to avoid FPs
let RiskEvents =
    AADUserRiskEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where RiskLevel in ("high", "medium")
    | where RiskEventType in (highValueRiskTypes)
    | where RiskState in ("atRisk", "confirmedCompromised")  // exclude remediated/dismissed/confirmedSafe
    | project
        RiskTime          = coalesce(ActivityDateTime, TimeGenerated),
        UserPrincipalName,
        RiskEventType,
        RiskLevel,
        RiskDetail,
        RiskState;
// Join: VPN login correlated with a risk event for same user within riskWindow
VPNLogins
| join kind=inner RiskEvents on UserPrincipalName
| where abs(datetime_diff('minute', SignInTime, RiskTime)) <= correlationWindowMinutes
| summarize arg_min(RiskTime, *) by UserPrincipalName, SignInTime, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
| project
    HuntTime              = SignInTime,
    UserPrincipalName,
    IPAddress,
    AppDisplayName,
    Country,
    City,
    RiskEventType,
    RiskLevel,
    RiskDetail,
    RiskState,
    RiskTime,
    ConditionalAccessStatus
| extend AccountName      = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[0])
| extend AccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[1])
| sort by HuntTime desc

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 34

properties.displayName: Risky Successful Sign-in to VPN or Network Access Application

properties.description: TIMatchedIPOnNetworkAppliance_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Threat Intelligence Matched IP on Network Appliance Traffic
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
// Active, non-expired TI indicators - IP type, medium+ confidence
let TIIPs =
    ThreatIntelIndicators
    | where IsActive == true
    | where IsDeleted == false 
    | where ValidUntil > now()
    // Include medium+ confidence OR feeds that don't set confidence (null/0)
    | where Confidence >= 50 or isnull(Confidence) or Confidence == 0
    | where ObservableKey in ("ipv4-addr:value", "network-traffic:src_ref.value", "network-traffic:dst_ref.value")
    | where isnotempty(ObservableValue)
    | summarize
        MaxConfidence = max(Confidence),
        Tags          = take_any(Tags)
      by TI_IP = ObservableValue;
let ApplianceVendors = dynamic([
    "Fortinet", "Palo Alto Networks", "Ivanti", "Pulse Secure",
    "SonicWall", "Cisco", "Check Point", "Juniper", "F5", "Citrix"]);
// Direction 1: Inbound - attacker-controlled IP connecting to/through appliance
let InboundTIHits =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    | where isnotempty(SourceIP)
    | where SourceIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    | join kind=inner TIIPs on $left.SourceIP == $right.TI_IP
    | project
        EventTime           = TimeGenerated,
        Direction           = "Inbound - attacker to appliance",
        TI_IP               = SourceIP,
        CounterpartIP       = DestinationIP,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        Activity,
        DeviceAction,
        SourceUserName,
        DestinationUserName,
        SourcePort,
        DestinationPort,
        ApplicationProtocol,
        Message,
        Computer,
        MaxConfidence,
        Tags;
// Direction 2: Outbound - appliance beaconing to TI-matched C2 destination
let OutboundTIHits =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    | where isnotempty(DestinationIP)
    | where DestinationIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    | join kind=inner TIIPs on $left.DestinationIP == $right.TI_IP
    | project
        EventTime           = TimeGenerated,
        Direction           = "Outbound - appliance to C2",
        TI_IP               = DestinationIP,
        CounterpartIP       = SourceIP,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        Activity,
        DeviceAction,
        SourceUserName,
        DestinationUserName,
        SourcePort,
        DestinationPort,
        ApplicationProtocol,
        Message,
        Computer,
        MaxConfidence,
        Tags;
// Combine both directions
union InboundTIHits, OutboundTIHits
| extend SignalStrength = case(
    Direction startswith "Outbound" and MaxConfidence >= 75, "High - appliance C2 callback, high-confidence TI",
    Direction startswith "Inbound"  and MaxConfidence >= 75, "High - known attacker IP on appliance, high-confidence TI",
    MaxConfidence >= 50,                                     "Medium - TI match, medium confidence",
    "Low - review TI source quality")
| sort by MaxConfidence desc, EventTime desc

Hunts for CommonSecurityLog events from 3P network appliances (Fortinet, Palo Alto, Ivanti,
SonicWall, Cisco, Check Point) where the source or destination IP matches an active threat
intelligence indicator - covering both inbound attacker access and outbound C2 callbacks
from a compromised device.

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 35

properties.displayName: Threat Intelligence Matched IP on Network Appliance Traffic

properties.description: VPNCredentialStuffingAndSpray_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: VPN Credential Stuffing and Password Spray
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let failureThreshold = 10;
let sprayUserThreshold = 5;
let stuffingWindowMinutes = 60;
let vpnAppKeywords = dynamic([
    "GlobalProtect", "Palo Alto Networks", "Fortinet",
    "Cisco AnyConnect", "Cisco Secure Client", "Zscaler", "Pulse Secure",
    "Ivanti Connect Secure", "Ivanti Secure Access", "Ivanti VPN", "F5", "NetScaler", "Citrix Gateway",
    "Barracuda VPN", "SonicWall"]);
// Failure codes that indicate wrong-password attempts (credential stuffing indicators)
// 50053=AccountLocked, 50126=InvalidPassword, 50056=InvalidPassword(variant),
// 50064=CredentialValidationFailure, 70000=InvalidGrant
let failureCodes = dynamic([50053, 50126, 50056, 50064, 70000]);
let Failures =
    union SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where ResultType in (failureCodes)
    | where AppDisplayName has_any (vpnAppKeywords)
    | where IPAddress !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    | project FailTime = TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName;
let Successes =
    union
     (SigninLogs                       | extend LocationDetails = todynamic(LocationDetails)),
     (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs  | extend LocationDetails = todynamic(LocationDetails))
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | where AppDisplayName has_any (vpnAppKeywords)
    | project
        SuccessTime           = TimeGenerated,
        UserPrincipalName,
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn = column_ifexists('RiskLevelDuringSignIn', ''),
        RiskLevelAggregated   = column_ifexists('RiskLevelAggregated', ''),
        Country               = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion),
        City                  = tostring(LocationDetails.city);
// Pattern A: Credential Stuffing - many failures on same user from same IP, then success
let PatternA =
    Failures
    | summarize
        FailureCount = count(),
        FirstFailure = min(FailTime),
        LastFailure  = max(FailTime)
      by UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | where FailureCount >= failureThreshold
    | join kind=inner Successes on UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | where SuccessTime > LastFailure
    | where datetime_diff('minute', SuccessTime, FirstFailure) <= stuffingWindowMinutes
    | project
        PatternType           = "A - Credential Stuffing",
        HuntTime              = SuccessTime,
        UserPrincipalName,
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
        Country,
        City,
        FailureCount,
        DistinctUsers         = 1,
        FirstFailure,
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn,
        RiskLevelAggregated,
        SignalStrength        = iff(FailureCount >= 50, "High", "Medium");
// Pattern B: Password Spray - same IP targets many distinct users, at least one success
let PatternB_Failures =
    Failures
    | summarize
        DistinctUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
        FailureCount  = count(),
        FirstFailure  = min(FailTime),
        LastFailure   = max(FailTime),
        UserSample    = make_set(UserPrincipalName)
      by IPAddress, AppDisplayName;
let PatternB =
    PatternB_Failures
    | where DistinctUsers >= sprayUserThreshold
    | join kind=inner Successes on IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | where SuccessTime > LastFailure
    | where datetime_diff('minute', SuccessTime, FirstFailure) <= stuffingWindowMinutes
    // Success user must be one of the sprayed accounts - avoids FP from unrelated logins on shared IPs
    | where array_index_of(UserSample, UserPrincipalName) != -1
    | project
        PatternType           = "B - Password Spray",
        HuntTime              = SuccessTime,
        UserPrincipalName,
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
        Country,
        City,
        FailureCount,
        DistinctUsers,
        FirstFailure,
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn,
        RiskLevelAggregated,
        SignalStrength        = iff(DistinctUsers >= 20, "High", "Medium");
union PatternA, PatternB
| extend TimeDeltaMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', HuntTime, FirstFailure)
| extend AccountName      = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[0])
| extend AccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[1])
| sort by HuntTime desc

properties.description: aad-connect-host-remote-admin-followed-by-entra-privilege-operation_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: AAD Connect host remote admin followed by Entra privilege operation
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
// Process and operation lists used to detect sync-host admin and privileged cloud ops.
let SyncProcesses = dynamic(["miiserver.exe", "azureadconnectwizard.exe", "azureadconnect.exe", "directorysyncclientcmd.exe", "aadconnectprovisioningagent.exe", "azureadconnecthealthsyncmonitor.exe"]);
let RemoteParents = dynamic(["wmiprvse.exe", "wsmprovhost.exe", "psexesvc.exe", "winrs.exe"]);
let PrivilegedOps = dynamic(["Add member to role", "Add app role assignment to service principal", "Add service principal credentials", "Update application", "Update service principal", "Certificates and secrets management", "Add owner", "Add member to group", "Consent to application"]);
// Build latest hybrid identity keys for correlation.
let HybridUsersRaw =
  IdentityInfo
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AccountUpn = coalesce(column_ifexists('AccountUpn', ''), column_ifexists('AccountUPN', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | where column_ifexists('IdentityEnvironment', '') =~ "Hybrid" or (isnotempty(column_ifexists('AccountSID', '')) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId))
  | project Timestamp, AccountObjectId, AccountUpn, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius
  | summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUpn),
           SamKey = tolower(strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName));
// Normalize key variants into one join key.
let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = AccountUpn, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = AccountUpn, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius);
// Identify likely Entra Connect/sync hosts from process telemetry.
let SyncHosts =
  _Im_ProcessEvent(starttime=BaselineStart, endtime=BaselineEnd)
  | where EventType =~ "ProcessCreated"
  | extend ProcessName = tolower(coalesce(TargetProcessFilename, TargetProcessFileOriginalName)),
           ParentProcess = tolower(coalesce(ActingProcessFilename, ActingProcessFileOriginalName)),
           DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname))
  | where ProcessName in~ (SyncProcesses) or ParentProcess in~ (SyncProcesses)
  | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, DvcHostname) by DeviceJoinKey
  | project DeviceJoinKey, SyncHostName = DvcHostname;
// Collect remote administration activity (RDP and remote execution).
let RemoteAdmin =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (
      _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
      | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
      | where EventSubType =~ "RemoteInteractive"
      | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
               DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(TargetDvcId, DvcId, TargetFQDN, DvcHostname)),
               SourceIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
               ActivityType = "RDP"
      | where isnotempty(UserKey) and isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
      | project ActivityTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP, ActivityType, Evidence = tostring(coalesce(EventSubType, LogonMethod, LogonProtocol))
    ),
    (
      _Im_ProcessEvent(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
      | where EventType =~ "ProcessCreated"
      | extend ParentProcess = tolower(coalesce(ActingProcessFilename, ActingProcessFileOriginalName, ActingProcessName)),
               ParentOriginal = tolower(ActingProcessFileOriginalName),
               ChildCommandLine = tostring(TargetProcessCommandLine),
               UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
               DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
               SourceIP = tostring(DvcIpAddr),
               ActivityType = "RemoteExec"
      | where ParentProcess in~ (RemoteParents) or ParentOriginal in~ (RemoteParents)
      | where isnotempty(UserKey) and isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey) 
      | project ActivityTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP, ActivityType, Evidence = ChildCommandLine
    );
// Gather high-risk Entra audit activity performed by identities.
let EntraPrivOps =
  _Im_AuditEvent(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
  | extend ActorKey = tolower(ActorUsername),
           ActorIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           OperationText = strcat(tostring(EventType), " ", tostring(EventMessage), " ", tostring(TargetAppName))
  | where isnotempty(ActorKey)
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where OperationText has_any (PrivilegedOps)
  | project AuditTime = TimeGenerated, ActorKey, ActorIP, OperationText;
// Correlate sync-host remote admin to near-term privileged Entra operations.
RemoteAdmin
| join kind=inner SyncHosts on DeviceJoinKey
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on UserKey
| join kind=inner EntraPrivOps on $left.UserKey == $right.ActorKey
| where AuditTime between (ActivityTime .. (ActivityTime + 4h))
| summarize FirstPrivilegedOp = min(AuditTime),
            LastPrivilegedOp = max(AuditTime),
            PrivilegedOpCount = count(),
            ActorIPs = make_set(ActorIP, 10),
            Operations = make_set(OperationText, 15)
  by ActivityTime, SyncHostName, ActivityType, SourceIP,
    HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius, Evidence
  | extend Confidence = iff(BlastRadius =~ "high", "High", "Medium")
| extend TimeGenerated = ActivityTime
| order by TimeGenerated desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: This query hunts for remote administration of a likely AAD Connect or sync host that is followed by privileged Entra audit activity by the same hybrid identity.

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 38

properties.displayName: AAD Connect host remote admin followed by Entra privilege operation

properties.description: entra-hybrid-user-signin-followed-by-onprem-lateral-movement_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Entra hybrid user sign-in followed by on-prem lateral movement
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
// Parent/child process lists used to identify remote execution behavior.
let RemoteParents = dynamic(["wmiprvse.exe", "wsmprovhost.exe", "psexesvc.exe", "winrs.exe"]);
let SuspiciousChildren = dynamic(["cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe", "net.exe", "net1.exe", "whoami.exe", "nltest.exe", "reg.exe", "certutil.exe", "rundll32.exe", "mshta.exe"]);
// Build latest hybrid identity keys to unify cloud and endpoint telemetry.
let HybridUsersRaw =
  IdentityInfo
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AccountUpn = coalesce(column_ifexists('AccountUpn', ''), column_ifexists('AccountUPN', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | where column_ifexists('IdentityEnvironment', '') =~ "Hybrid" or (isnotempty(column_ifexists('AccountSID', '')) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId))
  | project Timestamp, AccountObjectId, AccountUpn, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius
  | summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUpn),
           SamKey = tolower(strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName));
// Normalize user key variants into one joinable identity key.
let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = AccountUpn, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = AccountUpn, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius);
// Keep latest hybrid or Entra-joined devices as on-prem movement targets.
let HybridDevicesRaw =
  DeviceInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | project TimeGenerated, DeviceId, DeviceName, JoinType, IsAzureADJoined
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
  | where IsAzureADJoined == true or tostring(JoinType) has_any ("Hybrid", "Azure AD", "Entra")
  | project DeviceId, HybridDeviceName = DeviceName, JoinType;
let HybridDevices =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridDevicesRaw | where isnotempty(DeviceId) | project DeviceJoinKey = tolower(DeviceId), HybridDeviceName, JoinType),
    (HybridDevicesRaw | where isnotempty(HybridDeviceName) | project DeviceJoinKey = tolower(HybridDeviceName), HybridDeviceName, JoinType);
// Capture successful cloud sign-ins by hybrid identities.
let CloudUserSignins =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where EventProduct =~ "Microsoft Entra ID"
  | where LogonProtocol has_any ("OAuth", "OpenID", "SAML")
    or LogonMethod in~ ("Service Principal", "Managed Identity", "Username & Password", "Multi factor authentication", "Passwordless", "PKI")
  | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           CloudIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           AppName = tostring(TargetAppName),
           ClientApp = tostring(ActingAppName)
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserKey, CloudIP, AppName, ClientApp, CorrelationId = EventOriginalUid;
// Capture on-prem lateral movement candidates (RDP and remote execution).
let OnPremMovement =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (
      _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
      | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
      | where EventSubType =~ "RemoteInteractive"
      | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
               DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(TargetDvcId, DvcId, TargetFQDN, DvcHostname)),
               SourceIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
               Evidence = tostring(coalesce(EventSubType, LogonMethod, LogonProtocol)),
               MovementType = "RDP"
      | where isnotempty(UserKey)
      | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
      | project MovementTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP, MovementType, Evidence
    ),
    (
      _Im_ProcessEvent(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
      | where EventType =~ "ProcessCreated"
      | extend ChildProcess = tolower(coalesce(TargetProcessFilename, TargetProcessFileOriginalName)),
               ChildCommandLine = tostring(TargetProcessCommandLine)
      | extend ParentProcess = tolower(coalesce(ActingProcessFilename, ActingProcessFileOriginalName)),
               ParentOriginal = tolower(ActingProcessFileOriginalName),
               UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
               DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
               SourceIP = tostring(DvcIpAddr),
               Evidence = strcat(ChildProcess, " ", ChildCommandLine),
               MovementType = "RemoteExec"
      | where ParentProcess in~ (RemoteParents) or ParentOriginal in~ (RemoteParents)
      | where ChildProcess in~ (SuspiciousChildren)
          or ChildCommandLine has_any (" -enc ", " /node:", " -computername ", "invoke-command", "win32_process", "create ")
      | where isnotempty(UserKey)
      | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
      | project MovementTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP, MovementType, Evidence
    );
// Correlate cloud sign-in to near-term on-prem movement by the same identity.
CloudUserSignins
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on UserKey
| join kind=inner OnPremMovement on UserKey
| join kind=inner HybridDevices on DeviceJoinKey
| where MovementTime between (SigninTime .. (SigninTime + 4h))
| summarize FirstMovement = min(MovementTime),
            LastMovement = max(MovementTime),
            MovementCount = count(),
            Devices = make_set(HybridDeviceName, 10),
            SourceIPs = make_set(SourceIP, 10),
            EvidenceSet = make_set(Evidence, 15),
            Apps = make_set(AppName, 10),
            ClientApps = make_set(ClientApp, 10)
   by SigninTime, CloudIP, HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius,
     MovementType
  | extend Confidence = iff(BlastRadius =~ "high", "High", "Medium")
| extend TimeGenerated = SigninTime
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description: kerberoast-followed-by-cloud-signin_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Kerberoast burst followed by cloud sign-in
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
// Build latest hybrid identity keys for reliable cross-source correlation.
let HybridUsersRaw =
  IdentityInfo
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AccountUpn = coalesce(column_ifexists('AccountUpn', ''), column_ifexists('AccountUPN', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | where column_ifexists('IdentityEnvironment', '') =~ "Hybrid" or (isnotempty(column_ifexists('AccountSID', '')) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId))
  | project Timestamp, AccountObjectId, AccountUpn, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius
  | summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUpn),
           SamKey = tolower(strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName));
// Normalize multiple account key formats into one joinable user key.
let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = AccountUpn, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = AccountUpn, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId);
// Detect potential Kerberoast behavior as a burst of RC4-encrypted Kerberos service ticket requests (4769).
let KerberoastBurst =
  SecurityEvent
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where EventID == 4769
  // Extract TicketEncryptionType from EventData XML
  | extend TicketEncryptionType = tolower(tostring(extract(@'<Data Name="TicketEncryptionType">([^<]+)</Data>', 1, tostring(column_ifexists("EventData", "")))))
  | where TicketEncryptionType has_any ("0x17", "17")
  | extend Requestor = tolower(tostring(coalesce(Account, TargetUserName))),
           Service = tolower(tostring(ServiceName)),
           ClientIP = tostring(IpAddress)
  | where isnotempty(Requestor) and isnotempty(Service)
  | where Requestor !endswith "$" and Service !endswith "$"
  | summarize FirstKerberoast = min(TimeGenerated),
              LastKerberoast = max(TimeGenerated),
              DistinctServices = dcount(Service),
              KerberoastEvents = count(),
              ServiceSet = make_set(Service, 25),
              SourceIPs = make_set(ClientIP, 10)
    by Requestor
  | where DistinctServices >= 8;
// Collect successful cloud sign-ins for the same identities.
let CloudUserSignins =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where EventProduct =~ "Microsoft Entra ID"
  | where LogonProtocol has_any ("OAuth", "OpenID", "SAML")
    or LogonMethod in~ ("Service Principal", "Managed Identity", "Username & Password", "Multi factor authentication", "Passwordless", "PKI")
  | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           CloudIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           AppName = tostring(TargetAppName),
           ClientApp = tostring(ActingAppName)
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserKey, CloudIP, AppName, ClientApp, CorrelationId = EventOriginalUid;
// Correlate on-prem Kerberoast burst to near-term cloud sign-in activity.
KerberoastBurst
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on $left.Requestor == $right.UserKey
| join kind=inner CloudUserSignins on UserKey
| where SigninTime between (LastKerberoast .. (LastKerberoast + 6h))
| summarize FirstCloudSignin = min(SigninTime),
            LastCloudSignin = max(SigninTime),
            CloudSigninCount = count(),
            DistinctCloudIPs = dcount(CloudIP),
            CloudIPs = make_set(CloudIP, 15),
            Apps = make_set(AppName, 10),
            ClientApps = make_set(ClientApp, 10),
            CorrelationIds = make_set(CorrelationId, 10),
            ServiceSet = any(ServiceSet),
            SourceIP = any(SourceIPs)
  by FirstKerberoast, LastKerberoast, KerberoastEvents, DistinctServices,
    HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius, AccountObjectId
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstKerberoast
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description: rdp-to-hybrid-device-followed-by-entra-access_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: RDP to hybrid joined device followed by Entra access
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
// Build latest hybrid identity keys for cross-platform joins.
let HybridUsersRaw =
  IdentityInfo
  | extend Timestamp = column_ifexists('Timestamp', TimeGenerated)
  | extend AccountUpn = coalesce(column_ifexists('AccountUpn', ''), column_ifexists('AccountUPN', ''))
  | where Timestamp between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | where column_ifexists('IdentityEnvironment', '') =~ "Hybrid" or (isnotempty(column_ifexists('AccountSID', '')) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId))
  | project Timestamp, AccountObjectId, AccountUpn, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius
  | summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUpn),
           SamKey = tolower(strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName));
// Normalize identity keys to one join key.
let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = AccountUpn, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = AccountUpn, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius);
// Keep latest hybrid or Entra-joined devices likely to bridge cloud and on-prem.
let HybridDevicesRaw =
  DeviceInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | project TimeGenerated, DeviceId, DeviceName, JoinType, AadDeviceId, IsAzureADJoined
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
  | where IsAzureADJoined == true or tostring(JoinType) has_any ("Hybrid", "Azure AD", "Entra")
  | project DeviceId, HybridDeviceName = DeviceName, JoinType, AadDeviceId, IsAzureADJoined;
let HybridDevices =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridDevicesRaw | where isnotempty(DeviceId) | project DeviceJoinKey = tolower(DeviceId), HybridDeviceName, JoinType, AadDeviceId, IsAzureADJoined),
    (HybridDevicesRaw | where isnotempty(HybridDeviceName) | project DeviceJoinKey = tolower(HybridDeviceName), HybridDeviceName, JoinType, AadDeviceId, IsAzureADJoined);
// Identify successful RDP logons by candidate hybrid identities.
let RdpSessions =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where EventSubType =~ "RemoteInteractive"
  | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(TargetDvcId, DvcId, TargetFQDN, DvcHostname)),
           SourceIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           InitiatorUPN = tostring(ActorUsername)
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
  | project RdpTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP, IsLocalAdmin = false, InitiatorUPN;
// Gather successful cloud sign-ins for same user keys.
let CloudUserSignins =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where EventProduct =~ "Microsoft Entra ID"
  | where LogonProtocol has_any ("OAuth", "OpenID", "SAML")
    or LogonMethod in~ ("Service Principal", "Managed Identity", "Username & Password", "Multi factor authentication", "Passwordless", "PKI")
  | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           CloudIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           AppName = tostring(TargetAppName),
           ClientApp = tostring(ActingAppName)
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserKey, CloudIP, AppName, ClientApp, ConditionalAccessStatus = "", CorrelationId = EventOriginalUid;
// Correlate RDP activity to near-term cloud access by the same hybrid identity.
RdpSessions
| join kind=inner HybridDevices on DeviceJoinKey
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on UserKey
| join kind=inner CloudUserSignins on UserKey
| where SigninTime between (RdpTime .. (RdpTime + 2h))
| summarize FirstCloudSignin = min(SigninTime),
            LastCloudSignin = max(SigninTime),
            CloudSigninCount = count(),
            Apps = make_set(AppName, 10),
            ClientApps = make_set(ClientApp, 10),
            CloudIPs = make_set(CloudIP, 10),
            CorrelationIds = make_set(CorrelationId, 10)
  by RdpTime, HybridDeviceName, JoinType, SourceIP, IsLocalAdmin,
    HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius, InitiatorUPN
| extend Confidence = iff(IsLocalAdmin == true or BlastRadius =~ "high", "High", "Medium")
| extend TimeGenerated = RdpTime
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description: cloud-run-command-followed-by-kernel-persistence-indicators_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Cloud Run Command followed by kernel persistence indicators on target servers
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let DriverPathToken = "\\windows\\system32\\drivers\\";
let RunCmdOps = dynamic([
  "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/runCommand/action",
  "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets/virtualMachines/runCommand/action"
]);
let BaselineKernelLoad =
  DeviceImageLoadEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. StartTime)
  | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath
  | where tolower(FileName) endswith ".sys" or tolower(FolderPath) has DriverPathToken
  | summarize by Device=tostring(DeviceName), FileNameNorm=tolower(FileName), FolderPathNorm=tolower(FolderPath);
let RunCommandOps =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationNameValue in~ (RunCmdOps)
  | where ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
  | extend VmName = toupper(tostring(extract(@"virtualMachines/([^/]+)", 1, tostring(ResourceId)))),
           CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller)),
           CallerIP = tostring(CallerIpAddress)
  | where isnotempty(VmName)
  | project RunCmdTime=TimeGenerated, VmName, CallerNorm, CallerIP, OperationNameValue, ResourceId, SubscriptionId, CorrelationId;
let KernelSignals =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (
      DeviceImageLoadEvents
      | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
      | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA1,
                InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessAccountUpn
      | where tolower(FileName) endswith ".sys" or tolower(FolderPath) has DriverPathToken
      | extend Device=tostring(DeviceName), DeviceShort=toupper(tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0])),
               FileNameNorm=tolower(FileName), FolderPathNorm=tolower(FolderPath),
               Evidence=strcat("DriverLoad:", FileName, " SHA1:", tostring(coalesce(SHA1, "unknown")))
      | join kind=leftanti BaselineKernelLoad on Device, FileNameNorm, FolderPathNorm
      | project IndicatorTime=TimeGenerated, Device, DeviceShort, Evidence,
                InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessAccountUpn
    ),
    (
      DeviceProcessEvents
      | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
      | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, AccountUpn
      | extend Cmd = tolower(tostring(ProcessCommandLine)),
               Device=tostring(DeviceName), DeviceShort=toupper(tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]))
      | where Cmd has_any ("sc create", "sc start", "type= kernel", "\\system32\\drivers\\", "hklm\\system\\currentcontrolset\\services")
      | project IndicatorTime=TimeGenerated, Device, DeviceShort,
                Evidence=tostring(ProcessCommandLine),
                InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine=ProcessCommandLine,
                InitiatingProcessAccountUpn=AccountUpn
    );
RunCommandOps
| join kind=inner KernelSignals on $left.VmName == $right.DeviceShort
| where IndicatorTime between (RunCmdTime .. (RunCmdTime + 2h))
| summarize FirstRunCmd=min(RunCmdTime), FirstIndicator=min(IndicatorTime), LastIndicator=max(IndicatorTime),
            IndicatorCount=count(), EvidenceSet=make_set(Evidence, 10),
        CallerNorm=any(CallerNorm), CallerIP=any(CallerIP)
    by VmName, Device, SubscriptionId, ResourceId, CorrelationId
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstRunCmd
| order by TimeGenerated desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: This query hunts for Azure VM Run Command activity followed by kernel-persistence indicators on the same targeted servers within a short window.

properties.description: Hybrid Attack - Cloud & Identity Hunting Query 43

properties.description: appliance-mgt-session-followed-by-rbac-write_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Appliance management session followed by RBAC write
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let MgmtPorts = dynamic([22, 443, 8443, 9443, 5985, 5986]);
let ApplianceHints = dynamic(["palo", "forti", "checkpoint", "f5", "citrix", "netscaler", "esxi", "vmware", "juniper", "cisco"]);
let ApplianceMgmt =
  _Im_NetworkSession(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(SrcIpAddr)
  | where DstPortNumber in (MgmtPorts) or EventProduct has_any (ApplianceHints)
  | where DvcAction has_any ("allow", "accept", "success") or EventResult == "Success"
  | extend Device = tostring(coalesce(DvcHostname, DvcFQDN, Dvc, DvcId)),
           SrcIp = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           DstPort = toint(DstPortNumber),
           Product = tostring(EventProduct)
  | where isnotempty(Device) and isnotempty(SrcIp)
  | project MgmtTime=TimeGenerated, Device, SrcIp, DstPort, Product;
let CloudWrites =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationNameValue has_any (
      "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write",
      "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete",
      "Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments/write",
      "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accessPolicies/write"
    )
  | where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | project WriteTime=TimeGenerated, Caller, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ActivityStatusValue, CorrelationId, ResourceId, SubscriptionId;
CloudWrites
| join kind=inner ApplianceMgmt on $left.CallerIpAddress == $right.SrcIp
| where WriteTime between (MgmtTime .. (MgmtTime + 30m))
| project TimeGenerated=MgmtTime, Device, SrcIp, DstPort, Product, WriteTime, Caller, OperationNameValue, ActivityStatusValue, CorrelationId, ResourceId, SubscriptionId
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description: app-cred-change-sp-burst_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: App credential change followed by SP sign-in burst
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let CredChanges =
_Im_AuditEvent(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
| extend OperationText = tolower(tostring(coalesce(Operation, EventType, EventMessage))),
         TargetId = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ObjectId, ActorUserId))),
         TargetName = tostring(Object),
         Initiator = tostring(ActorUsername),
         InitiatorIp = tostring(SrcIpAddr)
| where OperationText has_any ("credential", "certificate", "secret", "password", "service principal", "application")
| where isnotempty(TargetId)
| project ChangeTime=TimeGenerated, OperationText, TargetId, TargetName, Initiator, InitiatorIp;
let SPBurst =
_Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
| where EventResult == "Success"
| where ActorUserType has "Service Principal"
| extend PrincipalId = tolower(tostring(ActorUserId)),
         PrincipalName = tostring(ActorUsername),
         SrcIp = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
         UserAgent = tostring(HttpUserAgent)
| where isnotempty(PrincipalId)
| summarize FirstSignin=min(TimeGenerated), LastSignin=max(TimeGenerated), SigninCount=count(), DistinctIPs=dcount(SrcIp),
            SrcIps=make_set(SrcIp, 20), UserAgents=make_set(UserAgent, 10)
    by PrincipalId, PrincipalName;
CredChanges
| join kind=inner SPBurst on $left.TargetId == $right.PrincipalId
| where FirstSignin between (ChangeTime .. (ChangeTime + 24h))
| where SigninCount >= 3
| project TimeGenerated=ChangeTime, OperationText, TargetId, TargetName, Initiator, InitiatorIp,
          PrincipalName, FirstSignin, LastSignin, SigninCount, DistinctIPs, SrcIps, UserAgents
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description: FederatedIdentityProviderAddedToTenant_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Federated Identity Provider Added to Tenant
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let FederationEvents = materialize(
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
| where OperationName in ("Set domain authentication","Set federation settings on domain")
| where Result =~ "success"
| extend ActorUPN=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
         ActorIPAddress=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress),
         ActorId=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id),
         TargetDomain=tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName),
         TargetDomainId=tostring(TargetResources[0].id)
| mv-expand Detail = AdditionalDetails
| extend DetailKey=tostring(Detail.key), DetailValue=tostring(Detail.value)
| summarize FederationTime=min(TimeGenerated),
            OperationNames=make_set(OperationName),
            ActorUPN=any(ActorUPN),
            ActorIPAddress=any(ActorIPAddress),
            ActorId=any(ActorId),
            UserAgent=anyif(DetailValue, DetailKey == "User-Agent"),
            EventCount=dcount(Id)
          by TargetDomain, TargetDomainId);
let FederationActorIds = FederationEvents | where isnotempty(ActorId) | distinct ActorId;
FederationEvents
| join kind=leftouter (
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
    | where UserId in (FederationActorIds)
    | where RiskLevelAggregated in ("medium","high")
    | extend RiskRank=case(RiskLevelAggregated =~ "high", 3, RiskLevelAggregated =~ "medium", 2, 1)
    | summarize LastRiskySignIn=max(TimeGenerated),
                arg_max(RiskRank, RiskLevelAggregated, IPAddress)
            by UserId
    | project UserId, LastRiskySignIn, MaxRiskLevel=RiskLevelAggregated, RiskySignInIP=IPAddress
) on $left.ActorId == $right.UserId
| extend IsPowerShell=UserAgent has_any ("PowerShell","python","curl","AADInternals")
| extend IsAnonymousActor=isempty(ActorUPN)
| extend SuspicionScore=toint(IsPowerShell)+toint(IsAnonymousActor)+toint(MaxRiskLevel in ("medium","high"))
| project FederationTime, TargetDomain, ActorUPN, ActorId, ActorIPAddress, OperationNames, EventCount,
          UserAgent, IsPowerShell, IsAnonymousActor, ActorRisk=MaxRiskLevel, LastRiskySignIn, RiskySignInIP, SuspicionScore
| order by SuspicionScore desc, FederationTime desc

properties.description: k8s-daemonset-cronjob-by-nonautomation-identity_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Kubernetes daemonset or cronjob by non-automation identity
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let AllowedAutomationPrincipals = dynamic(["ci-pipeline-sp", "aks-maintenance-mi", "github-actions-mi", "ado-release-sp"]);
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
| where Category has "kube-audit"
| where OperationName has_any ("daemonsets/create", "cronjobs/create")
| where isnotempty(Caller_s)
| extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller_s)
| where CallerNorm !in (AllowedAutomationPrincipals)
| summarize
    EventCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    Operations = make_set(OperationName, 10),
    Resources = make_set(Resource, 20)
    by Caller = CallerNorm, ResourceId
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstSeen
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, ResourceId, EventCount, FirstSeen, LastSeen, Operations, Resources
| order by LastSeen desc
