properties.description: MFAMethodAddedRiskyAccount_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: MFA Method Added on Risky Account
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let riskLevels = dynamic(["medium", "high"]);
let MFAEvents = AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
| where OperationName in (
    "User registered security info",
    "Admin registered security info",
    "User updated security info",
    "Admin updated security info",
    "User changed default security info",
    "User deleted security info",
    "Admin deleted security info")
| where Result =~ "success"
| extend TargetUserUPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| extend TargetUserId  = tostring(TargetResources[0].id)
| extend ActorUPN      = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| extend ActorId       = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
| extend ActorIP       = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress)
| where isnotempty(TargetUserId)
| mv-expand Detail     = AdditionalDetails
| extend DetailKey     = tostring(Detail.key)
| extend DetailValue   = tostring(Detail.value)
| summarize
    MFATime    = min(TimeGenerated),
    ActorUPN   = any(ActorUPN),
    ActorId    = any(ActorId),
    ActorIP    = any(ActorIP),
    AuthMethod = anyif(DetailValue, DetailKey == "AuthenticationMethod")
    by Id, OperationName, TargetUserUPN, TargetUserId;
let RiskyUsers = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
| where RiskLevelAggregated in (riskLevels)
| extend RiskRank = case(RiskLevelAggregated =~ "high", 3, RiskLevelAggregated =~ "medium", 2, RiskLevelAggregated =~ "low", 1, 0)
| summarize
    LastRiskySignIn = max(TimeGenerated),
    arg_max(RiskRank, RiskLevelAggregated, IPAddress, Location)
    by UserId
| project UserId, LastRiskySignIn,
          MaxRiskLevel  = RiskLevelAggregated,
          RiskySignInIP = IPAddress,
          RiskyLocation = Location;
MFAEvents
| join kind=inner RiskyUsers on $left.TargetUserId == $right.UserId
| where LastRiskySignIn <= MFATime
| extend AdminPerformedChange = iff(ActorUPN != TargetUserUPN and isnotempty(ActorUPN), true, false)
| project
    MFATime,
    OperationName,
    TargetUserUPN,
    ActorUPN,
    TargetUserId,
    ActorId,
    AdminPerformedChange,
    AuthMethod,
    MFARegistrationIP = ActorIP,
    UserRiskLevel     = MaxRiskLevel,
    LastRiskySignIn,
    RiskySignInIP,
    RiskyLocation
| order by MFATime desc

properties.description: rare-kernel-load-signer-drift-followed-by-novel-ni-signin_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Rare kernel load followed by novel non-interactive sign-in tuple
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = StartTime;
let DriverPathToken = "\\windows\\system32\\drivers\\";
let BaselineKernelLoads =
  DeviceImageLoadEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath
  | where tolower(FileName) endswith ".sys" or tolower(FolderPath) has DriverPathToken
  | summarize by Device=tostring(DeviceName), FileNameNorm=tolower(FileName), FolderPathNorm=tolower(FolderPath);
let CurrentKernelLoads =
  DeviceImageLoadEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA1,
            InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, InitiatingProcessAccountDomain, InitiatingProcessAccountName,
            InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
  | where tolower(FileName) endswith ".sys" or tolower(FolderPath) has DriverPathToken
  | extend Device = tostring(DeviceName),
           UserNorm = tolower(tostring(coalesce(InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, strcat(InitiatingProcessAccountDomain, "\\", InitiatingProcessAccountName)))),
           FileNameNorm = tolower(FileName),
           FolderPathNorm = tolower(FolderPath),
           Evidence = strcat("DriverLoad:", FileName, " SHA1:", tostring(coalesce(SHA1, "unknown")))
  | where isnotempty(Device)
  | project LoadTime=TimeGenerated, Device, FileName, FolderPath, FileNameNorm, FolderPathNorm, UserNorm,
            Evidence, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
let RareKernelLoads =
  CurrentKernelLoads
  | join kind=leftanti BaselineKernelLoads on Device, FileNameNorm, FolderPathNorm;
let BaselineNISignin =
  AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | where ResultType in~ ("0", "Success")
  | where isnotempty(Identity) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
  | extend IdentityNorm = tolower(Identity), AppIdNorm = tolower(AppId), SrcIp = tostring(IPAddress), Ua = tostring(UserAgent)
  | summarize by IdentityNorm, AppIdNorm, SrcIp, Ua;
let NovelNISignin =
  AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ResultType in~ ("0", "Success")
  | where isnotempty(Identity) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
  | extend IdentityNorm = tolower(Identity), AppIdNorm = tolower(AppId), SrcIp = tostring(IPAddress), Ua = tostring(UserAgent)
  | join kind=leftanti BaselineNISignin on IdentityNorm, AppIdNorm, SrcIp, Ua
  | project SigninTime=TimeGenerated, Identity, IdentityNorm, AppId, SrcIp, Ua, CorrelationId, ConditionalAccessStatus;
RareKernelLoads
| where isnotempty(UserNorm)
| join kind=inner NovelNISignin on $left.UserNorm == $right.IdentityNorm
| where SigninTime between (LoadTime .. (LoadTime + 2h))
| project TimeGenerated=LoadTime, SigninTime, Device, FileName, FolderPath, Evidence,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Identity, AppId, SrcIp, Ua, CorrelationId, ConditionalAccessStatus
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');

| where EventResult == "Success"
| where ActorUserType has "Service Principal"
| extend PrincipalId = tolower(tostring(ActorUserId)),
         AppId = tolower(tostring(ActingAppId)),

_Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)

| where ActorUserType has "Service Principal"
| extend PrincipalId = tolower(tostring(ActorUserId)),
         PrincipalName = tostring(ActorUsername),
         AppId = tolower(tostring(ActingAppId)),

         CorrelationId = tostring(column_ifexists("CorrelationId", ""))

properties.description: SecretAddedDormantServicePrincipal_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Secret Added to Dormant Service Principal
properties.query:
let starttime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let endtime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let dormancyWindow = 14d;
let CredentialAdditions = AuditLogs
 | where TimeGenerated between (starttime .. endtime)
 | where OperationName == "Add service principal credentials"
 | where Result =~ "success"
 | extend TargetSPId      = tostring(TargetResources[0].id)
 | extend TargetSPName    = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
 | extend ActorUPN        = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)   // user actor (empty if app)
 | extend ActorUserId     = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
 | extend ActorAppName    = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)          // app actor (empty if user)
 | extend ActorAppId      = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.appId)
 | extend ActorIPAddress  = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress)
 | extend Actor           = iif(isnotempty(ActorUPN), ActorUPN, ActorAppName)   // display only
 | extend ActorType       = case(isnotempty(ActorUPN), "User",
                                 isnotempty(ActorAppName), "App", "Unknown")
 | where isnotempty(TargetSPId)
 | project CredentialAddTime = TimeGenerated, TargetSPId, TargetSPName,
           ActorUPN, ActorUserId, ActorAppName, ActorAppId, ActorIPAddress,
           Actor, ActorType;
 let TargetSPIds = CredentialAdditions | distinct TargetSPId;
 let SPSignIns = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
 | where TimeGenerated between ((starttime - dormancyWindow) .. endtime)
 | where ResultType == "0"
 | where ServicePrincipalId in (TargetSPIds)
 | project SignInTime = TimeGenerated, ServicePrincipalId;
 CredentialAdditions
 | join kind=leftouter (SPSignIns) on $left.TargetSPId == $right.ServicePrincipalId
 | summarize
     LastSignInBeforeAdd = maxif(SignInTime, SignInTime <  CredentialAddTime),
     FirstSignInAfterAdd = minif(SignInTime, SignInTime >= CredentialAddTime),
     TargetSPName   = take_any(TargetSPName),
     ActorUPN       = take_any(ActorUPN),
     ActorUserId    = take_any(ActorUserId),
     ActorAppName   = take_any(ActorAppName),
     ActorAppId     = take_any(ActorAppId),
     ActorIPAddress = take_any(ActorIPAddress),
     Actor          = take_any(Actor),
     ActorType      = take_any(ActorType)
   by TargetSPId, CredentialAddTime
 | where isnull(LastSignInBeforeAdd)
     or LastSignInBeforeAdd < (CredentialAddTime - dormancyWindow)   // dormant before the add
 | where isnotnull(FirstSignInAfterAdd)                              // ...then activated after
 | extend DormancyStatus = iif(isnull(LastSignInBeforeAdd),
     strcat("No sign-in in prior ", tostring(toint(dormancyWindow / 1d)), " days"),
     strcat(tostring(datetime_diff('day', CredentialAddTime, LastSignInBeforeAdd)), " days dormant"))
 | extend MinutesToActivation = datetime_diff('minute', FirstSignInAfterAdd, CredentialAddTime)
 | extend AnonymousActor = isempty(Actor)
 | project CredentialAddTime, TargetSPName, TargetSPId, ActorType, Actor,
           ActorUPN, ActorUserId, ActorAppName, ActorAppId, ActorIPAddress,
           DormancyStatus, LastSignInBeforeAdd, FirstSignInAfterAdd, MinutesToActivation,
           AnonymousActor
 | order by MinutesToActivation asc, CredentialAddTime desc

properties.description: sp-credential-change-followed-by-novel-sp-signin_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Service principal credential change followed by novel SP sign-in
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let CredChanges =
  AuditLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend Activity = tostring(ActivityDisplayName),
           TargetId = tolower(tostring(extractjson("$[0].id", tostring(TargetResources)))),
           TargetName = tostring(extractjson("$[0].displayName", tostring(TargetResources))),
           InitiatorUpn = tostring(extractjson("$.user.userPrincipalName", tostring(InitiatedBy))),
           InitiatorIp = tostring(extractjson("$.user.ipAddress", tostring(InitiatedBy)))
  | where Activity has_any ("credential", "certificate", "secret", "password credential", "key credential")
  | where isnotempty(TargetId) or isnotempty(TargetName)
  | project ChangeTime=TimeGenerated, ActivityDisplayName, OperationName, CorrelationId, TargetId, TargetName, InitiatorUpn, InitiatorIp;
let BaselineSP =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - 14d) .. StartTime)
  | where ResultType in~ ("0", "Success")
  | where isnotempty(ServicePrincipalId) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
  | extend SpId = tolower(ServicePrincipalId), SrcIp = tostring(IPAddress), Ua = tostring(UserAgent)
  | summarize by SpId, SrcIp, Ua;
let NovelSPSignins =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. (EndTime + 1d))
  | where ResultType in~ ("0", "Success")
  | where isnotempty(ServicePrincipalId) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
  | extend SpId = tolower(ServicePrincipalId), SpName = tostring(ServicePrincipalName), SrcIp = tostring(IPAddress), Ua = tostring(UserAgent)
  | join kind=leftanti BaselineSP on SpId, SrcIp, Ua
  | project SigninTime=TimeGenerated, SpId, SpName, AppId, SrcIp, Ua, CorrelationId, ResultType;
CredChanges
| join kind=inner NovelSPSignins on $left.TargetId == $right.SpId
| where SigninTime between (ChangeTime .. (ChangeTime + 24h))
| project TimeGenerated=ChangeTime, SigninTime, ActivityDisplayName, OperationName, CorrelationId,
          TargetId, TargetName, SpName, AppId, SrcIp, Ua, InitiatorUpn, InitiatorIp, ResultType
| order by SigninTime desc

properties.description: suspicious-signin-followed-by-authmethod-or-role-change_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Suspicious sign-in followed by auth method or role change
properties.query:
let StartTime = todatetime('{{StartTimeISO}}');
let EndTime = todatetime('{{EndTimeISO}}');
let BaselineSignin =
  SigninLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - 14d) .. StartTime)
  | where ResultType in~ ("0", "Success")
  | where isnotempty(Identity) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
  | extend IdentityNorm = tolower(tostring(Identity)), SrcIp = tostring(IPAddress), UA = tostring(UserAgent)
  | summarize by IdentityNorm, SrcIp, UA;
let SuspiciousSignin =
  SigninLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ResultType in~ ("0", "Success")
  | where isnotempty(Identity) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
  | extend IdentityNorm = tolower(tostring(Identity)),
           UserUpn = tostring(column_ifexists("UserPrincipalName", Identity)),
           SrcIp = tostring(IPAddress),
           UA = tostring(UserAgent),
           RiskFlag = tobool(column_ifexists("IsRisky", false)),
           CAStatus = tostring(ConditionalAccessStatus)
  | where RiskFlag == true or CAStatus in~ ("failure", "notApplied")
  | join kind=leftanti BaselineSignin on IdentityNorm, SrcIp, UA
  | project SigninTime=TimeGenerated, Identity, UserUpn, IdentityNorm, SrcIp, UA, CorrelationId, CAStatus, RiskFlag;
let HighRiskChanges =
  AuditLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. (EndTime + 2h))
  | extend Activity = tostring(ActivityDisplayName),
           ActorUpn = tolower(tostring(extractjson("$.user.userPrincipalName", tostring(InitiatedBy)))),
           ActorIp = tostring(extractjson("$.user.ipAddress", tostring(InitiatedBy)))
  | where Activity has_any (
      "authentication method",
      "strong authentication",
      "mfa",
      "add member to role",
      "add eligible member to role",
      "add app role assignment"
    )
  | project ChangeTime=TimeGenerated, ActivityDisplayName, OperationName, CorrelationId, ActorUpn, ActorIp, Result, ResultType, TargetResources;
SuspiciousSignin
| join kind=inner HighRiskChanges on $left.IdentityNorm == $right.ActorUpn
| where ChangeTime between (SigninTime .. (SigninTime + 2h))
| project TimeGenerated=SigninTime, ChangeTime, Identity, UserUpn, SrcIp, UA, CAStatus, RiskFlag,
          ActivityDisplayName, OperationName, Result, ResultType, TargetResources, CorrelationId
| order by ChangeTime desc

0","id":"31cf825e-e825-4c59-8463-a957c2a61018"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🛡️ Hybrid Attack — Cloud & Identity Kill-Chain
Behavior-led hunting for a hybrid identity attack, end-to-end across **7 MITRE ATT&CK phases**: Initial Access → Lateral Movement → Persistence → Discovery → Defense Evasion → Credential Access → Exfiltration. Each tile correlates Entra ID, Azure, on-prem AD, and Defender XDR signals.

**Layout** · One collapsible section per phase; most detections pair a *summary* with a *detail* drill-down. Each phase header lists its **MITRE** techniques and **Key tables**. A `✅ … in this window.` banner means nothing matched — a good sign.

**How to use** · Set **Workspace** + **Time Range**, then scope with the **Attack Phases** selector and optional **User / Device / IP** filters. Check **Data Source Coverage** (below) first to confirm the required tables have recent data.

> These are *hunting* queries (hypothesis-led), not tuned alerts — treat hits as leads to investigate."},"name":"section-0-readme","id":"1999f5c4-db91-4094-a2b3-a34f0d9050b1"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📡 Data Source Coverage

Credential stuffing/spray and risky sign-ins against VPN/network apps, TI-matched appliance traffic, CVE exploitation on edge appliances, web-service RCE with egress, Azure VM IMDS token theft, and first-seen Kubernetes control-plane writes.

**MITRE:** T1110 · T1190 · T1133 · T1078.004 · T1059 · T1552.005  
**Key tables:** SigninLogs · AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs · CommonSecurityLog · ThreatIntelIndicators · _Im_NetworkSession · _Im_ProcessEvent · AzureDiagnostics"},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"name":"section-2-text","id":"d369a553-6e98-4f6f-8074-29f2aedb1182"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let failureThreshold = 10;
let sprayUserThreshold = 5;
let stuffingWindowMinutes = 60;
let vpnAppKeywords = dynamic([
    "GlobalProtect", "Palo Alto Networks", "Fortinet",
    "Cisco AnyConnect", "Cisco Secure Client", "Zscaler", "Pulse Secure",
    "Ivanti Connect Secure", "Ivanti Secure Access", "Ivanti VPN", "F5", "NetScaler", "Citrix Gateway",
    "Barracuda VPN", "SonicWall"]);
// Failure codes that indicate wrong-password attempts (credential stuffing indicators)
// 50053=AccountLocked, 50126=InvalidPassword, 50056=InvalidPassword(variant),
// 50064=CredentialValidationFailure, 70000=InvalidGrant
let failureCodes = dynamic([50053, 50126, 50056, 50064, 70000]);
let Failures =
    union SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where ResultType in (failureCodes)
    | where AppDisplayName has_any (vpnAppKeywords)
    | where IPAddress !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    | project FailTime = TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName;
let Successes =
    union
       (SigninLogs                       | extend LocationDetails = todynamic(LocationDetails)),
       (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs  | extend LocationDetails = todynamic(LocationDetails))
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | where AppDisplayName has_any (vpnAppKeywords)
    | project
        SuccessTime           = TimeGenerated,
        UserPrincipalName,
        UserId,
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
         RiskLevelDuringSignIn = column_ifexists('RiskLevelDuringSignIn', ''),
         RiskLevelAggregated   = column_ifexists('RiskLevelAggregated', ''),
          Country               = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion),
          City                  = tostring(LocationDetails.city);
// Pattern A: Credential Stuffing — many failures on same user from same IP, then success
let PatternA =
    Failures
    | summarize
        FailureCount = count(),
        FirstFailure = min(FailTime),
        LastFailure  = max(FailTime)
      by UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | where FailureCount >= failureThreshold
    | join kind=inner Successes on UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | where SuccessTime > LastFailure
    | where datetime_diff('minute', SuccessTime, FirstFailure) <= stuffingWindowMinutes
    | summarize arg_min(SuccessTime, *) by UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | project
        PatternType           = "A — Credential Stuffing",
        SuccessAfterFailuresTime              = SuccessTime,
        UserPrincipalName,
        EntraProfileUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_UsersAndTenants/UserProfileMenuBlade/~/overview/userId/",UserId),
        XDRIPUrl   = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", IPAddress,"/overview"),
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
        Country,
        City,
        FailureCount,
        FirstFailure,
        SignalStrength        = iff(FailureCount >= 50, "High", "Medium"),
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn,
        RiskLevelAggregated;
// Pattern B: Password Spray — same IP targets many distinct users, at least one success
let PatternB_Failures =
    Failures
    | summarize
        DistinctUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
        FailureCount  = count(),
        FirstFailure  = min(FailTime),
        LastFailure   = max(FailTime),
        UserSample = make_set(UserPrincipalName)
      by IPAddress, AppDisplayName;
let PatternB =
    PatternB_Failures
    | where DistinctUsers >= sprayUserThreshold
    | join kind=inner Successes on IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | where SuccessTime > LastFailure
    | where datetime_diff('minute', SuccessTime, FirstFailure) <= stuffingWindowMinutes
    | summarize arg_min(SuccessTime, *) by IPAddress, AppDisplayName, UserPrincipalName
    // Success user must be one of the sprayed accounts — avoids FP from unrelated logins on shared IPs
    | where array_index_of(UserSample, UserPrincipalName) != -1
    | project
        PatternType           = "B — Password Spray",
        SuccessAfterFailuresTime              = SuccessTime,
        UserPrincipalName,
        EntraProfileUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_UsersAndTenants/UserProfileMenuBlade/~/overview/userId/",UserId),
        XDRIPUrl   = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", IPAddress,"/overview"),
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
        Country,
        City,
        FailureCount,
        DistinctUsers,
        FirstFailure,
        SignalStrength        = iff(DistinctUsers >= 20, "High", "Medium"),
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn,
        RiskLevelAggregated;
union PatternA, PatternB
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or UserPrincipalName contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or IPAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
| extend TimeDeltaMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', SuccessAfterFailuresTime, FirstFailure)
| sort by SignalStrength asc, SuccessAfterFailuresTime desc
| project-reorder SignalStrength, PatternType, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName, FailureCount, DistinctUsers, TimeDeltaMinutes, FirstFailure, SuccessAfterFailuresTime, RiskLevelDuringSignIn, EntraProfileUrl, XDRIPUrl
| limit 25","size":0,"title":"VPN Credential Stuffing & Spray (Pattern A: Stuffing / Pattern B: Spray)","noDataMessage":"✅ No VPN credential-stuffing or spray patterns in this IP","linkIsContextBlade":false}},{"columnMatch":"FirstFailure","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"SuccessAfterFailuresTime","formatter":6}],"labelSettings":[{"columnId":"SignalStrength","label":"Signal"},{"columnId":"PatternType","label":"Pattern"},{"columnId":"UserPrincipalName","label":"User (UPN)"},{"columnId":"IPAddress","label":"Source IP"},{"columnId":"AppDisplayName","label":"VPN/ZTNA App"},{"columnId":"FailureCount","label":"Failures"},{"columnId":"DistinctUsers","label":"Distinct Users"},{"columnId":"TimeDeltaMinutes","label":"Fail→Success (min)"},{"columnId":"FirstFailure","label":"First Failure"},{"columnId":"SuccessAfterFailuresTime","label":"Success (Sign-in)"},{"columnId":"EntraProfileUrl","label":"Entra"},{"columnId":"XDRIPUrl","label":"XDR"},{"columnId":"RiskLevelAggregated","label":"Risk (Aggregated)"}]}},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"name":"ia-q5-credential-stuffing","id":"aebd722a-90dc-425c-9833-c07a44137fb4"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let correlationWindowMinutes = 60; // risk event must occur within this window of the sign-in
  let vpnAppKeywords = dynamic(["GlobalProtect", "Palo Alto Networks", "Fortinet", "Cisco AnyConnect", "Cisco Secure Client", "Zscaler", "Pulse Secure",
      "Ivanti Connect Secure", "Ivanti Secure Access", "Ivanti VPN", "F5", "NetScaler", "Citrix Gateway", 
      "Barracuda VPN", "SonicWall"]);
let highValueRiskTypes = dynamic([
    "leakedCredentials",
    "investigationsThreatIntelligence",
    "mcasImpossibleTravel",
    "unlikelyTravel",
    "anonymizedIPAddress",
    "maliciousIPAddress",
    "unfamiliarFeatures"]);
// Successful VPN logins
let VPNLogins =
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | where AppDisplayName has_any (vpnAppKeywords)
    | project
        SignInTime        = TimeGenerated,
        UserPrincipalName,
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
        Country           = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion),
        City              = tostring(LocationDetails.city),
        ConditionalAccessStatus;
// Risk detection events for same period
// RiskState filter: exclude already-remediated/dismissed events to avoid FPs
// from risks Entra ID has already auto-resolved (e.g., user passed MFA challenge)
let RiskEvents =
    AADUserRiskEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where RiskLevel in ("high", "medium")
    | where RiskEventType in (highValueRiskTypes)
    | where RiskState in ("atRisk", "confirmedCompromised")  // exclude remediated/dismissed/confirmedSafe
    | project
        RiskTime          = coalesce(ActivityDateTime, TimeGenerated),
        UserPrincipalName,
        RiskEventType,
        RiskLevel,
        RiskDetail,
        RiskState;
// Join: VPN login correlated with a risk event for same user within riskWindow
VPNLogins
| join kind=inner RiskEvents on UserPrincipalName
| where abs(datetime_diff('minute', SignInTime, RiskTime)) <= correlationWindowMinutes
| summarize arg_min(RiskTime, *) by UserPrincipalName, SignInTime, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
| project
    SignInTime,
    UserPrincipalName,
    IPAddress,
    AppDisplayName,
    Country,
    City,
    RiskEventType,
    RiskLevel,
    RiskDetail,
    RiskState,
    RiskTime,
    ConditionalAccessStatus
| extend AccountName      = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[0])
| extend AccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[1])
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or UserPrincipalName contains '{UserFilter}'

let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let postExploitWindow = 15m;
// Known CVE exploitation URL path signatures — extracted from CISA advisories
// Note: /../ removed (too generic — matches any path traversal detected by firewall)
let CVEUrlPaths = dynamic([
    "/api/v1/totp/user-backup-code/",  // CVE-2023-46805 — Ivanti auth bypass
    "/api/v1/license/keys-status/",    // CVE-2024-21887 — Ivanti RCE (keys-status is plural)
    "/api/v2/cmdb/system/admin/",      // CVE-2022-40684 — Fortinet auth bypass
    "/vpns/page.aspx",                 // CVE-2019-19781 — Citrix ADC directory traversal RCE
    "/remote/fgt_lang?lang="           // CVE-2018-13379 — Fortinet SSL VPN path traversal
]);
let ApplianceVendors = dynamic([
    "Fortinet", "Palo Alto Networks", "Ivanti", "Pulse Secure",
    "SonicWall", "Cisco", "Check Point", "Juniper", "F5", "Citrix"]);
// Method 1: Known CVE exploitation URL paths in request or message
let CVE_URL_Hits =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    // Exclude F5 ASM — WAF detecting attacks against protected apps, not F5 being exploited
    | where DeviceProduct !has "ASM"
    | where RequestURL has_any (CVEUrlPaths)
        or Message has_any (CVEUrlPaths)
    // Exclude Qualys/Nessus scanner probes
    | where Message !has "Qualys" and Message !has "nessus"
    | extend CVEReference = case(
        RequestURL contains "totp/user-backup-code" or Message contains "totp/user-backup-code", "CVE-2023-46805 (Ivanti auth bypass)",
        RequestURL contains "license/keys-status" or Message contains "license/keys-status", "CVE-2024-21887 (Ivanti RCE)",
        RequestURL contains "/api/v2/cmdb/system/admin" or Message contains "/api/v2/cmdb/system/admin", "CVE-2022-40684 (Fortinet auth bypass)",
        RequestURL contains "vpns/page.aspx" or Message contains "vpns/page.aspx", "CVE-2019-19781 (Citrix ADC directory traversal RCE)",
        RequestURL contains "fgt_lang" or Message contains "fgt_lang", "CVE-2018-13379 (Fortinet SSL VPN path traversal)",
        "Unknown CVE path")
    | project
        EventTime       = TimeGenerated,
        DetectionMethod = "Method1 — CVE URL path",
        CVEReference,
        SourceIP,
        DestinationIP,
        SourceUserName,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        DeviceAction,
        Activity,
        RequestURL,
        Message,
        Computer,
        SignalStrength  = "High — known CVE exploit path matched";
// Method 2: CVE ID string in appliance log message (vendor IPS catch-all)
let CVE_String_Hits =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    | where Message contains "CVE-20"
    // Exclude noise sources (RDA-validated):
    | where Message !has "nessus.org"       // Nessus scanner DNS callbacks embedding CVE in hostname
        and Message !has "430002"           // Cisco FTD connection logs (traffic allowed, not threat)
        and DeviceProduct != "Cortex XDR"  // Endpoint detections, not appliance exploit indicators
        and DeviceProduct !has "ASM"       // F5 WAF detecting attacks against protected apps
    | extend CVEReference = extract(@"(CVE-\d{4}-\d+)", 1, Message)
    | where isnotempty(CVEReference)
    | project
        EventTime       = TimeGenerated,
        DetectionMethod = "Method2 — CVE string in log",
        CVEReference,
        SourceIP,
        DestinationIP,
        SourceUserName,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        DeviceAction,
        Activity,
        RequestURL,
        Message,
        Computer,
        SignalStrength  = "Medium — CVE reference in log message"
    | summarize arg_min(EventTime, *) by SourceIP, DestinationIP, CVEReference, Computer;
// Method 3: FortiGate SAML/SSO bypass → local admin account creation (FG-IR-26-060)
// Translated from Elastic "FortiGate SSO Login Followed by Administrator Account Creation"
// RDA-validated: FSSO-logon is the correct DeviceAction for FortiGate SSO events
let Forti_SSO_Logins =
    CommonSecurityLog
 | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DeviceVendor =~ "Fortinet"
 | where DeviceAction == "FSSO-logon"
    | project SSOTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, SourceIP;
let Forti_AdminCreate =
    CommonSecurityLog
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DeviceVendor =~ "Fortinet"
  | where DeviceEventClassID == "0100044547"
  | where Message has "system.admin" and Message has "Add"
    | project AdminCreateTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, AdminMessage = Message;
let Forti_Sequence =
    Forti_SSO_Logins
    | join kind=inner Forti_AdminCreate on Computer
   | where AdminCreateTime > SSOTime
        and AdminCreateTime < SSOTime + postExploitWindow
    | project
        EventTime       = SSOTime,
          DetectionMethod = "Method3 — FortiCloud SSO auth bypass + admin create (FG-IR-26-060)",
          CVEReference    = "CVE-2026-24858 (FortiCloud SSO authentication bypass)",
        SourceIP,
        DestinationIP   = "",
        SourceUserName  = "",
        DeviceVendor    = "Fortinet",
        DeviceProduct   = "",
        DeviceAction    = "SSO login → admin create",
        Activity        = strcat("Admin created at ", tostring(AdminCreateTime)),
        RequestURL      = "",
        Message         = AdminMessage,
        Computer,
        SignalStrength  = "High — SSO bypass then admin account created within 15 min"
    | summarize arg_min(EventTime, *) by SourceIP, Computer, CVEReference;
// Combine all methods
union CVE_URL_Hits, CVE_String_Hits, Forti_Sequence
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIP contains '{IPFilter}'
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or SourceUserName contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{DeviceFilter}') or Computer contains '{DeviceFilter}'
| extend SignalCategory = tostring(split(SignalStrength, " — ")[0])  // extracts "High"/"Medium"
| summarize
     Count          = count(),
     AffectedDevices = dcount(Computer),
     UniqueSourceIPs = dcount(SourceIP)
   by CVEReference, SignalCategory
   | sort by Count desc
 | render barchart","size":0,"title":"CVE Exploitation on Network Appliance (by CVE Reference)","noDataMessage":"✅ No CVE-exploitation indicators on appliance traffic in this window.","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"chartSettings":{"xAxis":"CVEReference","yAxis":["Count"],"group":"SignalCategory","showDataLabels":true,"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"High","color":"red"},{"seriesName":"Medium","color":"orange"}]}},"customWidth":"50","name":"ia-q9-cve-exploitation","id":"3eeda97b-7f1e-4600-bc96-4d84bad5794a"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
// New table (ThreatIntelIndicators) uses STIX 2.1 schema:
//   ObservableKey = STIX property path (e.g. "ipv4-addr:value", "network-traffic:src_ref.value")
//   ObservableValue = the actual IP string
// ThreatIntelligenceIndicator is deprecated — stopped ingesting data July 31 2025
let TIIPs =
    ThreatIntelIndicators
    | where IsActive == true
    | where IsDeleted == false
    | where ValidUntil > now()
    | where Confidence >= 50 or isnull(Confidence) or Confidence == 0
    | where ObservableKey in ("ipv4-addr:value", "network-traffic:src_ref.value", "network-traffic:dst_ref.value")
    | where isnotempty(ObservableValue)
    | summarize
        MaxConfidence = max(Confidence),
        Tags          = take_any(Tags)
      by TI_IP = ObservableValue;
// 3P appliance vendors in scope for hybrid attack scenario
let ApplianceVendors = dynamic([
    "Fortinet", "Palo Alto Networks", "Ivanti", "Pulse Secure",
    "SonicWall", "Cisco", "Check Point", "Juniper", "F5", "Citrix"]);
// Direction 1: Inbound — attacker-controlled IP connecting to/through appliance
// Maps to S1 (portal compromise) and S3 (VPN login from attacker IP)
let InboundTIHits =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    | where isnotempty(SourceIP)
    | where SourceIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    | join kind=inner TIIPs on $left.SourceIP == $right.TI_IP
    | project
        EventTime           = TimeGenerated,
        Direction           = "Inbound — attacker to appliance",
        TI_IP               = SourceIP,
        CounterpartIP       = DestinationIP,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        Activity,
        DeviceAction,
        SourceUserName,
        DestinationUserName,
        SourcePort,
        DestinationPort,
        ApplicationProtocol,
        Message,
        Computer,
        MaxConfidence,
        Tags,
        ActionTaken = iff(DeviceAction =~ "Block", "Blocked ✓", "⚠️ Allowed");
// Direction 2: Outbound — appliance beaconing to TI-matched C2 destination
// Maps to S5 (implant deployed, maintains C2 channel)
let OutboundTIHits =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    | where isnotempty(DestinationIP)
    | where DestinationIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    | join kind=inner TIIPs on $left.DestinationIP == $right.TI_IP
    | project
        EventTime           = TimeGenerated,
        Direction           = "Outbound — appliance to C2",
        TI_IP               = DestinationIP,
        CounterpartIP       = SourceIP,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        Activity,
        DeviceAction,
        SourceUserName,
        DestinationUserName,
        SourcePort,
        DestinationPort,
        ApplicationProtocol,
        Message,
        Computer,
        MaxConfidence,
        Tags,
        ActionTaken = iff(DeviceAction =~ "Block", "Blocked ✓", "⚠️ Allowed");
// Combine both directions
union InboundTIHits, OutboundTIHits
| extend SignalStrength = case(
     Direction startswith "Outbound" and ActionTaken == "⚠️ Allowed" and MaxConfidence >= 75,
         "High — active C2 callback, NOT blocked",
     Direction startswith "Outbound" and ActionTaken == "Blocked ✓"  and MaxConfidence >= 75,
         "High — C2 attempt blocked",
     Direction startswith "Inbound"  and ActionTaken == "⚠️ Allowed" and MaxConfidence >= 75,
         "High — known attacker IP, allowed through",
     Direction startswith "Inbound"  and ActionTaken == "Blocked ✓",
         "Medium — known attacker IP, blocked",
     MaxConfidence >= 50,                                     
     "Medium — TI match, medium confidence",
     "Low — review TI source quality")
| extend Severity = tostring(split(SignalStrength, " ")[0])
| extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", TI_IP, "/overview")
// Keep first and last event, plus count
 | summarize
     FirstSeen    = min(EventTime),
     LastSeen     = max(EventTime),
     HitCount     = count(),
     Actions      = make_set(DeviceAction),
     arg_max(EventTime, *)  // keep latest row's other columns
   by TI_IP, Direction, DeviceVendor, Computer
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or TI_IP contains '{IPFilter}'
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or SourceUserName contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{DeviceFilter}') or Computer contains '{DeviceFilter}'
| project-reorder SignalStrength, Severity, Direction, ActionTaken, TI_IP, XDRIPUrl,
     MaxConfidence, Tags, DeviceVendor, DeviceProduct, CounterpartIP,
     SourceUserName, DestinationUserName, ApplicationProtocol,
     Computer, Activity, Message, EventTime
| sort by MaxConfidence desc, EventTime desc

let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
// Parent processes commonly associated with web-facing services.
let WebServiceParents = dynamic([
  "w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "apache2", "tomcat9.exe",
  "java.exe", "java", "node.exe", "dotnet.exe", "php-cgi.exe", "php.exe"
]);
// Child processes and utilities frequently seen in post-exploitation chains.
let RareChildProcesses = dynamic([
  "cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe", "sh", "bash", "curl", "wget",
  "certutil.exe", "bitsadmin.exe", "mshta.exe", "rundll32.exe", "python.exe", "python3"
]);
// Command-line indicators that suggest staging, download, or shell launch behavior.
let EgressIndicators = dynamic(["http://", "https://", "-enc", "/c ", "/bin/sh", "wget ", "curl "]);
// Find suspicious child process executions launched by web-service parents.
let RareChildren =
  _Im_ProcessEvent(starttime=StartTime,endtime=EndTime)
  | where EventType =~ "ProcessCreated"
  | extend ParentProcess = tolower(coalesce(ActingProcessFilename, ActingProcessFileOriginalName)),
           ChildProcess = tolower(coalesce(TargetProcessFilename, TargetProcessFileOriginalName)),
           ChildCommandLine = coalesce(TargetProcessCommandLine, "")
  | where ParentProcess in~ (WebServiceParents)
  | where ChildProcess in~ (RareChildProcesses)
    or ChildCommandLine has_any (EgressIndicators)
  | project ProcessTime = TimeGenerated,
            DeviceId = tostring(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
            DeviceName = coalesce(DvcHostname, DvcFQDN),
            InitiatingProcessFileName = ParentProcess,
            InitiatingProcessCommandLine = tostring(ActingProcessCommandLine),
            FileName = ChildProcess,
            ProcessCommandLine = ChildCommandLine;
// Capture successful outbound connections to public (non-private) IP space.
let OutboundConnections =
  _Im_NetworkSession(starttime=StartTime,endtime=EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(DstIpAddr)
  | where not(
     ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "10.0.0.0/8")
     or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "172.16.0.0/12")
     or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "192.168.0.0/16")
     or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "127.0.0.0/8")
     or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "169.254.0.0/16")
    )
  | where EventResult !~ "Failure"
  | project DeviceId = tostring(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
            RemoteIP = DstIpAddr,
            RemotePort = DstPortNumber,
            NetworkTime = TimeGenerated;
// Correlate suspicious child execution with near-term public egress on the same host.
RareChildren
| join kind=innerunique OutboundConnections on DeviceId
| where NetworkTime between (ProcessTime .. (ProcessTime + 5m))
| extend TimeGenerated = ProcessTime
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          FileName, ProcessCommandLine, RemoteIP, RemotePort
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or RemoteIP contains '{IPFilter}'
| where isempty('{DeviceFilter}') or DeviceName contains '{DeviceFilter}'
| summarize
     Count          = count(),
     UniqueChildren = dcount(FileName),
     UniqueRemoteIPs = dcount(RemoteIP)
   by DeviceName
| top 10 by Count desc

     or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "192.168.0.0/16")

  let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
  // Parent processes commonly associated with web or app services.
  let ServiceParents = dynamic([
    "w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "apache2", "tomcat9.exe", "tomcat",
    "java.exe", "java", "node.exe", "dotnet.exe", "php-cgi.exe", "php.exe"
  ]);
  // Child processes and utilities often used after code execution.
  let SuspiciousChildren = dynamic([
    "cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe", "sh", "bash", "curl", "wget",
    "certutil.exe", "bitsadmin.exe", "mshta.exe", "rundll32.exe", "python.exe", "python3"
  ]);
  // Command-line tokens that suggest staging, download, or shell execution.
  let StagingTokens = dynamic(["http://", "https://", " -enc ", " /c ", " /bin/sh", "wget ", "curl "]);
  // Suspicious execution chain: service parent spawning risky child process/command.
  let SuspiciousExec =
    _Im_ProcessEvent(starttime=StartTime,endtime=EndTime)
        | where EventType =~ "ProcessCreated"
    | extend ParentProcess = tolower(coalesce(ActingProcessFilename, ActingProcessFileOriginalName)),
             ChildProcess = tolower(coalesce(TargetProcessFilename, TargetProcessFileOriginalName)),
            ChildCommandLine = coalesce(TargetProcessCommandLine, "")
    | where ParentProcess in~ (ServiceParents)
    | where ChildProcess in~ (SuspiciousChildren) or ChildCommandLine has_any (StagingTokens)
    | project ExecTime = TimeGenerated,
              DeviceId = tostring(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
              DeviceName = coalesce(DvcHostname, DvcFQDN),
              FileName = ChildProcess,
              ProcessCommandLine = ChildCommandLine,
              InitiatingProcessFileName = ParentProcess,
              InitiatingProcessCommandLine = tostring(ActingProcessCommandLine);
  // Access to Azure IMDS endpoint, commonly used to request managed identity tokens.
  let ImdsAccess =
    _Im_NetworkSession(starttime=StartTime,endtime=EndTime)
    | where DstIpAddr == "169.254.169.254"
    | where EventResult !~ "Failure"
    | project DeviceId = tostring(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
              ImdsTime = TimeGenerated,
              ImdsRemotePort = DstPortNumber,
              ImdsRemoteUrl = tostring(EventReportUrl);
  // Optional confidence booster: near-term outbound public egress from same host.
  let PublicEgress =
    _Im_NetworkSession(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
    | where isnotempty(DstIpAddr)
    | where not(
        ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "10.0.0.0/8")
        or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "172.16.0.0/12")
        or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "192.168.0.0/16")
        or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "127.0.0.0/8")
        or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "169.254.0.0/16")
      )
    | where EventResult !~ "Failure"
    | project DeviceId = tostring(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
              EgressTime = TimeGenerated,
              RemoteIP = DstIpAddr,
              RemotePort = DstPortNumber,
              RemoteUrl = tostring(EventReportUrl);
  // Correlate suspicious process execution to IMDS access in a short time window.
  SuspiciousExec
  | join kind=innerunique ImdsAccess on DeviceId
  | where ImdsTime between (ExecTime .. (ExecTime + 10m))
  // Attach optional public egress shortly after execution.
  | join kind=leftouter PublicEgress on DeviceId
  | where isempty(EgressTime) or EgressTime between (ExecTime .. (ExecTime + 15m))
  // Escalate confidence if both IMDS and public egress are observed.
  | extend Confidence = iff(isempty(EgressTime), "High", "Critical")
  | extend TimeGenerated = ExecTime
  | project TimeGenerated, Confidence, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
            FileName, ProcessCommandLine, ImdsTime, ImdsRemotePort, ImdsRemoteUrl, EgressTime, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or RemoteIP contains '{IPFilter}'
  | where isempty('{DeviceFilter}') or DeviceName contains '{DeviceFilter}'
  | project-reorder Confidence, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemotePort, ImdsTime, ImdsRemotePort, EgressTime, TimeGenerated
  | order by Confidence asc, TimeGenerated desc
  | limit 25","size":0,"title":"Azure VM web process to IMDS token theft chain","noDataMessage":"✅ No IMDS token-theft chains in this window.","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Confidence","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Critical","representation":"redBright","text":"🚨 {0}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"orange","text":"⚠️ {0}"},{"operator":"Default","representation":"green","text":"{0}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"ImdsTime","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"EgressTime","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"labelSettings":[{"columnId":"Confidence","label":"Confidence"},{"columnId":"InitiatingProcessFileName","label":"Web Parent Process"},{"columnId":"InitiatingProcessCommandLine","label":"Parent Cmdline"},{"columnId":"FileName","label":"Child Process"},{"columnId":"ProcessCommandLine","label":"Child Cmdline"},{"columnId":"DeviceName","label":"Azure VM"},{"columnId":"RemoteIP","label":"Egress IP"},{"columnId":"RemotePort","label":"Egress Port"},{"columnId":"ImdsTime","label":"IMDS Access Time"},{"columnId":"ImdsRemotePort","label":"IMDS Port"},{"columnId":"EgressTime","label":"Egress Time"},{"columnId":"TimeGenerated","label":"Exec Time"}]}},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"UserFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"customWidth":"50","name":"ia-r2-imds-token-theft","id":"e3e43e84-c7d7-4488-9d47-162e76d2c48f"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = StartTime;
let SensitiveWriteOps = dynamic([
  "clusterrolebindings/create", "clusterrolebindings/patch", "clusterrolebindings/update",
  "rolebindings/create", "rolebindings/patch", "rolebindings/update",
  "daemonsets/create", "cronjobs/create",
  "deployments/create", "deployments/patch", "deployments/update",
  "statefulsets/create", "statefulsets/patch", "statefulsets/update"
]);
let BaselineCallers =
  AzureDiagnostics
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | where Category =~ "kube-audit"
  | where OperationName has_any (SensitiveWriteOps)
  | where isnotempty(Caller_s)
  | summarize by CallerNorm = tolower(Caller_s);
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
| where Category =~ "kube-audit"
| where OperationName has_any (SensitiveWriteOps)
| where isnotempty(Caller_s)
| extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller_s)
| join kind=leftanti BaselineCallers on CallerNorm
| extend Severity = case(
     OperationName has_any ("clusterrolebindings", "rolebindings"),
         "Critical — RBAC privilege escalation",
     OperationName has_any ("daemonsets", "cronjobs"),
         "High — workload persistence (every node / scheduled)",
     "High — first-seen control plane write")
| extend SeverityLevel = tostring(split(Severity, " ")[0])
| extend ResourcePortalUrl = strcat("https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource", ResourceId, "/overview")
| project TimeGenerated, SeverityLevel, Severity, Caller = CallerNorm, OperationName, Resource, ResourceId,ResourceGroup, ResourcePortalUrl, Category
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Caller contains '{UserFilter}'
| sort by Severity asc, TimeGenerated desc
| limit 25","size":0,"title":"Kubernetes First-Seen Control-Plane Writer","noDataMessage":"✅ No first-seen K8s control-plane writers in this window.","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"SeverityLevel","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Critical","representation":"redBright","text":"🚨 {0}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"orange","text":"⚠️ {0}"},{"operator":"Default","representation":"green","text":"{0}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"ResourcePortalUrl","formatter":7,"formatOptions":{"linkTarget":"Url","linkLabel":"🔗 View Resource"}},{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"labelSettings":[{"columnId":"SeverityLevel","label":"Severity"},{"columnId":"Severity","label":"Severity Detail"},{"columnId":"Caller","label":"Caller (Principal)"},{"columnId":"OperationName","label":"Operation"},{"columnId":"Resource","label":"Resource"},{"columnId":"ResourceId","label":"Resource ID"},{"columnId":"ResourcePortalUrl","label":"Portal"},{"columnId":"Category","label":"Log Category"},{"columnId":"TimeGenerated","label":"Write Time"}]}},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"IPFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""},{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"customWidth":"50","name":"ia-r3-k8s-controlplane","id":"44eaf230-716a-40af-8a42-2a68ae516797"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"isInitialAccessVisible","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"true"},"name":"section-2-InitialAccess","id":"257eadeb-29b1-4357-b57a-474a4c4742f3"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🟠 Lateral Movement
On-prem ↔ cloud identity pivoting: Kerberoast bursts preceding cloud sign-in, AAD Connect/sync-host remote admin into Entra privilege operations, RDP to hybrid-joined devices then Entra access, cloud sign-in to on-prem RDP/remote-exec, and WMI/PsExec on hybrid devices then cloud sign-in.

**MITRE:** T1558.003 · T1021.001 · T1047 · T1569.002 · T1098 · T1078.004  
**Key tables:** IdentityInfo · DeviceInfo · _Im_Authentication · _Im_ProcessEvent · _Im_AuditEvent"},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"name":"section-3-text","id":"f6e10a1d-e1bd-4e01-8b06-f770cd357fd8"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
  let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
  let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
// Build latest hybrid identity keys for reliable cross-source correlation.
let HybridUsersRaw =
  IdentityInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | extend _OnPremDN = column_ifexists("OnPremisesDistinguishedName", column_ifexists("DistinguishedName", ""))
  | where isnotempty(_OnPremDN) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId)
  | project TimeGenerated, AccountObjectId, AccountUPN, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUPN),
           SamKey = tolower(strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName)),
           NameKey = tolower(AccountName);
// Normalize multiple account key formats into one joinable user key.
let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(NameKey) | project UserKey = NameKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId);
// Detect potential Kerberoast behavior as a burst of Kerberos service ticket-like auth events.
  let KerberoastBurst =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where EventID == 4769
    // Extract TicketEncryptionType from EventData XML
    | extend TicketEncryptionType = tolower(tostring(extract(@'<Data Name="TicketEncryptionType">([^<]+)</Data>', 1, tostring(column_ifexists("EventData", "")))))
    | where TicketEncryptionType has_any ("0x17", "17")
    | extend Requestor = tolower(tostring(coalesce(Account, TargetUserName))),
             Service = tolower(tostring(ServiceName)),
             ClientIP = tostring(IpAddress)
    | where isnotempty(Requestor) and isnotempty(Service)
    | where Requestor !endswith "$" and Service !endswith "$"
    | summarize FirstKerberoast = min(TimeGenerated),
                LastKerberoast = max(TimeGenerated),
                DistinctServices = dcount(Service),
                KerberoastEvents = count(),
                ServiceSet = make_set(Service, 25),
                SourceIPs = make_set(ClientIP, 10)
      by Requestor
    | where DistinctServices >= 8;
// Collect successful cloud sign-ins for the same identities.
let CloudUserSignins =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where EventProduct =~ "Microsoft Entra ID"
  | where LogonProtocol has_any ("OAuth", "OpenID", "SAML")
      or LogonMethod in~ ("Service Principal", "Managed Identity", "Username & Password", "Multi factor authentication", "Passwordless", "PKI")
  | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           CloudIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           AppName = tostring(TargetAppName),
           ClientApp = tostring(ActingAppName)
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserKey, CloudIP, AppName, ClientApp, CorrelationId = EventOriginalUid;
// Correlate on-prem Kerberoast burst to near-term cloud sign-in activity.
KerberoastBurst
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on $left.Requestor == $right.UserKey
| join kind=inner CloudUserSignins on UserKey
| where SigninTime between (LastKerberoast .. (LastKerberoast + 6h))
| summarize FirstCloudSignin = min(SigninTime),
            LastCloudSignin = max(SigninTime),
            CloudSigninCount = count(),
            DistinctCloudIPs = dcount(CloudIP),
            CloudIPs = make_set(CloudIP, 15),
            Apps = make_set(AppName, 10),
            ClientApps = make_set(ClientApp, 10),
            CorrelationIds = make_set(CorrelationId, 10),
            ServiceSet = take_any(ServiceSet),
            SourceIPs = take_any(SourceIPs)
  by FirstKerberoast, LastKerberoast, KerberoastEvents, DistinctServices,
     HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius,
     AccountObjectId
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstKerberoast
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or HybridUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or tostring(SourceIPs) contains '{IPFilter}'
| summarize Count=count() by BlastRadius
| render barchart","size":0,"title":"Kerberoast burst followed by cloud sign-in","noDataMessage":"✅ No kerberoast → cloud sign-in chains in this window.","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"barchart","chartSettings":{"xAxis":"BlastRadius","yAxis":["Count"],"showDataLabels":true}},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"customWidth":"50","name":"lm-l1-kerberoast-cloud-signin","id":"55abdc70-340a-4d0c-80e0-1ea1b302d462"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};

  let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
  let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
// Build latest hybrid identity keys for reliable cross-source correlation.
let HybridUsersRaw =

  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUPN),

// Normalize multiple account key formats into one joinable user key.
let HybridUsers =

    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId),

// Detect potential Kerberoast behavior as a burst of Kerberos service ticket-like auth events.
  let KerberoastBurst =

    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where EventID == 4769
    // Extract TicketEncryptionType from EventData XML
    | extend TicketEncryptionType = tolower(tostring(extract(@'<Data Name="TicketEncryptionType">([^<]+)</Data>', 1, tostring(column_ifexists("EventData", "")))))
    | where TicketEncryptionType has_any ("0x17", "17")
    | extend Requestor = tolower(tostring(coalesce(Account, TargetUserName))),
             Service = tolower(tostring(ServiceName)),
             ClientIP = tostring(IpAddress)
    | where isnotempty(Requestor) and isnotempty(Service)
    | where Requestor !endswith "$" and Service !endswith "$"
    | summarize FirstKerberoast = min(TimeGenerated),
                LastKerberoast = max(TimeGenerated),
                DistinctServices = dcount(Service),
                KerberoastEvents = count(),
                ServiceSet = make_set(Service, 25),
                SourceIPs = make_set(ClientIP, 10)
      by Requestor
    | where DistinctServices >= 8;
// Collect successful cloud sign-ins for the same identities.
let CloudUserSignins =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
    | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
    | where EventProduct =~ "Microsoft Entra ID"
    | where LogonProtocol has_any ("OAuth", "OpenID", "SAML")
      or LogonMethod in~ ("Service Principal", "Managed Identity", "Username & Password", "Multi factor authentication", "Passwordless", "PKI")
    | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
             CloudIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
             AppName = tostring(TargetAppName),
             ClientApp = tostring(ActingAppName)
    | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserKey, CloudIP, AppName, ClientApp, CorrelationId = EventOriginalUid;
// Correlate on-prem Kerberoast burst to near-term cloud sign-in activity.
KerberoastBurst
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on $left.Requestor == $right.UserKey
| join kind=inner CloudUserSignins on UserKey
| where SigninTime between (LastKerberoast .. (LastKerberoast + 6h))
| summarize FirstCloudSignin = min(SigninTime),
            LastCloudSignin = max(SigninTime),
            CloudSigninCount = count(),
            DistinctCloudIPs = dcount(CloudIP),
            CloudIPs = make_set(CloudIP, 15),
            Apps = make_set(AppName, 10),
            ClientApps = make_set(ClientApp, 10),
            CorrelationIds = make_set(CorrelationId, 10),
            ServiceSet = take_any(ServiceSet),
            SourceIPs = take_any(SourceIPs)
  by FirstKerberoast, LastKerberoast, KerberoastEvents, DistinctServices,
     HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius,
     AccountObjectId
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstKerberoast
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or HybridUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or tostring(SourceIPs) contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| limit 25","size":0,"title":"Kerberoast burst followed by cloud sign-in - Detailed","noDataMessage":"✅ No kerberoast → cloud sign-in chains in this window.","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"BlastRadius","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"redBright","text":"🚨 IPs"},{"columnId":"Apps","label":"Apps"}]}},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"customWidth":"50","name":"lm-l1-kerberoast-cloud-signin-detail","id":"3e1b8413-a0ca-42cb-afc5-b17f74219dbb"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
// Process and operation lists used to detect sync-host admin and privileged cloud ops.
let SyncProcesses = dynamic(["miiserver.exe", "azureadconnectwizard.exe", "azureadconnect.exe", "directorysyncclientcmd.exe", "aadconnectprovisioningagent.exe", "azureadconnecthealthsyncmonitor.exe"]);
let RemoteParents = dynamic(["wmiprvse.exe", "wsmprovhost.exe", "psexesvc.exe", "winrs.exe"]);
let PrivilegedOps = dynamic(["Add member to role", "Add app role assignment to service principal", "Add service principal credentials", "Update application", "Update service principal", "Certificates and secrets management", "Add owner", "Add member to group", "Consent to application"]);
// Build latest hybrid identity keys for correlation.
let HybridUsersRaw =
  IdentityInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | extend _OnPremDN = column_ifexists("OnPremisesDistinguishedName", column_ifexists("DistinguishedName", ""))
  | where isnotempty(_OnPremDN) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId)
  | project TimeGenerated, AccountObjectId, AccountUPN, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUPN),
           SamKey = tolower(strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName)),
           NameKey = tolower(AccountName);
// Normalize key variants into one join key.
let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(NameKey) | project UserKey = NameKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius);
// Identify likely Entra Connect/sync hosts from process telemetry.
  let SyncHosts =
    _Im_ProcessEvent(starttime=BaselineStart, endtime=BaselineEnd)
    | where EventType =~ "ProcessCreated"
    | extend ProcessName = tolower(coalesce(TargetProcessFilename, TargetProcessFileOriginalName)),
             ParentProcess = tolower(coalesce(ActingProcessFilename, ActingProcessFileOriginalName)),
             DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname))
    | where ProcessName in~ (SyncProcesses) or ParentProcess in~ (SyncProcesses)
    | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, DvcHostname) by DeviceJoinKey
    | project DeviceJoinKey, SyncHostName = DvcHostname;
// Collect remote administration activity (RDP and remote execution).
let RemoteAdmin =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (
      _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime,endtime=EndTime)
      | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
      | where EventSubType =~ "RemoteInteractive"
      | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
               DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(TargetDvcId, DvcId, TargetFQDN, DvcHostname)),
               SourceIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
               ActivityType = "RDP"
      | where isnotempty(UserKey)
      | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
      | project ActivityTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP, ActivityType, Evidence = tostring(coalesce(EventSubType, LogonMethod, LogonProtocol))
    ),
    (
      _Im_ProcessEvent(starttime=StartTime,endtime=EndTime)
      | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
      | extend ParentProcess = tolower(coalesce(ActingProcessName, ActingProcessFilename, ActingProcessFileOriginalName)),
               ParentOriginal = tolower(ActingProcessFileOriginalName),
               ChildCommandLine = tostring(TargetProcessCommandLine),
               UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
               DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
               SourceIP = tostring(DvcIpAddr),
               ActivityType = "RemoteExec"
      | where ParentProcess in~ (RemoteParents) or ParentOriginal in~ (RemoteParents)
      | where isnotempty(UserKey)
      | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
      | project ActivityTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP, ActivityType, Evidence = ChildCommandLine
    );
// Gather high-risk Entra audit activity performed by identities.
let EntraPrivOps =
  _Im_AuditEvent(starttime=StartTime,endtime=EndTime)
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. (EndTime + 1d))
  | extend ActorKey = tolower(ActorUsername),
           ActorIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           OperationText = strcat(tostring(EventType), " ", tostring(EventMessage), " ", tostring(TargetAppName))
  | where isnotempty(ActorKey)
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where OperationText has_any (PrivilegedOps)
  | project AuditTime = TimeGenerated, ActorKey, ActorIP, OperationText;
// Correlate sync-host remote admin to near-term privileged Entra operations.
RemoteAdmin
| join kind=inner SyncHosts on DeviceJoinKey
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on UserKey
| join kind=inner EntraPrivOps on $left.UserKey == $right.ActorKey
| where AuditTime between (ActivityTime .. (ActivityTime + 4h))
| summarize FirstPrivilegedOp = min(AuditTime),
            LastPrivilegedOp = max(AuditTime),
            PrivilegedOpCount = count(),
            ActorIPs = make_set(ActorIP, 10),
            Operations = make_set(OperationText, 15)
  by ActivityTime, SyncHostName, ActivityType, SourceIP,
     HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius, Evidence
| extend Confidence = iff(BlastRadius == "High", "High", "Medium")
| extend TimeGenerated = ActivityTime
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or HybridUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIP contains '{IPFilter}'
| where isempty('{DeviceFilter}') or SyncHostName contains '{DeviceFilter}'
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| project-away ActivityTime

StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
let HybridUsersRaw =
  IdentityInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | extend _OnPremDN = column_ifexists("OnPremisesDistinguishedName", column_ifexists("DistinguishedName", ""))
  | where isnotempty(_OnPremDN) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId)
  | project TimeGenerated, AccountObjectId, AccountUPN, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUPN),
           SamKey = tolower(strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName)),
           NameKey = tolower(AccountName);
let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(NameKey) | project UserKey = NameKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius);
let HybridDevicesRaw =
  DeviceInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | project TimeGenerated, DeviceId, DeviceName, JoinType, AadDeviceId, IsAzureADJoined
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
  | where IsAzureADJoined == true or tostring(JoinType) has_any ("Hybrid", "Azure AD", "Entra")
  | project DeviceId, HybridDeviceName = DeviceName, JoinType, AadDeviceId, IsAzureADJoined;
let HybridDevices =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridDevicesRaw | where isnotempty(DeviceId) | project DeviceJoinKey = tolower(DeviceId), HybridDeviceName, JoinType, AadDeviceId, IsAzureADJoined),
    (HybridDevicesRaw | where isnotempty(HybridDeviceName) | project DeviceJoinKey = tolower(HybridDeviceName), HybridDeviceName, JoinType, AadDeviceId, IsAzureADJoined);
let RdpSessions =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where EventSubType =~ "RemoteInteractive"
  | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(TargetDvcId, DvcId, TargetFQDN, DvcHostname)),
           SourceIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           InitiatorUPN = tostring(ActorUsername)
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
  | project RdpTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP, IsLocalAdmin = false, InitiatorUPN;
let CloudUserSignins =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where ActorScope has "Azure" or TargetUserScope has "Azure" or EventProduct has_any ("Azure AD", "Entra", "AAD")
  | where EventSubType has_any ("Service", "RemoteService", "AssumeRole")
    or LogonMethod has_any ("OAuth", "Token", "NonInteractive")
    or LogonProtocol has_any ("OAuth", "OpenID", "SAML")
  | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           CloudIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           AppName = tostring(TargetAppName),
           ClientApp = tostring(ActingAppName)
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserKey, CloudIP, AppName, ClientApp, ConditionalAccessStatus = "", CorrelationId = EventOriginalUid;
RdpSessions
| join kind=inner HybridDevices on DeviceJoinKey
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on UserKey
| join kind=inner CloudUserSignins on UserKey
| where SigninTime between (RdpTime .. (RdpTime + 2h))
| summarize FirstCloudSignin = min(SigninTime),
            LastCloudSignin = max(SigninTime),
            CloudSigninCount = count(),
            Apps = make_set(AppName, 10),
            ClientApps = make_set(ClientApp, 10),
            CloudIPs = make_set(CloudIP, 10),
            CorrelationIds = make_set(CorrelationId, 10)
  by RdpTime, HybridDeviceName, JoinType, SourceIP, IsLocalAdmin,
     HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius, InitiatorUPN
| extend Confidence = iff(IsLocalAdmin == true or BlastRadius == "High", "High", "Medium")
| extend TimeGenerated = RdpTime
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or HybridUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{DeviceFilter}') or HybridDeviceName contains '{DeviceFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIP contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| project-away RdpTime, IsLocalAdmin

StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
// Parent/child process lists used to identify remote execution behavior.
let RemoteParents = dynamic(["wmiprvse.exe", "wsmprovhost.exe", "psexesvc.exe", "winrs.exe"]);
let SuspiciousChildren = dynamic(["cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe", "net.exe", "net1.exe", "whoami.exe", "nltest.exe", "reg.exe", "certutil.exe", "rundll32.exe", "mshta.exe"]);
// Build latest hybrid identity keys to unify cloud and endpoint telemetry.
let HybridUsersRaw =
  IdentityInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | extend _OnPremDN = column_ifexists("OnPremisesDistinguishedName", column_ifexists("DistinguishedName", ""))
  | where isnotempty(_OnPremDN) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId)
  | project TimeGenerated, AccountObjectId, AccountUPN, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUPN),
           SamKey = tolower(strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName)),
           NameKey = tolower(AccountName);
// Normalize user key variants into one joinable identity key.
let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(NameKey) | project UserKey = NameKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius);
// Keep latest hybrid or Entra-joined devices as on-prem movement targets.
let HybridDevicesRaw =
  DeviceInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | project TimeGenerated, DeviceId, DeviceName, JoinType, IsAzureADJoined
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
  | where IsAzureADJoined == true or tostring(JoinType) has_any ("Hybrid", "Azure AD", "Entra")
  | project DeviceId, HybridDeviceName = DeviceName, JoinType;
let HybridDevices =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridDevicesRaw | where isnotempty(DeviceId) | project DeviceJoinKey = tolower(DeviceId), HybridDeviceName, JoinType),
    (HybridDevicesRaw | where isnotempty(HybridDeviceName) | project DeviceJoinKey = tolower(HybridDeviceName), HybridDeviceName, JoinType);
// Capture successful cloud sign-ins by hybrid identities.
let CloudUserSignins =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where ActorScope has "Azure" or TargetUserScope has "Azure" or EventProduct has_any ("Azure AD", "Entra", "AAD")
  | where EventSubType has_any ("Service", "RemoteService", "AssumeRole")
    or LogonMethod has_any ("OAuth", "Token", "NonInteractive")
    or LogonProtocol has_any ("OAuth", "OpenID", "SAML")
  | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           CloudIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           AppName = tostring(TargetAppName),
           ClientApp = tostring(ActingAppName)
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserKey, CloudIP, AppName, ClientApp, CorrelationId = EventOriginalUid;
// Capture on-prem lateral movement candidates (RDP and remote execution).
let OnPremMovement =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (
      _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
      | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
      | where EventSubType =~ "RemoteInteractive"
      | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
               DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(TargetDvcId, DvcId, TargetFQDN, DvcHostname)),
               SourceIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
               Evidence = tostring(coalesce(EventSubType, LogonMethod, LogonProtocol)),
               MovementType = "RDP"
      | where isnotempty(UserKey)
      | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
      | project MovementTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP, MovementType, Evidence
    ),
    (
      _Im_ProcessEvent(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
      | where EventType =~ "ProcessCreated"
      | extend ChildProcess = tolower(coalesce(TargetProcessFilename, TargetProcessFileOriginalName)),
                 ChildCommandLine = tostring(TargetProcessCommandLine)
      | extend ParentProcess = tolower(coalesce(ActingProcessName, ActingProcessFilename, ActingProcessFileOriginalName)),
               ParentOriginal = tolower(ActingProcessFileOriginalName),
               UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
               DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
               SourceIP = tostring(coalesce(tostring(AdditionalFields["RemoteIP"]), DvcIpAddr)),
               Evidence = strcat(ChildProcess, " ", ChildCommandLine),
               MovementType = "RemoteExec"
      | where ParentProcess in~ (RemoteParents) or ParentOriginal in~ (RemoteParents)
      | where ChildProcess in~ (SuspiciousChildren)
          or ChildCommandLine has_any (" -enc ", " /node:", " -computername ", "invoke-command", "win32_process", "create ")
      | where isnotempty(UserKey)
      | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
      | project MovementTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP, MovementType, Evidence
    );
// Correlate cloud sign-in to near-term on-prem movement by the same identity.
CloudUserSignins
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on UserKey
| join kind=inner OnPremMovement on UserKey
| join kind=inner HybridDevices on DeviceJoinKey
| where MovementTime between (SigninTime .. (SigninTime + 4h))
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or HybridUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{DeviceFilter}') or HybridDeviceName contains '{DeviceFilter}'
| summarize FirstMovement = min(MovementTime),
            LastMovement = max(MovementTime),
            MovementCount = count(),
            Devices = make_set(HybridDeviceName, 10),
            SourceIPs = make_set(SourceIP, 10),
            EvidenceSet = make_set(Evidence, 15),
            Apps = make_set(AppName, 10),
            ClientApps = make_set(ClientApp, 10)
  by SigninTime, CloudIP, HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius, MovementType
| extend Confidence = iff(BlastRadius == "High" or MovementCount >= 2, "High", "Medium")
| extend TimeGenerated = SigninTime
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or tostring(SourceIPs) contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| project-away SigninTime
| limit 25","size":0,"title":"Entra hybrid user sign-in followed by on-prem lateral
