StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
let RemoteParents = dynamic(["wmiprvse.exe", "wsmprovhost.exe", "psexesvc.exe", "winrs.exe"]);
let SuspiciousChildren = dynamic(["cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe", "net.exe", "net1.exe", "whoami.exe", "nltest.exe", "reg.exe", "certutil.exe", "rundll32.exe", "mshta.exe"]);
let HybridUsersRaw =
  IdentityInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | extend _OnPremDN = column_ifexists("OnPremisesDistinguishedName", column_ifexists("DistinguishedName", ""))
  | where  isnotempty(_OnPremDN) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId)
  | project TimeGenerated, AccountObjectId, AccountUPN, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUPN),
           SamKey = tolower(strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName)),
           NameKey = tolower(AccountName);
let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(NameKey) | project UserKey = NameKey, HybridUPN = AccountUPN, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius);
let HybridDevicesRaw =
  DeviceInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | project TimeGenerated, DeviceId, DeviceName, JoinType, IsAzureADJoined
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
  | where IsAzureADJoined == true or tostring(JoinType) has_any ("Hybrid", "Azure AD", "Entra")
  | project DeviceId, HybridDeviceName = DeviceName, JoinType;
let HybridDevices =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridDevicesRaw | where isnotempty(DeviceId) | project DeviceJoinKey = tolower(DeviceId), HybridDeviceName, JoinType),
    (HybridDevicesRaw | where isnotempty(HybridDeviceName) | project DeviceJoinKey = tolower(HybridDeviceName), HybridDeviceName, JoinType);
let RemoteExec =
  _Im_ProcessEvent(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
  | where EventType =~ "ProcessCreated"
  | extend ParentProcess = tolower(coalesce(ActingProcessName, ActingProcessFilename, ActingProcessFileOriginalName)),
           ParentOriginal = tolower(ActingProcessFileOriginalName),
           ChildProcess = tolower(TargetProcessName),
           ChildCommandLine = tostring(TargetProcessCommandLine),
           UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           DeviceJoinKey = tolower(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
           SourceIP =  DvcIpAddr
  | where ParentProcess in~ (RemoteParents) or ParentOriginal in~ (RemoteParents)
  | where ChildProcess in~ (SuspiciousChildren)
      or ChildCommandLine has_any (" -enc ", "sekurlsa", "lsass", " /node:", " -computername ", "invoke-command", "win32_process", "create ")
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | where isnotempty(DeviceJoinKey)
  | project ExecTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceJoinKey, UserKey, SourceIP,
            ParentProcess, ChildProcess, ChildCommandLine;
let CloudUserSignins =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where ActorScope has "Azure" or TargetUserScope has "Azure" or EventProduct has_any ("Azure AD", "Entra", "AAD")
  | where EventSubType has_any ("Service", "RemoteService", "AssumeRole")
    or LogonMethod has_any ("OAuth", "Token", "NonInteractive")
    or LogonProtocol has_any ("OAuth", "OpenID", "SAML")
  | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           CloudIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           AppName = tostring(TargetAppName)
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserKey, CloudIP, AppName, CorrelationId = EventOriginalUid;
RemoteExec
| join kind=inner HybridDevices on DeviceJoinKey
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on UserKey
| join kind=inner CloudUserSignins on UserKey
| where SigninTime between (ExecTime .. (ExecTime + 2h))
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or HybridUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{DeviceFilter}') or HybridDeviceName contains '{DeviceFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIP contains '{IPFilter}'
| summarize FirstCloudSignin = min(SigninTime),
            LastCloudSignin = max(SigninTime),
            CloudSigninCount = count(),
            Apps = make_set(AppName, 10),
            CloudIPs = make_set(CloudIP, 10),
            CorrelationIds = make_set(CorrelationId, 10)
  by ExecTime, HybridDeviceName, JoinType, SourceIP, ParentProcess,
     ChildProcess, ChildCommandLine, HybridUPN, HybridSam,
     BlastRadius
| extend Confidence = iff(BlastRadius == "High", "High", "Medium")
| extend TimeGenerated = ExecTime
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| project-away ExecTime

🟡 Persistence
MFA methods registered on risky accounts, secrets added to dormant service principals, federation/identity-provider changes, app-credential changes preceding SP sign-in bursts, and Kubernetes daemonset/cronjob deployment by non-automation identities.

 let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
  let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
  let dormancyWindow = 14d;
  let CredentialAdditions = AuditLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationName == "Add service principal credentials"
  | where Result =~ "success"
  | extend TargetSPId      = tostring(TargetResources[0].id)
  | extend TargetSPName    = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
  | extend ActorUPN        = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
  | extend ActorUserId     = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
  | extend ActorAppName    = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
  | extend ActorAppId      = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.appId)
  | extend ActorIPAddress  = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress)
  | extend Actor           = iif(isnotempty(ActorUPN), ActorUPN, ActorAppName)
  | extend ActorType       = case(isnotempty(ActorUPN), "User", isnotempty(ActorAppName), "App", "Unknown")
  | where isnotempty(TargetSPId)
  | project CredentialAddTime = TimeGenerated, TargetSPId, TargetSPName,
            ActorUPN, ActorUserId, ActorAppName, ActorAppId, ActorIPAddress, Actor, ActorType;
  let TargetSPIds = CredentialAdditions | distinct TargetSPId;
  let SPSignIns = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - dormancyWindow) .. EndTime)
  | where ResultType == "0"
  | where ServicePrincipalId in (TargetSPIds)
  | project SignInTime = TimeGenerated, ServicePrincipalId, AppId;
  CredentialAdditions
  | join kind=leftouter (SPSignIns) on $left.TargetSPId == $right.ServicePrincipalId
  | summarize
      LastSignInBeforeAdd = maxif(SignInTime, SignInTime < CredentialAddTime),
      FirstSignInAfterAdd = minif(SignInTime, SignInTime >= CredentialAddTime),
      TargetSPName   = take_any(TargetSPName),
      ActorUPN       = take_any(ActorUPN),
      ActorUserId    = take_any(ActorUserId),
      ActorAppName   = take_any(ActorAppName),
      ActorAppId     = take_any(ActorAppId),
      ActorIPAddress = take_any(ActorIPAddress),
      Actor          = take_any(Actor),
      ActorType      = take_any(ActorType),
      SPAppId        = take_anyif(AppId, isnotempty(AppId))
    by TargetSPId, CredentialAddTime
  | where isnull(LastSignInBeforeAdd)
       or LastSignInBeforeAdd < (CredentialAddTime - dormancyWindow) 
  | where isnotnull(FirstSignInAfterAdd)
  | extend DormancyStatus = iif(isnull(LastSignInBeforeAdd),
      strcat("No sign-in in prior ", tostring(toint(dormancyWindow / 1d)), " days"),
      strcat(tostring(datetime_diff('day', CredentialAddTime, LastSignInBeforeAdd)), " days dormant"))
  | extend MinutesToActivation = datetime_diff('minute', FirstSignInAfterAdd, CredentialAddTime)
  | extend AnonymousActor = isempty(Actor)
  | extend EntraSPUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_IAM/ManagedAppMenuBlade/~/Overview/objectId/", TargetSPId, "/appId/", SPAppId)
  | extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", ActorIPAddress, "/overview")
  | project
      MinutesToActivation,
      AnonymousActor,
      ActorType,
      Actor,
      TargetSPName,
      EntraSPUrl,
      DormancyStatus,
      ActorIPAddress,
      XDRIPUrl,
      CredentialAddTime,
      FirstSignInAfterAdd
  | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Actor contains '{UserFilter}'
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or ActorIPAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
  | order by MinutesToActivation asc, CredentialAddTime desc
  | take 25","size":0,"title":"Secret Added to Dormant Service Principal","noDataMessage":"✅ No secrets added to dormant service principals in this  let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
  let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
  let FederationEvents = AuditLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationName in ("Set domain authentication","Set federation settings on domain")
  | where Result =~ "success"
  | extend ActorUPN=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),
          ActorIPAddress=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress),
          ActorId=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id),
          TargetDomain=tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName),
          TargetDomainId=tostring(TargetResources[0].id)
  | mv-expand Detail = AdditionalDetails
  | extend DetailKey=tostring(Detail.key), DetailValue=tostring(Detail.value)
  | summarize FederationTime=min(TimeGenerated),
              OperationNames=make_set(OperationName),
              ActorUPN=any(ActorUPN),
              ActorIPAddress=any(ActorIPAddress),
              ActorId=any(ActorId),
              UserAgent=anyif(DetailValue, DetailKey == "User-Agent"),
              EventCount=dcount(Id)
            by TargetDomain, TargetDomainId;
  let FederationActorIds = FederationEvents | where isnotempty(ActorId) | distinct ActorId;
  FederationEvents
  | join kind=leftouter (
      SigninLogs
      | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
      | where UserId in (FederationActorIds)
      | where RiskLevelAggregated in ("medium","high")
      | summarize MaxRiskLevel=max(RiskLevelAggregated),
                  LastRiskySignIn=max(TimeGenerated),
                  RiskySignInIP=any(IPAddress)
              by UserId
  ) on $left.ActorId == $right.UserId
  | extend IsPowerShell=UserAgent has_any ("PowerShell","python","curl","AADInternals")
  | extend IsAnonymousActor=isempty(ActorUPN)
  | extend SuspicionScore=toint(IsPowerShell)+toint(IsAnonymousActor)+toint(MaxRiskLevel in ("medium","high")), ActorRisk= MaxRiskLevel
  | extend
      EntraProfileUrl     = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_UsersAndTenants/UserProfileMenuBlade/~/overview/userId/", ActorId),
      XDRUserUrl          = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/users/", ActorId, "/overview"),
      XDRIPUrl            = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", ActorIPAddress, "/overview")
    | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or ActorUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or ActorIPAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
  | project SuspicionScore, FederationTime, TargetDomain,
      ActorUPN, ActorIPAddress,
      XDRIPUrl, ActorRisk, LastRiskySignIn, RiskySignInIP,
      IsPowerShell, IsAnonymousActor, UserAgent, OperationNames,
      EventCount
  | order by SuspicionScore desc, FederationTime desc
  | limit 25","size":0,"title":"Federated Identity Provider Added to Tenant","noDataMessage":"✅ No federation or domain authentication changes in this  let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
  let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
    let CredChanges =
    _Im_AuditEvent(starttime=StartTime, endtime=EndTime)
    | extend OperationText = tolower(tostring(coalesce(Operation, EventType, EventMessage))),
            TargetId = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ObjectId, ActorUserId))),
            TargetName = tostring(Object),
            Initiator = tostring(ActorUsername),
            InitiatorIp = tostring(SrcIpAddr)
    | where OperationText has_any ("credential", "certificate", "secret", "password", "service principal", "application")
    | where isnotempty(TargetId)
    | project ChangeTime=TimeGenerated, OperationText, TargetId, TargetName, Initiator, InitiatorIp;
    let SPBurst =
    _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
    | where EventResult == "Success"
    | where ActorUserType has "Service Principal"
    | extend PrincipalId = tolower(tostring(ActorUserId)),
            PrincipalName = tostring(ActorUsername),
            SrcIp = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
            UserAgent = tostring(HttpUserAgent)
    | where isnotempty(PrincipalId)
    | summarize FirstSignin=min(TimeGenerated), LastSignin=max(TimeGenerated), SigninCount=count(), DistinctIPs=dcount(SrcIp),
                SrcIps=make_set(SrcIp, 20), UserAgents=make_set(UserAgent, 10)
        by PrincipalId, PrincipalName;
    CredChanges
    | join kind=inner SPBurst on $left.TargetId == $right.PrincipalId
    | where FirstSignin between (ChangeTime .. (ChangeTime + 24h))
    | where SigninCount >= 3
    | project TimeGenerated=ChangeTime, SigninCount, DistinctIPs, TargetName, OperationText, Initiator, InitiatorIp,
              PrincipalName, FirstSignin, LastSignin, TargetId, SrcIps, UserAgents
    | extend EntraAppUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_IAM/ManagedAppMenuBlade/~/Overview/objectId/", TargetId, "/appId/"),
            XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", InitiatorIp, "/overview")
    | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Initiator contains '{UserFilter}' or PrincipalName contains '{UserFilter}'
    | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or InitiatorIp contains '{IPFilter}' or tostring(SrcIps) contains '{IPFilter}'
    | order by SigninCount desc, TimeGenerated desc
    | take 25","size":0,"title":"App credential change followed by SP sign-in burst","noDataMessage":"✅ No app credential changes correlated with service principal sign-in bursts in this StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let AllowedAutomationPrincipals = dynamic(["ci-pipeline-sp", "aks-maintenance-mi", "github-actions-mi", "ado-release-sp"]);
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
| where Category has "kube-audit"
| where OperationName has_any ("daemonsets/create", "cronjobs/create")
| where isnotempty(Caller_s)
| extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller_s)
| where CallerNorm !in (AllowedAutomationPrincipals)
| summarize
    EventCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    Operations = make_set(OperationName, 10),
    Resources = make_set(Resource, 20)
    by Caller = CallerNorm, ResourceId
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstSeen,  Operations = tostring(Operations),
          Resources  = tostring(Resources)
| extend ResourcePortalUrl = strcat("https://portal.azure.com/#@/resource", ResourceId, "/overview")
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, EventCount, Operations, ResourcePortalUrl, FirstSeen, LastSeen, Resources
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Caller contains '{UserFilter}'
| order by EventCount desc, LastSeen desc

StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let DiscoveryOps =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationNameValue has_any (
     "microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/read",
     "microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/read",
     "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/read",
     "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups/read",
     "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups/resources/read",
    "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/providers/read"
   )
  | where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller)
  | project EnumTime=TimeGenerated, CallerNorm, CallerIpAddress, EnumOperation=OperationNameValue, SubscriptionId;
let BaselineNISignin =
  AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - 14d) .. StartTime)
  | where ResultType in~ ("0", "Success")
  | where isnotempty(Identity) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
  | extend IdentityNorm = tolower(Identity), AppIdNorm = tolower(AppId), SrcIp = tostring(IPAddress), Ua = tostring(UserAgent)
  | summarize by IdentityNorm, AppIdNorm, SrcIp, Ua;
let CurrentNovelNISignin =
  AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ResultType in~ ("0", "Success")
  | where isnotempty(Identity) and isnotempty(IPAddress)
  | extend IdentityNorm = tolower(Identity), AppIdNorm = tolower(AppId), SrcIp = tostring(IPAddress), Ua = tostring(UserAgent)
  | join kind=leftanti BaselineNISignin on IdentityNorm, AppIdNorm, SrcIp, Ua
  | project SigninTime=TimeGenerated, Identity, IdentityNorm, AppId, IPAddress=SrcIp, UserAgent=Ua, CorrelationId, ResultType, ConditionalAccessStatus;
CurrentNovelNISignin
| join kind=inner DiscoveryOps on $left.IPAddress == $right.CallerIpAddress
| where SigninTime between (EnumTime .. (EnumTime + 2h))
| extend MinutesToSignin = datetime_diff('minute', SigninTime, EnumTime),
         XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", IPAddress, "/overview")
| project TimeGenerated=EnumTime, MinutesToSignin, Identity, IPAddress, XDRIPUrl, AppId,
     ConditionalAccessStatus, EnumOperation, SigninTime,
     ResultType, UserAgent, CorrelationId,
     Caller=CallerNorm, SubscriptionId
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Identity contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or IPAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by MinutesToSignin asc

let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let KeyVaultDiscovery =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationNameValue has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/" and OperationNameValue has_any ("/read", "/list", "accesspolicies")
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress)
  | summarize FirstKv=min(TimeGenerated), LastKv=max(TimeGenerated), KvOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 20), KvCount=count()
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SubscriptionId;
let DataStoreRecon =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationNameValue has_any (
     "microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/",
     "microsoft.sql/servers/databases/",
     "microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts/",
     "microsoft.kusto/clusters/",
     "listkeys/action"
   )
    and OperationNameValue has_any ("/read", "/list", "listkeys/action", "/query")
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress)
  | summarize FirstData=min(TimeGenerated), LastData=max(TimeGenerated), DataOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 30),
              DataResources=make_set(ResourceId, 30), DataCount=count()
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SubscriptionId;
KeyVaultDiscovery
| join kind=inner DataStoreRecon on CallerNorm, SubscriptionId
| where FirstData between (FirstKv .. (LastKv + 2h))
| extend KvOps        = tostring(KvOps),
          DataOps      = tostring(DataOps),
          DataResources = tostring(DataResources),
          MinutesToData = datetime_diff('minute', FirstData, FirstKv),
          XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", CallerIp, "/overview")
| project TimeGenerated=FirstKv, DataCount, KvCount, MinutesToData,
     Caller=CallerNorm, CallerIp, XDRIPUrl,
     FirstKv, LastKv,
     FirstData, LastData,
     KvOps, DataOps,
     DataResources, SubscriptionId
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Caller contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or CallerIp contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by DataCount desc, MinutesToData asc

StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let ConsentChanges =
  _Im_AuditEvent(starttime=StartTime,endtime=EndTime)
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend OperationText = tostring(coalesce(Operation, EventType, EventMessage)),
           OperationName = tostring(Operation),
           InitiatorUpn = tostring(ActorUsername),
           InitiatorIp = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           InitiatorApp = tostring(ActingAppName),
           CorrelationId = tostring(column_ifexists("CorrelationId", ""))
  | where OperationText has_any ("consent", "permission grant", "app role", "application")
  | project ChangeTime=TimeGenerated, ActivityDisplayName=OperationText, OperationName, CorrelationId, InitiatorUpn, InitiatorIp, InitiatorApp;
let HistoricalOAuthApps =
  CloudAppEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - 14d) .. StartTime)
  | where isnotempty(OAuthAppId)
  | project OAuthAppId
  | summarize by OAuthAppId;
let FirstSeenOAuthBursts =
  CloudAppEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(OAuthAppId)
  | project TimeGenerated, OAuthAppId, Application, IPAddress, AccountId
  | join kind=leftanti HistoricalOAuthApps on OAuthAppId
  | summarize FirstActivity=min(TimeGenerated), LastActivity=max(TimeGenerated), EventCount=count(),
              DistinctUsers=dcount(AccountId), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress),
              Users=make_set(AccountId, 20), SrcIps=make_set(IPAddress, 20)
    by OAuthAppId, Application, IPAddress
  | where EventCount >= 5;
ConsentChanges
| join kind=inner FirstSeenOAuthBursts on $left.InitiatorIp == $right.IPAddress
| where FirstActivity between (ChangeTime .. (ChangeTime + 24h))
| project TimeGenerated=ChangeTime, FirstActivity, LastActivity, ActivityDisplayName, OperationName, CorrelationId,
          InitiatorUpn, InitiatorIp, InitiatorApp, OAuthAppId, Application, EventCount, DistinctUsers, DistinctIPs, Users, SrcIps
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or InitiatorUpn contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or InitiatorIp contains '{IPFilter}'
| summarize Count=count() by Application
| top 10 by Count

⚫ Defense Evasion
Multi-service network exposure preceding key/data access, novel SPN sign-ins into Azure RBAC writes, Azure network-config tampering by compromised identities, and pod-token tooling preceding cloud RBAC writes.

**MITRE:** T1562 · T1578 · T1550.001 · T1098.003  
**Key tables:** AzureActivity · AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs · BehaviorAnalytics · DeviceInfo"},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"UserFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""},{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"name":"section-7-text","id":"694407df-d1e0-40ea-b1ec-d244ae796399"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let SequenceWindow = 2h;
  // Successful activity status values for AzureActivity write operations.
  let SuccessActivityStatusValues = dynamic(["succeeded", "success"]);
  // Exposure write operation families for Key Vault, Storage, and Azure database services.
  let ExposureOpPrefixes = dynamic([
    "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/write",
    "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/accesspolicies/write",
    "microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/write",
    "microsoft.sql/servers/firewallrules/write",
    "microsoft.dbforpostgresql/",
    "microsoft.dbformysql/"
  ]);
  // Parent operations that can carry network exposure changes in operation properties.
  let ExposureParentWriteOps = dynamic([
    "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/write",
    "microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/write",
    "microsoft.sql/servers/write",
    "microsoft.dbforpostgresql/flexibleservers/write",
    "microsoft.dbformysql/flexibleservers/write"
  ]);
  // Action fragments that indicate network posture or access control changes.
  let ExposureActionValues = dynamic([
    "networkacls/write",
    "firewallrules/write",
    "virtualnetworkrules/write",
    "accesspolicies/write",
    "publicnetworkaccess/write"
  ]);
  // Property tokens that indicate firewall, ACL, or public access weakening.
  let NetworkConfigSignals = dynamic([
    "publicnetworkaccess",
    "networkacls",
    "defaultaction",
    "iprules",
    "virtualnetworkrules",
    "bypass",
    "firewallrules"
  ]);
  // Service-specific access patterns used to detect post-exposure key or data access.
  let KeyVaultAccessActions = dynamic(["/read", "/list", "secrets", "keys"]);
  let StorageAccessActions = dynamic(["listkeys/action", "/list", "/read"]);
  let SqlAccessActions = dynamic(["/read", "/list"]);
  let PostgresAccessActions = dynamic(["/read", "/list", "listkeys"]);
  let MysqlAccessActions = dynamic(["/read", "/list", "listkeys"]);
  // Stage 1: Detect exposure-changing writes.
  let ExposureWrites =
    AzureActivity
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where isnotempty(Caller)
    | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress), Op = tolower(OperationNameValue),
             ActivityStatusNorm = tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)), Props = tolower(tostring(Properties_d))
   | where ActivityStatusNorm in (SuccessActivityStatusValues)
    | where Op has_any (ExposureOpPrefixes)
    | where (Op has_any (ExposureActionValues))
      or (Op in~ (ExposureParentWriteOps) and Props has_any (NetworkConfigSignals))
    | extend ServiceFamily = case(
        Op startswith "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/", "KeyVault",
        Op startswith "microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/", "Storage",
        Op startswith "microsoft.sql/servers/", "AzureSQL",
        Op startswith "microsoft.dbforpostgresql/", "PostgreSQL",
        Op startswith "microsoft.dbformysql/", "MySQL",
        "Other")
    | summarize FirstExposure=min(TimeGenerated), LastExposure=max(TimeGenerated), ExposureCount=count(),
                ExposureOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 30), ExposureResources=make_set(ResourceId, 30),
                ServiceSet=make_set(ServiceFamily, 10)
      by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SubscriptionId;
  // Stage 2: Detect key, secret, and data access operations after exposure tampering.
  let AccessOps =
    AzureActivity
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where isnotempty(Caller)
    | extend CallerNorm = tolower(Caller), CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress), Op = tolower(OperationNameValue),
             ActivityStatusNorm = tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue))
    | where ActivityStatusNorm in (SuccessActivityStatusValues)
    | where (
       Op has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/" and Op has_any (KeyVaultAccessActions)
     ) or (
       Op has "microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/" and Op has_any (StorageAccessActions)
     ) or (
       Op has "microsoft.sql/servers/databases/" and Op has_any (SqlAccessActions)
     ) or (
       Op has "microsoft.dbforpostgresql/" and Op has_any (PostgresAccessActions)
     ) or (
       Op has "microsoft.dbformysql/" and Op has_any (MysqlAccessActions)
     )
    | summarize FirstAccess=min(TimeGenerated), LastAccess=max(TimeGenerated), AccessCount=count(),
                AccessOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 40), AccessResources=make_set(ResourceId, 40)
      by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SubscriptionId;
  // Stage 3: Correlate multi-service exposure writes with follow-on access in a tight sequence window.
  ExposureWrites
  | extend DistinctServiceCount = array_length(ServiceSet)
  | where DistinctServiceCount >= 2
  | join kind=inner AccessOps on CallerNorm, SubscriptionId, CallerIp
  | where FirstAccess between (FirstExposure .. (LastExposure + SequenceWindow))
  | extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", CallerIp, "/overview")
  | project TimeGenerated=FirstExposure, DistinctServiceCount, ServiceSet, ExposureCount, AccessCount,
            Caller=CallerNorm, CallerIp, XDRIPUrl, SubscriptionId,
            FirstExposure, LastExposure, FirstAccess, LastAccess,
            ExposureOps, AccessOps, ExposureResources, AccessResources
  | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Caller contains '{UserFilter}'
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or CallerIp contains '{IPFilter}'
  | order by DistinctServiceCount desc, ExposureCount desc, AccessCount desc, FirstAccess desc
  | limit 25","size":0,"title":"Multi-service network exposure followed by key and data access","noDataMessage":"✅ No multi-service network exposure followed by key/data access in this window.","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","showExportToExcel":true,"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"DistinctServiceCount","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":">=","thresholdValue":"3","representation":"redBright","text":"🚨 Exposure"},{"columnId":"FirstAccess","label":"First Access"},{"columnId":"LastAccess","label":"Last Access"},{"columnId":"ExposureOps","label":"Exposure Operations"},{"columnId":"AccessOps","label":"Access Operations"},{"columnId":"ExposureResources","label":"Exposure Resources"},{"columnId":"AccessResources","label":"Access Resources"}]}},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"customWidth":"100","name":"de-de4-multiservice-exposure-access","id":"1fb16b49-1512-460c-b0e8-09706264e88f"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
  let RbacWindow = 60m;
  // Baseline successful SPN sign-in tuples for rarity test
  let SpnBaseline =
    AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
    | where ResultType =~ 'Success' or ResultType == '0'
    | extend SpId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
             AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
             IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
             UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
             CredNorm = tolower(tostring(ClientCredentialType))
    | where isnotempty(SpId) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
    | summarize by SpId, AppIdNorm, IpNorm, UaNorm, CredNorm;
  // Current successful SPN sign-ins in hunt interval
  let SpnCurrent =
    AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where ResultType =~ 'Success' or ResultType == '0'
    | extend SpId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
             AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
             IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
             UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
             CredNorm = tolower(tostring(ClientCredentialType))
    | where isnotempty(SpId) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
    | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated,
              SpId,
              AppIdNorm,
              SpnName = tostring(ServicePrincipalName),
              Identity,
              IpNorm,
              UaNorm,
              CredNorm,
              ResourceDisplayName,
              CorrelationId;
  // Keep only first-seen tuples for high-fidelity hunting.
  let SpnNovel =
    SpnCurrent
    | join kind=leftanti SpnBaseline on SpId, AppIdNorm, IpNorm, UaNorm, CredNorm;
  // Collect RBAC-impacting control-plane write operations
  let RbacWrites =
    AzureActivity
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where ActivityStatusValue =~ 'Succeeded' or ActivitySubstatusValue has 'OK'
    | extend Op = tolower(tostring(OperationNameValue)),
             CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller))
    | where Op has_any (
       'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/write',
        'microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/write',
       'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/delete'
      )
    | project WriteTime = TimeGenerated,
              CallerNorm,
              CallerIpAddress,
              OperationNameValue,
              ResourceId,
              ResourceGroup,
              SubscriptionId,
              CorrelationId,
              Authorization_d;
  // Correlate novel SPN sign-in to RBAC writes via ServicePrincipalId/AppId
  SpnNovel
  | extend JoinKeys = pack_array(SpId, AppIdNorm)
  | mv-expand JoinKey = JoinKeys
  | extend JoinKey = tostring(JoinKey)
  | join kind=inner (
      RbacWrites
      | project WriteTime, CallerNorm, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ResourceId, ResourceGroup, SubscriptionId, CorrelationId, Authorization_d
    ) on $left.JoinKey == $right.CallerNorm
  // Require near-term temporal chain for stronger suspicion.
  | where WriteTime between (SigninTime .. (SigninTime + RbacWindow))
  | summarize FirstSignin=min(SigninTime),
              FirstRbacWrite=min(WriteTime),
              LastRbacWrite=max(WriteTime),
              RbacWriteCount=count(),
              Operations=make_set(OperationNameValue, 10),
              ResourcesTouched=make_set(ResourceId, 20),
              ResourceGroups=make_set(ResourceGroup, 20),
              Subscriptions=make_set(SubscriptionId, 10),
              FirstSigninIp=any(IpNorm),
              SigninIps=make_set(IpNorm, 5),
              WriteIps=make_set(CallerIpAddress, 5)
    by SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName, Identity, UaNorm, CredNorm
  | extend TimeGenerated = FirstSignin,
           MinutesToRbac = datetime_diff('minute', FirstRbacWrite, FirstSignin),
           XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", FirstSigninIp, "/overview"),
           EntraAppUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_IAM/ManagedAppMenuBlade/~/Overview/objectId/", SpId, "/appId/", AppIdNorm)
  | project TimeGenerated, RbacWriteCount, MinutesToRbac, Operations,
            SpnName, Identity, AppIdNorm, EntraAppUrl, CredNorm, UaNorm,
            FirstSigninIp, XDRIPUrl, SigninIps, WriteIps,
            FirstSignin, FirstRbacWrite, LastRbacWrite,
            ResourcesTouched, ResourceGroups, Subscriptions, SpId
  | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or SpnName contains '{UserFilter}' or Identity contains '{UserFilter}'
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or FirstSigninIp contains '{IPFilter}'
  | order by RbacWriteCount desc, FirstRbacWrite desc
  | limit 25","size":0,"title":"Novel SPN sign-in followed by Azure RBAC write","noDataMessage":"✅ No novel service principal sign-ins followed by Azure RBAC writes in this window.","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","showExportToExcel":true,"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"RbacWriteCount","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":">=","thresholdValue":"5","representation":"redBright","text":"🚨 Id"}]}},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"customWidth":"100","name":"de-de5-novel-spn-rbac-write","id":"58948d26-e0e3-4d8f-9c30-f80471f2dd14"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"  let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
  let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
  let NetworkConfigOps = dynamic([
      "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/azureFirewalls/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/azureFirewalls/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/ruleCollectionGroups/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/ruleCollectionGroups/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/frontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicies/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/frontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicies/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/routes/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/routes/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/delete",
      "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write",
      "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete"
  ]);
  let ApplianceIPs =
      DeviceInfo
      | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
      | where IsInternetFacing == true
      | where DeviceCategory in~ ("Network device", "Unknown")
      | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
      | join kind=inner (
          DeviceNetworkInfo
          | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
          | mv-expand IP = parse_json(IPAddresses)
          | extend ApplianceIP = tostring(IP.IPAddress)
          | where isnotempty(ApplianceIP)
          | where ApplianceIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
      ) on DeviceId
      | project ApplianceIP, ApplianceName = DeviceName, ApplianceOS = OSPlatform;
  let UEBASignals =
      BehaviorAnalytics
      | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
      | summarize
          UEBAInvestigationPriority = max(InvestigationPriority),
          UEBAFirstTimeOp           = countif(tostring(ActivityInsights.FirstTimeUserUsedApp) == "True"),
          UEBAFirstTimeCountry      = countif(tostring(ActivityInsights.FirstTimeUserConnectedFromCountry) == "True")
        by UserPrincipalName;
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
  | where OperationNameValue in~ (NetworkConfigOps)
  | extend Auth = parse_json(Authorization_d)
  | where not (
      OperationNameValue =~ "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete"
      and tostring(Auth.evidence.role) =~ "PIM Contributor"
  )
  | extend CallerType = case(
      tostring(Auth.evidence.principalType) =~ "ServicePrincipal", "ServicePrincipal",
      Caller contains "@",                                          "User",
      tostring(Auth.evidence.principalType) =~ "User",             "User",
      "Unknown")
  | extend CallerUPN = iff(Caller contains "@", Caller, "")
  | extend ResourceCategory = case(
      OperationNameValue contains "networkSecurityGroup",   "NSG",
      OperationNameValue contains "firewallPolicies"
          or OperationNameValue contains "azureFirewall",   "Firewall",
      OperationNameValue contains "WebApplicationFirewall", "WAF",
      OperationNameValue contains "virtualNetworkGateway",  "VPN Gateway",
      OperationNameValue contains "routeTable"
          or OperationNameValue contains "routes/",         "Route Table",
      OperationNameValue contains "subnets",                "Subnet",
      OperationNameValue contains "roleAssignments",        "Role Assignment",
      OperationNameValue)
  | extend ChangeAction = iff(OperationNameValue endswith "/delete", "Delete", "Write")
  | project
      EventTime        = TimeGenerated,
      ResourceCategory,
      ChangeAction,
      OperationName    = OperationNameValue,
      ResourceGroup,
      ResourceId       = _ResourceId,
      Caller,
      CallerType,
      CallerUPN,
      CallerIpAddress,
      SubscriptionId
  | join kind=leftouter UEBASignals on $left.CallerUPN == $right.UserPrincipalName
  | extend UEBAFlagged = isnotempty(UEBAInvestigationPriority) and UEBAInvestigationPriority > 0
  | join kind=leftouter ApplianceIPs on $left.CallerIpAddress == $right.ApplianceIP
  | extend FromApplianceIP = isnotempty(ApplianceName)
  | project-away UserPrincipalName, ApplianceIP
  | extend SignalStrength = case(
      FromApplianceIP,                                               "High",
      CallerType == "ServicePrincipal" and ChangeAction == "Delete", "High",
      CallerType == "ServicePrincipal",                              "Medium",
      UEBAFlagged and ChangeAction == "Delete",                      "Medium",
      UEBAFlagged,                                                   "Medium",
      "Low")
  | extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", CallerIpAddress, "/overview")
  | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or CallerUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or CallerIpAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
  | project-reorder SignalStrength, EventTime, ResourceCategory, ChangeAction,
      CallerUPN, CallerType, CallerIpAddress, XDRIPUrl,
      FromApplianceIP, ApplianceName,
      UEBAFlagged, UEBAInvestigationPriority,
      OperationName, ResourceGroup, ResourceId,
      SubscriptionId
      | limit 25","size":0,"title":"Azure Network Config Tampered by Compromised Identity","noDataMessage":"✅ No Azure network security control changes in this Appliance"},{"columnId":"ApplianceName","label":"Appliance"},{"columnId":"UEBAFlagged","label":"UEBA Flagged"},{"columnId":"UEBAInvestigationPriority","label":"UEBA Priority"},{"columnId":"OperationName","label":"Operation"},{"columnId":"ResourceGroup","label":"Resource Group"},{"columnId":"ResourceId","label":"Resource Id"},{"columnId":"SubscriptionId","label":"Subscription"}]}},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"customWidth":"100","name":"de-de6-network-config-tamper","id":"ffa2256a-3fa4-42f1-956a-6fee68fbbda0"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"// Time and tuning parameters.
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let ProcToK8sWindow = 20m;
  let K8sToCloudWindow = 45m;
  // Stage A: process-level signs of token access or cloud token exchange tooling in pods.
  let PodTokenTooling =
    CloudProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(KubernetesNamespace) and isnotempty(KubernetesPodName)
    | extend NamespaceNorm = tolower(tostring(KubernetesNamespace)),
             PodNorm = tolower(tostring(KubernetesPodName)),
             Cmd = tolower(tostring(ProcessCommandLine)),
             Proc = tolower(tostring(ProcessName)),
             ParentProc = tolower(tostring(ParentProcessName))
    | where Cmd has_any (
       '/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token',
       'azure_federated_token_file',
       'oauth2/v2.0/token',
       'login.microsoft.com',
       'sts.windows.net',
       'az login',
       'get-azaccesstoken'
     )
      or (Proc has_any ('az', 'curl', 'wget', 'kubectl', 'pwsh', 'python')
          and Cmd has_any ('token', 'federated', 'oauth2', 'login.microsoftonline', 'sts.windows.net', 'serviceaccount'))
    | project ProcTime=Timestamp, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, KubernetesResource, ContainerName, ContainerImageName,
              ProcessName, ParentProcessName, ProcessCommandLine, AzureResourceId, ContainerId;
  // Stage B: Kubernetes audit events that can expose token-abuse precursor context, including source IP.
  let K8sAuditBridge =
    CloudAuditEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where DataSource has 'Kubernetes'
    | extend AF = todynamic(AdditionalFields)
    | extend NamespaceNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesNamespace), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.namespace', tostring(RawEventData))))),
             PodNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesPodName), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.name', tostring(RawEventData))))),
             OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
             IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
             UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
   | where isnotempty(NamespaceNorm) and isnotempty(PodNorm) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
    | where OpNorm has_any (
       'pods/exec',
       'pods/attach',
       'serviceaccounts/token',
       'tokenreviews',
       'secrets/get',
       'serviceaccounts/get'
     )
    | project K8sAuditTime=TimeGenerated, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, IpNorm, UaNorm, K8sOperation=OperationName, K8sResourceId=CloudResourceId;
  // Stage C: Azure RBAC write operations from CloudAuditEvents.
  let CloudRbacWrites =
    CloudAuditEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
   | where DataSource has 'Azure'
    | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
             IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
             UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
    | where isnotempty(IpNorm)
    | where OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/'
       or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/'
    | project CloudTime=TimeGenerated, IpNorm, UaNorm, CloudOperation=OperationName, CloudResourceId, ActionType, CountryCode, IsAnonymousProxy;
  // Correlate A->B by namespace/pod and near-time.
  PodTokenTooling
  | join kind=inner K8sAuditBridge on NamespaceNorm, PodNorm
  | where K8sAuditTime between (ProcTime .. (ProcTime + ProcToK8sWindow))
  // Correlate B->C by source IP and near-time to represent k8s-to-cloud pivot.
  | join kind=inner CloudRbacWrites on IpNorm
  | where CloudTime between (K8sAuditTime .. (K8sAuditTime + K8sToCloudWindow))
  | summarize FirstProcess=min(ProcTime),
              FirstK8sAudit=min(K8sAuditTime),
              FirstCloudWrite=min(CloudTime),
              LastCloudWrite=max(CloudTime),
              CloudWriteCount=count(),
              K8sOps=make_set(K8sOperation, 10),
              CloudOps=make_set(CloudOperation, 10),
              CloudResources=make_set(CloudResourceId, 20),
              Countries=make_set(CountryCode, 5),
              AnyAnonymousProxy=max(toint(IsAnonymousProxy))
    by NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, IpNorm, ContainerName, ContainerImageName, ProcessName, ParentProcessName, ProcessCommandLine
  | extend TimeGenerated = FirstProcess,
           XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", IpNorm, "/overview")
  | project TimeGenerated, CloudWriteCount, AnyAnonymousProxy, K8sOps, CloudOps,
            NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, IpNorm, XDRIPUrl, Countries,
            ContainerName, ContainerImageName, ProcessName, ParentProcessName, ProcessCommandLine,
            FirstProcess, FirstK8sAudit, FirstCloudWrite, LastCloudWrite, CloudResources
  | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or PodNorm contains '{UserFilter}' or NamespaceNorm contains '{UserFilter}'
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or IpNorm contains '{IPFilter}'
  | order by CloudWriteCount desc, FirstCloudWrite desc

🟤 Credential Access
Key Vault secret reads/harvests preceding partial storage exfil, SPN sign-ins with out-of-scope resource access, novel SPN sign-ins from non-first-party IPs, and Kubernetes token audits preceding novel cloud control-plane operations.

**MITRE:** T1552.001 · T1528 · T1550.001 · T1606  
**Key tables:** AzureActivity · AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs · AzureDiagnostics"},"name":"section-8-text","id":"1d8b4c45-a8ad-4224-912a-15d7794f6ed8"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"// Execution window and thresholds.
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let PivotWindow = 4h;
let SuccessActivity = dynamic(["succeeded", "success"]);
let KeyAuthTypes = dynamic(["accountkey", "sas"]);
let MinStorageOps = 25;
let MinFailures = 3;
let MinReads = 8;
// Stage A: successful Key Vault secret retrieval from management plane telemetry.
let KeyVaultSecretReads =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm=tolower(Caller), CallerIp=tostring(CallerIpAddress),
           Op=tolower(OperationNameValue),
           Status=tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)),
           SubStatus=tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
  | where Op has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets/"
  | where Op in~ ("microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets/get", "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets/read")
  | where Status in (SuccessActivity) or SubStatus has "ok"
  // Collapse duplicate activity stages into one logical secret-read action.
  | extend ActionKey = iff(
      isnotempty(CorrelationId),
      strcat(CorrelationId, "|", CallerNorm, "|", Op, "|", tostring(ResourceId)),
      strcat(CallerNorm, "|", CallerIp, "|", tostring(SubscriptionId), "|", Op, "|", tostring(ResourceId), "|", tostring(bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)))
    )
  | summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by ActionKey
  | summarize FirstKvRead=min(TimeGenerated), LastKvRead=max(TimeGenerated),
              KvReadCount=count(), KvOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 20),
              KvResources=make_set(ResourceId, 30)
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp;
// Stage B: key-auth storage activity with per-actor summary.
let StorageActivity =
  CloudStorageAggregatedEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend ActorNorm=tolower(tostring(coalesce(AccountUpn, AccountObjectId, AccountApplicationId))),
           IpNorm=tostring(IpAddress),
           AuthNorm=tolower(tostring(AuthenticationType)),
           StorageNorm=tolower(tostring(StorageAccount))
  | where isnotempty(ActorNorm) and isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(StorageNorm)
  | where AuthNorm in (KeyAuthTypes)
  | summarize FirstStorage=min(TimeGenerated), LastStorage=max(TimeGenerated),
              StorageEvents=count(), StorageAccounts=dcount(StorageNorm),
              TotalOps=sum(tolong(coalesce(OperationsCount, 0))),
              TotalSuccess=sum(tolong(coalesce(SuccessfulOperationsCount, 0))),
              TotalFailures=sum(tolong(coalesce(FailedOperationsCount, 0))),
              TotalReads=sum(tolong(coalesce(SuccessfulReadOperations, 0))),
              TotalResponseBytes=sum(tolong(coalesce(TotalResponseLength, 0))),
              Services=make_set(ServiceType, 10),
              Accounts=make_set(StorageAccount, 30),
              Containers=make_set(StorageContainer, 30),
              UserAgents=make_set(UserAgentHeader, 10)
    by ActorNorm, IpNorm;
// Stage correlation: secret retrieval followed by mixed-outcome storage behavior.
KeyVaultSecretReads
| join kind=inner StorageActivity on $left.CallerNorm == $right.ActorNorm and $left.CallerIp == $right.IpNorm
| where FirstStorage between (FirstKvRead .. (LastKvRead + PivotWindow))
// Require meaningful activity and explicit mixed outcomes.
| where TotalOps >= MinStorageOps and TotalReads >= MinReads and TotalFailures >= MinFailures
| where TotalSuccess > 0 and TotalFailures > 0
| extend IdentityName = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[0]), CallerNorm),
         IdentityUPNSuffix = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[1]), ""),
         FailureToSuccessRatio = round(todouble(TotalFailures) / todouble(max_of(TotalSuccess, 1)), 3)
| project TimeGenerated=FirstKvRead,
          Identity=CallerNorm, IdentityName, IdentityUPNSuffix,
          SourceIp=CallerIp,
          FirstKvRead, LastKvRead, KvReadCount, KvOps, KvResources,
          FirstStorage, LastStorage,
          StorageEvents, StorageAccounts,
          TotalOps, TotalSuccess, TotalFailures, FailureToSuccessRatio,
          TotalReads, TotalResponseBytes,
          Services, Accounts, Containers, UserAgents
| extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", SourceIp, "/overview")
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, FailureToSuccessRatio, TotalReads, TotalFailures, TotalSuccess, TotalOps, Identity, SourceIp, XDRIPUrl, StorageAccounts, StorageEvents
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Identity contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIp contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by TotalReads desc, TotalFailures desc
| limit 25","size":0,"title":"Key Vault secret read then partial storage exfil","noDataMessage":"✅ No Key Vault secret reads followed by partial storage exfil in this Read"}]}},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"customWidth":"100","name":"ca-ca1-kv-storage-exfil","id":"d3468b41-19ea-4a57-b244-d76e10ef5cce"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"// Time and tuning parameters
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
let PivotWindow = 6h;
let ScopeWindow = 6h;
let SuccessStatus = dynamic(['succeeded', 'success']);
// Stage A: successful Key Vault secret retrieval
let KvSecretReads =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller)),
           CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress),
           Op = tolower(tostring(OperationNameValue)),
           Status = tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)),
           SubStatus = tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
  | where Op has 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults/' and Op has '/secrets/'
  | where Op has_any ('/get', '/read')
  | where Status in (SuccessStatus) or SubStatus has 'ok'
  | summarize FirstKvRead=min(TimeGenerated), LastKvRead=max(TimeGenerated), KvReadCount=count() by CallerNorm, CallerIp;
// Stage B: successful SPN sign-ins in timeframe
let SpnSignins =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ResultType =~ 'Success' or ResultType == '0'
  | extend SpId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
           AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
           SigninIp = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           CredNorm = tostring(ClientCredentialType)
  | where isnotempty(SpId) and isnotempty(SigninIp)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName = tostring(ServicePrincipalName), Identity, SigninIp, UaNorm, CredNorm;
// Baseline historical scope touched by each principal in control
let ScopeBaseline =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller)),
           ScopeKey = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ResourceGroup, ResourceId, SubscriptionId))),
           Provider = tostring(ResourceProviderValue)
  | where isnotempty(ScopeKey)
  | summarize by CallerNorm, ScopeKey, Provider;
// Current scope touched by caller after suspicious SPN authentication
let ScopeCurrent =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller)),
           ScopeKey = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ResourceGroup, ResourceId, SubscriptionId))),
           Provider = tostring(ResourceProviderValue),
           Op = tostring(OperationNameValue)
  | where isnotempty(ScopeKey)
  | project ActTime = TimeGenerated, CallerNorm, ScopeKey, Provider, Op, ResourceId, ResourceGroup, SubscriptionId, CallerIpAddress;
// Keep only novel scope for each caller.
let ScopeNovel =
  ScopeCurrent
  | join kind=leftanti ScopeBaseline on CallerNorm, ScopeKey, Provider;
// Correlate full chain: KeyVault read -> SPN sign-in -> novel scope
KvSecretReads
| join kind=inner (
    SpnSignins
    | extend JoinKeys = pack_array(SpId, AppIdNorm)
    | mv-expand JoinKey = JoinKeys
    | extend JoinKey = tostring(JoinKey)
    | project SigninTime, SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName, Identity, SigninIp, UaNorm, CredNorm, JoinKey
  ) on $left.CallerNorm == $right.JoinKey and $left.CallerIp == $right.SigninIp
| where SigninTime between (FirstKvRead .. (LastKvRead + PivotWindow))
| join kind=inner ScopeNovel on $left.CallerNorm == $right.CallerNorm
| where ActTime between (SigninTime .. (SigninTime + ScopeWindow))
| summarize FirstKvRead=min(FirstKvRead),
            FirstSignin=min(SigninTime),
            FirstNovelScope=min(ActTime),
            NovelScopeCount=dcount(ScopeKey),
            Providers=make_set(Provider, 15),
            Operations=make_set(Op, 20),
            Scopes=make_set(ScopeKey, 30),
            ResourceIds=make_set(ResourceId, 20),
            ResourceGroups=make_set(ResourceGroup, 20),
            Subscriptions=make_set(SubscriptionId, 10)
  by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName, Identity, UaNorm, CredNorm
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstKvRead
| where NovelScopeCount >= 2
| project TimeGenerated,
          Identity = CallerNorm,
          SourceIp = CallerIp,
          ServicePrincipalId = SpId,
          AppId = AppIdNorm,
          ServicePrincipalName = SpnName,
          FirstKvRead,
          FirstSignin,
          FirstNovelScope,
          NovelScopeCount,
          Providers,
          Operations,
          Scopes,
          ResourceIds,
          ResourceGroups,
          Subscriptions,
          UserAgent = UaNorm,
          ClientCredentialType = CredNorm
| extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", SourceIp, "/overview"),
         EntraAppUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_IAM/ManagedAppMenuBlade/~/Overview/objectId/", ServicePrincipalId, "/appId/", AppId)
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, NovelScopeCount, ServicePrincipalName, Identity, SourceIp, XDRIPUrl, AppId, EntraAppUrl, Operations, Scopes, Providers
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Identity contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIp contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by NovelScopeCount desc, FirstNovelScope desc
| limit 25","size":0,"title":"Key Vault harvest to SPN sign-in then out-of-scope resource access","noDataMessage":"✅ No Key Vault harvest followed by SPN sign-in and out-of-scope access in this Read Time"},{"columnId":"NovelScopeCount","label":"Novel Scopes"},{"columnId":"ServicePrincipalName","label":"Service Hunt window and tuning knobs.
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
let PivotWindow = 60m;
// Optional allowlist for approved external automation sources.
let ApprovedPublicIps = dynamic([]);
// Stage A: successful Key Vault secret reads.
let KvReads =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend Op = tolower(OperationNameValue),
           Status = tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)),
           SubStatus = tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue)),
           CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress),
           CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller))
  // Keep only successful secret read actions from Key Vault provider paths.
  | where Op has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/" and Op has "/secrets/" and Op has_any ("/get", "/read")
 | where Status in (dynamic(["success", "succeeded"])) or SubStatus has "ok"
  | where isnotempty(CallerIp)
  | summarize FirstKvRead=min(TimeGenerated), LastKvRead=max(TimeGenerated), KvReadCount=count(),
              KvOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 15), KvResources=make_set(ResourceId, 25), KvCallers=make_set(CallerNorm, 15)
    by CallerIp;
// Baseline SPN sign-in tuples over prior 14 days.
let SpnBaseline =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | extend SpnId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
           AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UserAgentNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           CredType = tolower(tostring(ClientCredentialType)),
           ResultNorm = tolower(tostring(ResultType))
  | where isnotempty(SpnId) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where ResultNorm in (dynamic(["0", "success", "succeeded"]))
  | summarize by SpnId, AppIdNorm, IpNorm, UserAgentNorm, CredType;
// Current SPN sign-ins in hunt window.
let SpnCurrent =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend SpnId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
           SpnName = tostring(ServicePrincipalName),
           AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UserAgentNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           CredType = tolower(tostring(ClientCredentialType)),
           ResultNorm = tolower(tostring(ResultType)),
           Asn = tostring(AutonomousSystemNumber)
  | where isnotempty(SpnId) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where ResultNorm in (dynamic(["0", "success", "succeeded"]));
// Keep novel tuples only to highlight new SPN behavior.
let SpnNovel =
  SpnCurrent
  | join kind=leftanti SpnBaseline on SpnId, AppIdNorm, IpNorm, UserAgentNorm, CredType
  // Approximate non-1P network by public IP not present in local allowlist.
  | where not(ipv4_is_private(IpNorm))
  | where IpNorm !in (ApprovedPublicIps);
// Sequence correlation: Key Vault read from source IP before novel SPN sign-in.
KvReads
| join kind=inner SpnNovel on $left.CallerIp == $right.IpNorm
| where TimeGenerated between (FirstKvRead .. (LastKvRead + PivotWindow))
| summarize FirstKvRead=min(FirstKvRead), LastKvRead=max(LastKvRead), KvReadCount=max(KvReadCount),
            FirstSpnSignin=min(TimeGenerated), LastSpnSignin=max(TimeGenerated), SpnSigninCount=count(),
            KvOps=any(KvOps), KvResources=any(KvResources), KvCallers=any(KvCallers),
            UserAgents=make_set(UserAgentNorm, 10), CredentialTypes=make_set(CredType, 8),
            ASNs=make_set(Asn, 8), Resources=make_set(ResourceDisplayName, 15)
  by SourceIp=IpNorm, ServicePrincipalId=SpnId, ServicePrincipalName=SpnName, AppId=AppIdNorm
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstSpnSignin
| extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", SourceIp, "/overview"),
         EntraAppUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_IAM/ManagedAppMenuBlade/~/Overview/objectId/", ServicePrincipalId, "/appId/", AppId)
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, SpnSigninCount, KvReadCount, ServicePrincipalName, SourceIp, XDRIPUrl, AppId, EntraAppUrl, ASNs, UserAgents, CredentialTypes
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or ServicePrincipalName contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIp contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by FirstSpnSignin desc
| limit 25","size":0,"title":"Key Vault secret harvest followed by novel SPN sign-in from non-1P IP","noDataMessage":"✅ No Key Vault harvest followed by novel SPN sign-in from a non-1P IP in this Time and tuning parameters.
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
let PivotWindow = 60m;
// Stage A: k8s audit indicators associated with token and workload execution paths.
let K8sTokenAudit =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Kubernetes'
  | extend AF = todynamic(AdditionalFields)
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           NamespaceNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesNamespace), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.namespace', tostring(RawEventData))))),
           PodNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesPodName), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.name', tostring(RawEventData)))))
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where OpNorm has_any (
     'serviceaccounts/token',
     'tokenreviews',
     'pods/exec',
     'pods/attach',
     'secrets/get'
   )
  | summarize FirstK8s=min(TimeGenerated), LastK8s=max(TimeGenerated), K8sEventCount=count(), K8sOps=make_set(OperationName, 10)
    by IpNorm, UaNorm, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm;
// Build historical baseline of cloud operation tuples to identify first-seen pivots.
let CloudOpBaseline =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Azure'
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(OpNorm)
  | summarize by IpNorm, UaNorm, OpNorm;
// Current sensitive cloud control-plane operations.
let CloudSensitiveCurrent =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Azure'
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(UaNorm)
  | where OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/listkeys/action'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/read'
  | project CloudTime=TimeGenerated, IpNorm, UaNorm, OpNorm, OperationName, CloudResourceId, ActionType, CountryCode, IsAnonymousProxy;
// Keep only novel cloud operation tuples for high-fidelity behavior change.
let CloudSensitiveNovel =
  CloudSensitiveCurrent
  | join kind=leftanti CloudOpBaseline on IpNorm, UaNorm, OpNorm;
// Correlate k8s precursor to novel cloud control-plane behavior.
K8sTokenAudit
| where isnotempty(UaNorm)
| join kind=inner CloudSensitiveNovel on IpNorm, UaNorm
| where CloudTime between (FirstK8s .. (LastK8s + PivotWindow))
| summarize FirstK8s=min(FirstK8s),
            LastK8s=max(LastK8s),
            FirstCloud=min(CloudTime),
            LastCloud=max(CloudTime),
            K8sEventCount=max(K8sEventCount),
            CloudEventCount=count(),
            K8sOps=any(K8sOps),
            CloudOps=make_set(OperationName, 15),
            CloudResources=make_set(CloudResourceId, 20),
            Countries=make_set(CountryCode, 5),
            AnyAnonymousProxy=max(toint(IsAnonymousProxy))
  by IpNorm, UaNorm, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstK8s
| extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", IpNorm, "/overview")
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, CloudEventCount, AnyAnonymousProxy, IpNorm, XDRIPUrl, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, K8sOps, CloudOps, Countries
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or PodNorm contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or IpNorm contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by CloudEventCount desc, FirstCloud desc
| limit 25","size":0,"title":"K8s token audit then novel cloud control plane operations","noDataMessage":"✅ No K8s token audit followed by novel cloud control-plane operations in this window.","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","showExportToExcel":true,"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"CloudEventCount","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":">=","thresholdValue":"5","representation":"redBright","text":"🚨 {0}{1}"},{"operator":">=","thresholdValue":"2","representation":"orange","text":"⚠️ 📤 Exfiltration
Bulk storage download and first-seen-IP access via AccountKey/SAS, multi-mailbox access from a single IP via cloud-app permissions, external email-forwarding rules, and OAuth app consents granting sensitive permissions.

**MITRE:** T1530 · T1020 · T1537 · T1567 · T1020.001 · T1528 · T1098.001 · T1078.004  
**Key tables:** StorageBlobLogs · CloudAppEvents · AuditLogs · ThreatIntelIndicators"},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"UserFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""},{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"name":"section-9-header","id":"f65c970b-df56-432b-a72a-95e321b8861c"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let opsThreshold = 100;
let bytesThreshold = 104857600;
let knownBackupAgents = dynamic([
    "Microsoft BITS", "CVLT", "SQLBLOBACCESS",
    "WA-Storage", "AzureStorage/CopyEngine",
    "Veeam", "Komprise", "Nasuni", "Cohesity", "HYCU", "Panzura"]);
let knownExfilTools = dynamic([
    "rclone", "s3cmd", "gsutil", "aws-cli",
    "MinIO", "wget", "curl", "aria2", "FileZilla"]);
let browserAgents = dynamic([
    "Mozilla", "Chrome", "Safari",
    "Firefox", "Edge", "Edg/"]);
StorageBlobLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
| where AuthenticationType in ("AccountKey", "SAS", "DSas")
| where OperationName in (
    "GetBlob", "ListBlobs",
    "ListContainersSegment", "ListBlobsHierarchySegment")
| where StatusCode in (200, 206)
| where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
| where not (CallerIpAddress startswith "10."
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "192.168."
          or (CallerIpAddress startswith "172."
              and toint(split(CallerIpAddress, ".")[1]) between (16 .. 31))
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "169.254."
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "127.")
| where not (UserAgentHeader has_any (knownBackupAgents)
          or UserAgentHeader contains "rubrik")
| extend
    IsExfilTool    = UserAgentHeader has_any (knownExfilTools),
    IsBrowserAgent = UserAgentHeader has_any (browserAgents),
    IsEmptyAgent   = isempty(UserAgentHeader),
    IsAccountKey   = AuthenticationType == "AccountKey"
| summarize
    FirstSeen            = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen             = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalOperations      = count(),
    TotalBytesDownloaded = sum(tolong(ResponseBodySize)),
    DistinctContainers   = dcount(tostring(split(Uri, "/")[3])),
    DistinctBlobs        = dcount(Uri),
    AuthTypes            = make_set(AuthenticationType),
    StorageAccounts      = make_set(AccountName),
    UserAgents           = make_set(UserAgentHeader),
    IsExfilTool          = max(IsExfilTool),
    IsBrowserAgent       = max(IsBrowserAgent),
    IsEmptyAgent         = max(IsEmptyAgent),
    IsAccountKey         = max(IsAccountKey)
    by CallerIpAddress
| where TotalOperations >= opsThreshold
    or TotalBytesDownloaded >= bytesThreshold
| extend RiskScore =
      toint(IsAccountKey)
    + toint(IsExfilTool)
    + toint(IsBrowserAgent and TotalBytesDownloaded > 104857600)
    + toint(TotalBytesDownloaded > 1073741824)
| extend RiskFactors = set_difference(pack_array(
    iff(IsAccountKey, "AccountKey auth", ""),
    iff(IsExfilTool, "Known exfil tool", ""),
    iff(IsBrowserAgent and TotalBytesDownloaded > 104857600, "Browser + large DL", ""),
    iff(TotalBytesDownloaded > 1073741824, ">1GB downloaded", "")
  ), dynamic([""]))
| where RiskScore >= 1
| extend TotalBytesGB = round(TotalBytesDownloaded / 1073741824.0, 2)
  | project-reorder
      FirstSeen, LastSeen, CallerIpAddress,
      RiskScore, RiskFactors,
      TotalOperations, TotalBytesGB,
      DistinctContainers, DistinctBlobs,
      AuthTypes, StorageAccounts, UserAgents
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or CallerIpAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by RiskScore desc, TotalBytesGB desc
| extend RiskBand = case(RiskScore >= 4, "4 - Critical", RiskScore == 3, "3 - High", RiskScore == 2, "2 - Medium", RiskScore == 1, "1 - Low", "0 - Informational")
| summarize Count=count() by RiskBand
| sort by RiskBand asc
| render barchart","size":0,"title":"Storage Bulk Download via AccountKey/SAS from External IP (by RiskScore)","noDataMessage":"✅ No external bulk-download activity scored in this window.","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{Workspace}"],"chartSettings":{"xAxis":"RiskBand","yAxis":["Count"],"showDataLabels":true}},"conditionalVisibilities":[{"parameterName":"UserFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""},{"parameterName":"DeviceFilter","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""}],"customWidth":"50","name":"ex-e1-storage-bulk-download","id":"abaff2a0-1355-4ae4-9680-a44c79bf25e3"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};

 let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
 let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
 let BaselineEnd = StartTime;
let opsThreshold = 10;
let bytesThreshold = 10485760;
let riskyAuthTypes = dynamic(["AccountKey", "SAS", "DSas"]);
let knownBackupAgents = dynamic([
    "Microsoft BITS", "CVLT", "SQLBLOBACCESS",
    "WA-Storage", "AzureStorage/CopyEngine",
    "Veeam", "Komprise", "Nasuni", "Cohesity", "HYCU", "Panzura"]);
let knownIPs =
    StorageBlobLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
    | where AuthenticationType in (riskyAuthTypes)
    | where StatusCode in (200, 206)
    | where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
    | where not (CallerIpAddress startswith "10."
              or CallerIpAddress startswith "192.168."
              or (CallerIpAddress startswith "172."
                  and toint(split(CallerIpAddress, ".")[1]) between (16 .. 31))
              or CallerIpAddress startswith "169.254."
              or CallerIpAddress startswith "127.")
    | distinct CallerIpAddress, AccountName;
StorageBlobLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
| where AuthenticationType in (riskyAuthTypes)
| where OperationName in (
    "GetBlob", "ListBlobs",
    "ListContainersSegment", "ListBlobsHierarchySegment")
| where StatusCode in (200, 206)
| where isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
| where not (CallerIpAddress startswith "10."
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "192.168."
          or (CallerIpAddress startswith "172."
              and toint(split(CallerIpAddress, ".")[1]) between (16 .. 31))
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "169.254."
          or CallerIpAddress startswith "127.")
| where not (UserAgentHeader has_any (knownBackupAgents)
          or UserAgentHeader contains "rubrik")
| join kind=leftanti knownIPs on CallerIpAddress, AccountName
| summarize
    FirstSeen            = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen             = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalOperations      = count(),
    TotalBytesDownloaded = sum(tolong(ResponseBodySize)),
    DistinctBlobs        = dcount(Uri),
    AuthTypes            = make_set(AuthenticationType),
    UserAgents           = make_set(UserAgentHeader)
    by CallerIpAddress, AccountName
| where TotalOperations >= opsThreshold
    or TotalBytesDownloaded >= bytesThreshold
| extend TotalBytesGB = round(TotalBytesDownloaded / 1073741824.0, 2)
  | project-reorder
      FirstSeen, LastSeen,
      CallerIpAddress, AccountName,
      TotalOperations, TotalBytesGB, DistinctBlobs,
      AuthTypes, UserAgents
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or CallerIpAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or AccountName contains '{UserFilter}'
| order by TotalBytesGB desc
| summarize Count=count() by AccountName
| top 10 by Count

StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
 let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let distinctMailboxThreshold = 10;
let minMailAccessCount = 100;
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
| where ActionType == "MailItemsAccessed"
| extend AccessedMailbox = tostring(RawEventData.UserId)
| extend ClientIP        = tostring(RawEventData.ClientIP)
| extend UserAgent       = tostring(RawEventData.UserAgent)
| where isnotempty(AccessedMailbox) and isnotempty(ClientIP)
| summarize
    FirstAccess       = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAccess        = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalMailAccess   = count(),
    DistinctMailboxes = dcount(AccessedMailbox),
    MailboxList       = make_set(AccessedMailbox, 20),
    UserAgents        = make_set(UserAgent, 5)
  by ClientIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| where DistinctMailboxes >= distinctMailboxThreshold
      and TotalMailAccess >= minMailAccessCount
| extend AccessesPerMailbox = round(toreal(TotalMailAccess) / DistinctMailboxes, 1)
| extend IsApiAccess = array_length(UserAgents) == 0
    or (array_length(UserAgents) == 1 and UserAgents[0] == "")
| join kind=leftouter (
    ThreatIntelIndicators
    | where IsActive == true and IsDeleted == false
    | where ObservableKey == "ipv4-addr:value"
    | where isnotempty(ObservableValue)
    | summarize
        ThreatTags=make_set(Tags),
        TIConfidence=max(Confidence)
      by ObservableValue
) on $left.ClientIP == $right.ObservableValue
| extend IsThreatIP   = isnotnull(TIConfidence)
| extend ThreatTags   = iff(IsThreatIP, ThreatTags, dynamic([]))
| extend TIConfidence = iff(IsThreatIP, TIConfidence, 0)
| project FirstAccess, LastAccess, ClientIP,
          DistinctMailboxes, TotalMailAccess, AccessesPerMailbox,
          IsApiAccess, IsThreatIP, ThreatTags, TIConfidence,
          MailboxList, UserAgents
          | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or ClientIP contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by IsThreatIP desc, IsApiAccess desc, DistinctMailboxes desc
| summarize Count=count() by ClientIP
| top 10 by Count
